[**July 5, 1859:** Captain N.C. Brooks sighted what is now known as the Midway Atoll while aboard the sealing ship _Gambia_. He named the islands the Middlebrook Islands and claimed them for the United States under the Guano Islands Act of 1856. The atoll was the first Pacific island annexed by the United States and was controlled by the U.S. Navy. ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=f1bc72bc4d68439da81e15d3a35a57e3&_e=CGAZpSCsQDdaQ8ZnEcYPijr90r_0AAa6USrnp0UnUobGAkk8QSy9bfsiDl15QrSqImO4PBa0PRSXP5_8vBaB2AXd8o8CQ5F-BcGZbFTCLkj740xkQQika14xSD7E6nFopxmppvNOXuMVjgMdQmlEcIsU_r6Kcsw3QCHI9uYpNsvVB6d7fFAeYNH720i3KUzDqf-MmJINgUgU4I--BV7yvWAm__LQvjFeDMX3NUgvNr0%3D) **Source -[wikipedia.org](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=f1bc72bc4d68439da81e15d3a35a57e3&_e=CGAZpSCsQDdaQ8ZnEcYPijr90r_0AAa6USrnp0UnUobGAkk8QSy9bfsiDl15QrSqImO4PBa0PRSXP5_8vBaB2EBEtMFChA_rlO4Mfc8FiZ49j-XbXmZ5slLAGAV-rrQL_TfS_QELgJ5-yH50FsGvYgoMu4JANmnyI5XBe7xwvYrW2Zlhz_vHzXB-ksw0xXFtQIfpQpDMtobP8AfeFsuD2_LifeAyXJCS-NyXLjm0l_U%3D)**

[**July 5, 1971:** After North Carolina ratified the twenty-sixth amendment on July 1st, 1971, the necessary three-fourths of the states' ratification was obtained for the amendment to become a part of the Constitution. The Administrator of General Services, Robert Kunzig, certified its adoption alongside President Nixon. The amendment protects voting rights for U.S. citizens eighteen years and older. ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=f1bc72bc4d68439da81e15d3a35a57e3&_e=CGAZpSCsQDdaQ8ZnEcYPijr90r_0AAa6USrnp0UnUoZfsJJAN-_XK0_Ry0knea1X8DFQqhwyB9gXPQHno3kVY4MKNY3zHV_vQX5b_dLzpsZh638HMS7O8_EB2K3bYkZWBXXb6uVxVAIUHX6ndDgzSr0A8YWtXKcoh0fA8F8DJzMhB4rWLNFNIIT5JEwWA4r7Be5qxZRAqRWmGQJ5TmyRqfU39h_z5pkF1UlKfQLDt5WcogSXJg8FU-uTpsbJ_RaG) **Source -[wikipedia.org](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=f1bc72bc4d68439da81e15d3a35a57e3&_e=CGAZpSCsQDdaQ8ZnEcYPijr90r_0AAa6USrnp0UnUoZfsJJAN-_XK0_Ry0knea1X8DFQqhwyB9gXPQHno3kVY4MKNY3zHV_vQX5b_dLzpsbn1n4pW7Yikj8ylvWiE4GG8gBVfG0b5710fuoow7IskZDuMbtLADvIiuJh8WmtXJ0bvb3cBFWL756vS8l4jU8neYG6Tl0Cjo5Al9hE_ZzNbWtoYNzq6zZSu8hFdVAgHHl2SEzk5m1dUAb4AumnxnX8)**

[**July 5, 1989:** The American television series, Seinfeld, aired for the first time on NBC. The pilot episode started one of the smallest sitcom orders in television history, with only 5 episodes total in its first season. ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=f1bc72bc4d68439da81e15d3a35a57e3&_e=CGAZpSCsQDdaQ8ZnEcYPijr90r_0AAa6USrnp0UnUoZizLiPO27y7Kuu9D3eY-A_eUoJZP2Z2FgOnHyA-onOGv1LzMzl5zXMSJbUAtOq7qnPOLywL97YODA8NwnFEZd8Ct0sN5D-lwzC_EBaDMV3Y1lVp5nFgjAtLvPD4zPSP-wDHcvza4T89e-TPiNHihsfok-fTQvKLD_syzwS6h9vDDI2htCW9oKpoHW9A5dBqUUXJIrOjPGYNwvG90Jn_-kc) **Source -[wikipedia.org](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=f1bc72bc4d68439da81e15d3a35a57e3&_e=CGAZpSCsQDdaQ8ZnEcYPijr90r_0AAa6USrnp0UnUoZizLiPO27y7Kuu9D3eY-A_eUoJZP2Z2FgOnHyA-onOGv1LzMzl5zXMSJbUAtOq7qmAzlbKTmagU9G60-yWOd-8EGYQr2pHPKmLj893jWBhWVkDp4rLNxlNSTVyGfyuykgYCf5Vx1TVxJsr2nsmW32rVnh_FVTbaxsw47oT-Qi89l7xS2CCyYRnXhWRJDjhdgZt89KzT6ArD3EgOdt-EzHk)**

Here are a couple of my favorite parts:
_But just when you thought Christie was dead again for 43rd time ... well, a quick check at the PredictIt markets show otherwise._
_**He’s the third-favorite for the GOP nomination right now,**__behind Trump and Ron DeSantis, and tied with Tim Scott. ..._
_**Christie is in a unique position among all the other candidates**_ _in that A) as a former federal prosecutor, he might feel in his bones what’s going to happen to Trump, legally speaking, which might be why he decided to run in the first place, and B) he’s known Trump forever, and might feel in his bones what Trump might do if he sees the legal — or electoral — writing on the wall. ..._

## Why Chris Christie:

Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America.

clean_body: | | | | | Friend, I hope that you all enjoyed your 4th of July. I want to pass along an article that may be of interest to many of you, from " The Trentonian". In addition to praising the Governor for his “bi-partisan track record, executive experience, fiscal conservatism,” they appropriately entitled the article “Chris Christie 2024 Is Becoming More Real By The Day.” Here are a couple of my favorite parts: But just when you thought Christie was dead again for 43rd time ... well, a quick check at the PredictIt markets show otherwise. He’s the third-favorite for the GOP nomination right now,behind Trump and Ron DeSantis, and tied with Tim Scott. ... Christie is in a unique position among all the other candidates in that A) as a former federal prosecutor, he might feel in his bones what’s going to happen to Trump, legally speaking, which might be why he decided to run in the first place, and B) he’s known Trump forever, and might feel in his bones what Trump might do if he sees the legal — or electoral — writing on the wall. ... So can it happen?Can New Jersey’s own Chris Christie make the ultimate political comeback?Well, as another famous New Jerseyan once said, “It ain’t over ‘till it’s over.” Governor Christie is getting close to reaching his goal of " 40,000 unique donors" needed to qualify for the GOP debate. Thank you for your efforts in getting the Governor on the debate stage. Be sure to continue to share emails, releases, and social media posts from Tell It Like It Is PAC to those in your network as well as the donate link: Thank you for your continued support, Bill Palatucci Chairman, Tell It Like It Is PAC | Why Chris Christie: Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America. | [PAID FOR BY TELL IT LIKE IT IS PAC. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. TELLITLIKEITISPAC.COM]() Contributions to Chris Christie for President, Inc. are not tax deductible. Bill Palatucci 3804 Wilson Blvd, Arlington, VA 22203 \- =

Friend,

Today, I’m asking you to join me in supporting Attorney General Eric Holder and the National Democratic Redistricting Committee and their critically important work. I hope you’ll give me the chance to explain why, but **if you’re already on board, you can pitch in now using this link:[_https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ndrc-nancypelosi_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66040241/415135203/-473662111?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230705_FR_7NP1_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4NjI3MzllLTlhMWItZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CzkvnFqewr0DLhmDWwdHCbDV1puByHbyAHsocdkJ-p0=)**

For years, I’ve warned that today’s Republican Party is a threat to our Democracy. The NDRC, led by my friend, Eric Holder, has been fighting back **_for years_** – and it has achieved great success. **Thanks to their efforts, the 2022 midterm elections took place on the fairest congressional maps in 40 years.**

Recently, the Supreme Court issued major pro-voter, pro-Democracy decisions in cases pursued by our fair maps movement, siding with voters and upholding our system of checks and balances. But we know the threats to our Democracy do not end with one or two decisions.

You and I both know that this fight for fair maps and our Democracy is far from over. That’s why the NDRC needs our help to continue building this movement – and it’s why I’m asking you to consider donating today to help power its work.

**The NDRC’s work is made possible by grassroots supporters like you. I know not everyone reading this message will be able to give, but I’m hoping that just 12 generous donors from your area will do their part to strengthen our Democracy by making a contribution of any amount before midnight tonight.**
**Will you be one of them, friend?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: | | = Friend, Today, I’m asking you to join me in supporting Attorney General Eric Holder and the National Democratic Redistricting Committee and their critically important work. I hope you’ll give me the chance to explain why, but if you’re already on board, you can pitch in now using this link:= For years, I’ve warned that today’s Republican Party is a threat to our Democracy. The NDRC, led by my friend, Eric Holder, has been fighting back for years – and it has achieved great success. Thanks to their efforts, the 2022 midterm elections took place on the fairest congressional maps in 40 years. Recently, the Supreme Court issued major pro-voter, pro-Democracy decisions in cases pursued by our fair maps movement, siding with voters and upholding our system of checks and balances. But we know the threats to our Democracy do not end with one or two decisions. You and I both know that this fight for fair maps and our Democracy is far from over. That’s why the NDRC needs our help to continue building this movement – and it’s why I’m asking you to consider donating today to help power its work. The NDRC’s work is made possible by grassroots supporters like you. I know not everyone reading this message will be able to give, but I’m hoping that just 12 generous donors from your area will do their part to strengthen our Democracy by making a contribution of any amount before midnight tonight. Will you be one of them, friend? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Together, we can prevail against the forces seeking to weaken our Democracy – I’m sure of it. Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi Nancy Pelosi is only asking for donations of up $5,000 per year for the National Democratic Redistricting Committee. She is not asking for donations in excess of federal limits or from federally prohibited sources, such as corporations, labor organizations, foreign nationals, federal contractors, or national banks. = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 1015 18th Street NW, Suite 1000 Washington, DC 20036 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

| | Friend,

---
Yesterday, we celebrated the adversity our great country has overcome, and we honored the blood, sweat, and tears that have been sacrificed in the name of keeping our Republic FREE.

---
But we also must recognize that freedom in America is hanging on by a mere thread under Crooked Joe Biden and the radical Left’s Third World tin-pot dictatorship.

---
_Make no mistake, 2024 is the FINAL battle._

---
Either _we_ win and restore America to its former glory (_AND MORE_), or _they_ do, and we lose our country for good.

---
Friend, there were no doubt times when our Founding Fathers faced seemingly insurmountable adversity – **_but it wasn’t in their blood to surrender_**.

---
_And now, as we face tyrannical forces who seek to destroy our country from within, our Party needs a candidate – and our country a leader – who will never bend the knee.
_
---
So, in honor of Independence Day 2023, I ask that freedom-loving patriots like YOU make a pledge...

---
**...A pledge to stand with the** _**only**_**candidate who will NEVER,****_EVER_****SURRENDER our country to the Left’s tyranny.**

---
And in return, I promise _YOU_ this: **When I’m back in the White House, YOUR life and our country**** _will_****be GREAT AGAIN! **

---

If you want to ensure our emails always go to your inbox, please add [contact@support.donaldjtrump.com](mailto:contact@support.donaldjtrump.com) to your address book.

Thank you for joining Team Trump. It’s because of grassroots supporters like YOU that we’ve been able to consistently call out the Fake News media EVERY SINGLE TIME they try to spread misinformation or outright LIES about the important work President Trump is doing to SAVE AMERICA. Reaching grassroots supporters directly is CRITICAL if we’re going to Save America from Joe Biden and the Left. But, in order to do that we need to provide supporters with the most up-to-date information on all of our efforts.

**TEXT TRUMP to 88022** to start receiving text messages from President Trump.

It’s because of the commitment and support from real Patriots, like YOU Friend, that we will SAVE AMERICA! Thank you again for your generous support. clean_body: In honor of Independence Day 2023, pledge your support for FREEDOM.| | | | | Friend, Yesterday, we celebrated the adversity our great country has overcome, and we honored the blood, sweat, and tears that have been sacrificed in the name of keeping our Republic FREE. But we also must recognize that freedom in America is hanging on by a mere thread under Crooked Joe Biden and the radical Left’s Third World tin-pot dictatorship. Make no mistake, 2024 is the FINAL battle. Either we win and restore America to its former glory (AND MORE), or they do, and we lose our country for good. Friend, there were no doubt times when our Founding Fathers faced seemingly insurmountable adversity – but it wasn’t in their blood to surrender. And now, as we face tyrannical forces who seek to destroy our country from within, our Party needs a candidate – and our country a leader – who will never bend the knee. So, in honor of Independence Day 2023, I ask that freedom-loving patriots like YOU make a pledge... ...A pledge to stand with the onlycandidate who will NEVER,EVERSURRENDER our country to the Left’s tyranny. And in return, I promise YOU this: When I’m back in the White House, YOUR life and our country willbe GREAT AGAIN! Thank you, - Donald J. [Austin Directs DOD Components to Reinforce Classified Safeguards Following Security Review](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z49knmc7pbtajj2keiovvq04ek5uuiamqhhp1e88_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t46mqj4t5m6gpr2d9j6kprct9jmkrncst66uqrf8j0c9j6f837cug6apt46lr72t5jmmgj9cjl6oonctd16uojb9hnmmo7fctl6eonctd1euqq4t9kmepjfcjm6kqqccdk6pr79cpkmkojb9jk6cqjedbk69ojctd36uor3dtneipredd6ekr3asjkm5qfb8jl6dqbadrnk8gq48bi4bh28or0s3hm4pj2chhm49fg)
Secretary of Defense Lloyd J. Austin III has tasked Defense Department components with implementing a series of recommendations aimed at improving classified information safeguards. This action follows the Pentagon's review of departmentwide security programs and policies undertaken after the unauthorized disclosure of sensitive information discovered online in the spring.

subject: We've got BIG news 🎉
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Kim for Congress - CA34_
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/0e90c66c685a/weve-got-big-news?e=fee98d637f)
---
| | [ ](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=0a32835847&e=fee98d637f)
---
| | [ ](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=ebc72ce24e&e=fee98d637f)
---
| | **Dear friend:**

_**I’m very excited to announce that I am officially running for U.S. Congress in CA’s 34th Congressional District!**_

This isn’t the first time I’m running as a grassroots challenger candidate. **Last year, we won 49% of the general election votes against the corporate-backed incumbent. **We are celebrating you and the movement we’ve built together! With your continued support we’re confident we’ll finally edge out the influence of special interests and win back power for the people of CA-34.

**I’m running for Congress because our current representative – Jimmy Gomez – continues to prioritize corporations and the wealthy few over the needs of his constituents. We deserve a representative who will co-govern and implement life empowering policies that will put people over profit.**

As a children’s court attorney, I have witnessed firsthand how poverty, resource deprivation, and a broken system of government keeps failing us. I know what it’s like to be buried in debt, working 2-3 jobs to survive. Grit and determination often aren’t enough to get you through hard times. We deserve a safety net that uplifts people and meets our basic needs.

I am running a 100% grassroots clean-money campaign because it’s time to put our community first.

**We’ll do it through:**
* **People-Powered Politics**
* **Co-Governance**
* **Life-Empowering Policies **

**Let’s do this together! **
* **DONATE:** Make a secure online contribution by [clicking here](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=5d43c26d68&e=fee98d637f).
* **VOLUNTEER:** Join our team by [signing up here](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=b51a8fdddf&e=fee98d637f).
* **SPREAD THE WORD:** Support us on [Facebook](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=70f4b7cad9&e=fee98d637f), [Instagram](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=4e3f39fbc7&e=fee98d637f), [Twitter](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=238bfe680c&e=fee98d637f), and [TikTok](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=1e02963d72&e=fee98d637f).

**We need bold leaders who will serve with a true heart of public service. We’d had enough of self-service politics. It’s time for people-centered politics. It’s time for us!**

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | Dear friend: I’m very excited to announce that I am officially running for U.S. Congress in CA’s 34th Congressional District! This isn’t the first time I’m running as a grassroots challenger candidate. Last year, we won 49% of the general election votes against the corporate-backed incumbent. We are celebrating you and the movement we’ve built together! With your continued support we’re confident we’ll finally edge out the influence of special interests and win back power for the people of CA-34. I’m running for Congress because our current representative – Jimmy Gomez – continues to prioritize corporations and the wealthy few over the needs of his constituents. We deserve a representative who will co-govern and implement life empowering policies that will put people over profit. As a children’s court attorney, I have witnessed firsthand how poverty, resource deprivation, and a broken system of government keeps failing us. I know what it’s like to be buried in debt, working 2-3 jobs to survive. Grit and determination often aren’t enough to get you through hard times. We deserve a safety net that uplifts people and meets our basic needs. I am running a 100% grassroots clean-money campaign because it’s time to put our community first. We’ll do it through: People-Powered Politics Co-Governance Life-Empowering Policies Let’s do this together! DONATE: Make a secure online contribution by . VOLUNTEER: Join our team by . SPREAD THE WORD: Support us on , , , and . We need bold leaders who will serve with a true heart of public service. We’d had enough of self-service politics. It’s time for people-centered politics. It’s time for us! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by David Kim for Congress - CA34 Our mailing address is: David Kim for Congress - CA34609 Saint Paul Avenue#405Los Angeles, CA 90017 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

name: Will Hurd
subject: About New Hampshire...
body:
The first-in-the-nation primary state...
| | | |
---
_**A Note from Will Hurd...**_
---
|
---
[](https://hurdwwillhurd.cmail19.com/t/t-l-zidtitd-jhlkdhlhhk-r/)
---
What do you know about New Hampshire?
---
| | [](https://hurdwwillhurd.cmail19.com/t/t-l-zidtitd-jhlkdhlhhk-y/)
---
| [](https://hurdwwillhurd.cmail19.com/t/t-l-zidtitd-jhlkdhlhhk-j/)
---
| | Here's what I know...
* They are the most politically active state in the nation
* They take their job as the "first-in-the-nation" presidential primary state very seriously
* They love their Dunkin'
* From the White Mountains to the State House, every bit of it is beautiful

I just finished up an incredible trip to the state – from Nashua to Concord to the northern border – and along with New England scenery, I can attest that Granite Staters are welcoming and extremely nice. Honestly, strangers on the street would stop me, say hi, and ask about my presidential platform and what I would do if elected. Folks were happy to hear I'm more interested in good policy than good politics. We also all agreed – when it comes to the Presidential Election, _**options are ALWAYS better.**_ [_**You can ensure that we have a better option on the GOP debate stage by donating your first $1 donation today to help me reach 40,000 donors to qualify!**_](https://hurdwwillhurd.cmail19.com/t/t-l-zidtitd-jhlkdhlhhk-t/) I refuse to sign a loyalty pledge, but I intend to fulfill all other requirements and show the RNC and America that this campaign is serious and about people, not politicians. Thank you, **Will Hurd** _Candidate for President | Former Texas Congressman_

name: Read/Act News
subject: Our country is facing a constitutional crisis
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | |
---
| | [](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American,Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](http://trk.readactnews.).

Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It’s a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only.**The Constitution of “We the People” is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can’t just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION—to DO SOMETHING about it, while there’s still time to save our country.**

That is why I’m writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of “We the People”—before it’s too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic—knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](http://trk.readactnews._Ri4gXmB7B_uCUQ)**

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5lcu18msprnq1o9qh0fpn9poufm61a14r0tvv30_rp22sh2s8i66o70sdj6eor1cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z52tb273661f4fci45r1hq6v6r9694re1nqv6pg0_rp22sh2s8i66o70sdj6eor1cth2bs) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5lq71tdvjai30i4jdnktrpf11tqr2b87g7rd72o_rp22sh2s8i66o70sdj6eor1cth2bs) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Pro Life Update
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Who rules whom?
body:
The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu9f1tljcql8fsm09gf36hv215n3tg5hblil87og_rp22sh2s8i66o70sdj6eor1cth2bs)

## Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state—that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans?
[YES](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmpb4njc3qlkcaeiv89no5k5rr0u54gou8rtt86o_rp22sh2s8i66o70sdj6eor1cth2bs) [NO](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7qmmit8lrpd7va34pfiaubod0baa2lllgenba1g_rp22sh2s8i66o70sdj6eor1cth2bs) Responding will only take a few minutes. clean_body: The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials. | | | | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its . Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state—that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans? Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because our country is facing a constitutional crisis. It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: who rules whom? The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history. Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens. This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations. But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. That is why I'm writing to you today. Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late. To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty? Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link: Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty! Warm regards, Larry P. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Will Hurd
subject: About New Hampshire...
body:
The first-in-the-nation primary state...
| | | |
---
_**A Note from Will Hurd...**_
---
|
---
[](https://hurdwwillhurd.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ziddic-jhlkdhlhhk-r/)
---
What do you know about New Hampshire?
---
| | [](https://hurdwwillhurd.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ziddic-jhlkdhlhhk-y/)
---
| [](https://hurdwwillhurd.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ziddic-jhlkdhlhhk-j/)
---
| | Here's what I know...
* They are the most politically active state in the nation
* They take their job as the "first-in-the-nation" presidential primary state very seriously
* They love their Dunkin'
* From the White Mountains to the State House, every bit of it is beautiful

I just finished up an incredible trip to the state – from Nashua to Concord to the northern border – and along with New England scenery, I can attest that Granite Staters are welcoming and extremely nice. Honestly, strangers on the street would stop me, say hi, and ask about my presidential platform and what I would do if elected. Folks were happy to hear I'm more interested in good policy than good politics. We also all agreed – when it comes to the Presidential Election, _**options are ALWAYS better.**_ [_**You can ensure that we have a better option on the GOP debate stage by donating your first $1 donation today to help me reach 40,000 donors to qualify!**_](https://hurdwwillhurd.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ziddic-jhlkdhlhhk-t/) I refuse to sign a loyalty pledge, but I intend to fulfill all other requirements and show the RNC and America that this campaign is serious and about people, not politicians. Thank you, **Will Hurd** _Candidate for President | Former Texas Congressman_
---

name: The Flyover
subject: Navy Chases Off Iranians, Tipping Culture Backlash, and a Violently Toxic Plant Locked Up
body:
The U.S. Navy prevented Iranian gunboats from seizing two oil tankers in the Gulf of Oman Wednesday. Iran has been attacking ships in those international waters since 2019.

| | | [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJydjrGOwjAQRL8m7ojWXjsJhYu7gg4aCkrLZ6-JwYlRYpD4eyykk664CmnKN2-GNO_6YeilBGBeByJByKIWIBCQK9hKxWUbgiOUCnvkCEPnGwnkY8lLe8lxLiOF9MwPWlqXJzbqoJzlFVaD66UCua12UATBehS8-2FJj6Xc1ga_GrGr-cdy2pu9jSnO54OdSJeQzW3JqwHccLURaI42FbMSeUNTBfNsXfSVITeSuxrOFn25XyklOzXi21Ow91Tq8V-i_VN7L5YPRl71WWnS)
---
[](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FuwyAQANCvgS3W-TAHGRi6eEvXjhbBR3wNNpaNEvXvK3XuDzzpfd2mW5Qi2-MzrhxarlNMTV48gbvQBc2Eeg6ZGdloDj15TwMO5PUSekjAZGwma_vMKSMDuOvVObCEOWkJCGjAAcHVIlIH3vRDb-8eiO7GRTUAz9Lq0X1X2drCufzUFx9dqqsuYWltP5X5UDgqHItsz7M733E_W0zPLlWFo99l1keY97eUIic5NcBjjVL-iPZv6DcAAP__zn5K7A)
| | |
# THURSDAY, JULY 6, 2023
---|---
**Good morning!** Today is the anniversary of baseball's first All-Star game, [played in 1933](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FyqzAQQNGvEZ2ZZSWEKFT4FbwmTpMipWaxFryOsDxCsSd_n0nqlLe6c95P4USS5La-0sa-LjnQucqDAwwHe0AdsIl-YUbWDfvOOmcNGuuai4ceRyDneg0zo1l6HJAjwGh6PRsXG_EIqGEAC2OPaFtwujNdPzuwdtYDKQMcpebSXrPc6oWX9JUfXNpz3prkL7Xed6WPCieFE9_ap3zInaNQm8uqcPpphVM3ah1OdM0lvDCtnxz-0c4zpRSOKR3eKpXwnzZuio_3p6Qkux2UgXUjSb-v-qf8OwAA__-p0FjT). The American League won that first match 4-2, powered by a Babe Ruth homer, and it leads the National League 47-43 over 90 years of play. In today's edition, we discuss the US Navy's success in stopping an Iranian attack, the growing irritation Americans feel about tipping, and one of the world's most toxic plants being locked up in a special "poison garden."

Have any suggestions? [Please send us a note](mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback+for+The+Flyover)**** and let us know. We read every email and value your ideas! If this is your first time reading _The Flyover_ , [sign up here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsjz1vwyAUAH8NbLEej08PDJUqb-na0QL8iKlwiFwaq_--ambPdzrpPq_zNZRa7rePsJHvuc0h9fKkGezFXFDOyBefiZAkJy-Mc0ahMo6vHoQLFrPFpEjmqMeICROOgrSOAjIvHgElWDAwakQzgJNCCR0dGBOlDUwBLaW3ffhq5d5XyvW3PWkfUtt49WvvDybfGE4Mp-M4Tqx_JqefvjH5roDvfnkcpdbybSxTcNtCqa9YP137CwAA___xnE4h) and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? [Click here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz71uwyAUQOGngS3W9eXHMDB0YUu6VOpogbnUtE6oHGSUt6-6ez860vd5na-hbOXxdQt3ci3XOSytHDSDuqC9oJiRJ5eJkAQnN2qjhEajRr46kzXKkAhj0piUjTGbOOUIi5VkreLFIaAAhXYEOYIeIE5GqCAkqQlkEEwCpdLqPnzX8mgr5e1VD9qHpd755tbWfp9MvDH0DH3vfchhoVjrz3_A0H-s5LfX-0H7jfqToee7S-EoiUk4ObZz4F8AAAD__8ycUlk). Enjoying _the Flyover_? Take a moment to check out today's sponsor, [AURA](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FuwyAQANCvgS3W-TAHGRi6eEvXjhbBR3wNNpaNEvXvK3XuDzzpfd2mW5Qi2-MzrhxarlNMTV48gbvQBc2Eeg6ZGdloDj15TwMO5PUSekjAZGwma_vMKSMDuOvVObCEOWkJCGjAAcHVIlIH3vRDb-8eiO7GRTUAz9Lq0X1X2drCufzUFx9dqqsuYWltP5X5UDgqHItsz7M733E_W0zPLlWFo99l1keY97eUIic5NcBjjVL-iPZv6DcAAP__zn5K7A).

|
---
## Navy Destroyer Stops Iranian Gunship Attacks
The U.S. Navy [prevented Iranian gunboats](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGO4yAQxvGnwR0WHjCQguIad7n2SgubcTy3OEQwiZW3X2Xrbb-v-en_7zpfI2W63_7GAwNvZY4r0wtn5aSVoGfoUtgQAXWHYbDeWwPG-m4PRgHExWtwF5tGnXDc_LqMbjCrS1qnjgIo0Mopqy4jgO2V14MZxsUraxftojAKE3Gp_f9Cd95xy-_ywtqv5ehy2JkfTeg_AiYB03mefcUnY22f_7OUmpOA6aCUMkqMjQVMbS_c5EYVkyyUJcf7F1Z5e-ZNHrES04Gy4fqsxG-5lETY5AcqlZNqFDB1NaTHSTlTs04YdTsi5R8T_1roOwAA__-jUWck) from seizing two oil tankers in the Gulf of Oman Wednesday. Iran has been attacking ships in those international waters since 2019. In both cases, the Iranian naval vessels retreated when the missile destroyer USS McFaul arrived. In the second incident, the Iranians were actively firing at an oil tanker with small arms, but they left when the McFaul arrived. ([Military Video](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFyqzAQAL8GOjHyCU68QsVr3DltSkbACV8idB4kW3G-PuPUaXeLndn3y3TxHDltb34nV4JMfin8oElbhQrMBO3qAhGQacmdcByxhx7H9uqW0S6LHYYZPBq0lhbqCbWeifwwBGrZgQajrUb9bwDATo_m1J-GedSIs7G-6TWtXOToPoRTuVKIT3nQ0S2yt9FdS7nlxvxv4NzAudbaBflKVPPLv4gccW3gfM8q-cdT5SK3rPjwSWXib06bKlWUcFTFp086struMSgJSnaf2sOtt8oxckbb9HrbPcffdPlzxE8AAAD__-JvYSE)) Iranian authorities had no comment. Pentagon officials cited the McFaul for its "exceptional effort."
## Diversity Execs Exit Hollywood
Three movie studios and the Motion Picture Academy laid off or [lost their top diversity executives](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGOszAQhJ8GukX2YgwpXKShy9_-JTJ4CXtn7Ag7WHn7E1dfNSONNPr0_X9MD8uew_Of3cnkNU52yXzSJHrQgO2EtTMrEVJbk5F6GLRCpYd6M0OnezlLLckJVMuq1TzcFqex727LvMqaDQpsRS-0uHWIuhFDK5Xs5kFoPbe9rZQgxzkezVfkkDda_SeedDRL3GtvtpxfqWrvFY4VjqWUZk_h2iocKcA7VTju8WS6SqByheOTjsT5A6vN_HwTbNH7T4nRgY-JEihwxODJOjoScABPKUHebACEQvR93dgD7nfptjG868O4V2HvOem-UuK5W_a_hPlPXz8BAAD__4QLbLs) in the past two weeks, leading some to question the value of the role. The studios affected were Disney, Netflix, Warner Bros. Discovery, and the Motion Picture Academy itself. The departed executives oversaw their company's diversity, equity and inclusion (DEI) efforts. The reasons for the departures vary, but [so many coming in so short a time](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGSrCAQAL8GMywccPQFBC8x20svtFCGde5QLKFW_fur2_jiTrr78zE-HEfenh9uJVtCGt1c-EWj6iRK0CNU3gYiIF2RbbDv0YDBvlos9Z02xqm2Q5zINKC9a7AxboJ2cjNVbEGBVp1C9a8FwFr1ujFNO_UKcdKdE0aR55KO-ivxVhYK8U4vOuo5rVW0Syl7Fvq_gEHAcJ5nHdK10Zl_uYBhJc9OwFDSLj2xpIvmLD3njW65UQmRL0kXF5l3d3xnOR9ceOa8SgqB3p0b5SyXFON9puSrw_r95Bg5YyeMeq6O49um_PnmJwAA__8BSGhf) has sparked discussion in Hollywood about whether the studio diversity job is even meaningful.
## Survey: Tipping Culture is Out of Control
Tipping has become [a modern nightmare](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuhiAURp8GNwxeFHVg6OL2d-1oAC96GwQj-Ju-fWPnLt_yJScn5-s1vwwFiuun2VEXn2bjCr1xFj1XHOQM1aI9IqCsUDdqGFQLrRqqTTsxOjX00svFCzs2xiuPyovOj9Ia21SkQYAUvVBi7ABULQbZtE1nB6GUlb1hrcCFSjrr70SxbOjDT3rjWbu0V0FvpRyZyQ8GE4Ppvu_aReuek8H0oBlMon-mYzAVOg6KK3dXKNeJnDJPV-HJc5diOVPg-MbIc9qR2ytTxJwxc7OeiPVW9lCdejluCoGy6lkr1t1Q-FMp_4b5DQAA___jP2Rz), according to a new survey that shows two-thirds of Americans have a negative view of the practice, and one-third say it's out of control. New [tip-screen technologies](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLuO2zAQAL-G7GhQy6cKFmnUOW1KgbKW0ga0KIhrB_n7g6--aooBppg_9_meqdKx_c5PTFzanB9Mb5x1UF6BmUGuqSACGolp8DF6C9ZHuSfIpYwFggvxYYwNrrihrM7F0Q0W_SIpgQajg_Z6dAD-pqMZ7OCWqL1fTMjCalyJ23X72-jgHUv939543R7tKWvamc8uzC8Bk4CJd9yp1o8TMC2vTgf2LmCy2pshjIq6urBzfl35YMV0nnRsakPmD9uLVStqz8cqYJJXWs9_VCt1H4TV2zPTd1ryjxO-AgAA____5Vzt) have forced people to tip even at fast-food joints with the cashier watching, and often for higher-than-expected amounts, known as "tipflation." There's no simple answer to the problem, but tipping etiquette experts are weighing in. Here are five situations [where you shouldn't tip,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1uhDAQBp_GdEb24r8rXKShu7QpkYHl2MRgApsjefuI1Gm-5pNmpHm7d_dEmdbHa1ow8lS6NDA9sVNeOglNB9UYJ0TApsKoXQjOgHGhmqOf-tSjHXUAbf1tsEaPxmoTQGmrwFcUQUGjvHLqZgFcrUKjjbZ9UM71jU_CKByJy16_F1p5xin_lCfu9VCWKseZeTtE8yKgFdCe51kPaz9cp4D2Qgtolb_GCmiR6fMLmVHi94Y7H_KccZXEhywfci0suUimrZ55ydUex-2knOlwXhj1WBLlPy3_G-E3AAD__wNIW0o) and here are general rules for [how much to tip](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDFvtSAYhX8Nbhh4UeQbGL7F7XbtaBBfLjQoVl6v7b9v7Nzl5CQnOXnyvD-mh0s5bc83t6KlUCbnKb1wEgPXHNQEzWIDIqBq0EptjO6g06aJ1vQaUCKYflYafDCLWNAHKd3i-0FCkywIUGIQWvzrAXQrjJKd7GcjtJ7V4FgncElUjvajpI0ihvxdXni0vqxNtpFor0z9ZzAyGK_rav02-3tkMN7XDEYx3HE3pPR5IhFy_NrxIB7LxdfTR06FU9q5I35gJXcebqPKYyHMlfsSAiKvsey1jbTm5rDLfqWcU9UD68RzdSn_EtGffn4CAAD__18SZtI) when you do.

clean_body: The U.S. Navy prevented Iranian gunboats from seizing two oil tankers in the Gulf of Oman Wednesday. Iran has been attacking ships in those international waters since 2019. | | | | | | THURSDAY, JULY 6, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! Today is the anniversary of baseball's first All-Star game, . The American League won that first match 4-2, powered by a Babe Ruth homer, and it leads the National League 47-43 over 90 years of play. In today's edition, we discuss the US Navy's success in stopping an Iranian attack, the growing irritation Americans feel about tipping, and one of the world's most toxic plants being locked up in a special "poison garden." Have any suggestions? mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback+for+The+Flyover** and let us know. We read every email and value your ideas! If this is your first time reading The Flyover , and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? . Enjoying the Flyover? Take a moment to check out today's sponsor, . | Navy Destroyer Stops Iranian Gunship Attacks The U.S. Navy from seizing two oil tankers in the Gulf of Oman Wednesday. Iran has been attacking ships in those international waters since 2019. In both cases, the Iranian naval vessels retreated when the missile destroyer USS McFaul arrived. In the second incident, the Iranians were actively firing at an oil tanker with small arms, but they left when the McFaul arrived. () Iranian authorities had no comment. Pentagon officials cited the McFaul for its "exceptional effort." Diversity Execs Exit Hollywood Three movie studios and the Motion Picture Academy laid off or in the past two weeks, leading some to question the value of the role. The studios affected were Disney, Netflix, Warner Bros. Discovery, and the Motion Picture Academy itself. The departed executives oversaw their company's diversity, equity and inclusion (DEI) efforts. The reasons for the departures vary, but has sparked discussion in Hollywood about whether the studio diversity job is even meaningful. Survey: Tipping Culture is Out of Control Tipping has become , according to a new survey that shows two-thirds of Americans have a negative view of the practice, and one-third say it's out of control. New have forced people to tip even at fast-food joints with the cashier watching, and often for higher-than-expected amounts, known as "tipflation." There's no simple answer to the problem, but tipping etiquette experts are weighing in. Here are five situations and here are general rules for when you do. Secretary of Defense Lloyd J. Austin III has tasked Defense Department components with implementing a series of recommendations aimed at improving classified information safeguards. This action follows the Pentagon's review of departmentwide security programs and policies undertaken after the unauthorized disclosure of sensitive information discovered online in the spring.

Voting is the basis of a government by the people and for the people. Not to mention that you don’t have a right to complain if you don’t go vote! https://click.team.takebackpennsylvania.com/?qs=64588c327964bfdcb32989d49d9f24cd35f3ac61eabba58ddf1400d89d1b668419388cb402d6c82f9570d5061432baf68c2c25b7161d577ab416bc132705580a ✅ I’M VOTING IN MY LOCAL PRIMARIES! My book outlines the steps to make this plan a reality, including educating our people, confronting China, and securing America. https://click.team.takebackpennsylvania.com/?qs=64588c327964bfdc08b7f0f316747bff3726ef3a6c3540819aa1024c59f3efb32feec8613157b0593bb67367df96712c7f8a9ca5526a614621587b27347eb567 If you’d like to read more about what a former paratrooper and business leader thinks about what we need to get our country back, I hope you’ll claim a signed copy today! https://click.team.takebackpennsylvania.com/?qs=64588c327964bfdc08b7f0f316747bff3726ef3a6c3540819aa1024c59f3efb32feec8613157b0593bb67367df96712c7f8a9ca5526a614621587b27347eb567 CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY https://click.team.takebackpennsylvania.com/?qs=64588c327964bfdc07b86e6a4e326e24945aab3ea714ae063e54b1501ed372335c9de50d5c46bd661b9b1e713cb4ddd779477e3a7ef1becb441487521b20f936 Pennsylvania is the most important battleground state in our country, which is why Democrats are keen to flip Pennsylvania permanently BLUE. The only way to save Pennsylvania is at the grassroots level. We have to start electing quality Republican leaders at the state level if we want to get the state – and our country – back on track. https://click.team.takebackpennsylvania.com/?qs=64588c327964bfdc07b86e6a4e326e24945aab3ea714ae063e54b1501ed372335c9de50d5c46bd661b9b1e713cb4ddd779477e3a7ef1becb441487521b20f936 We can’t renew America if conservatives cede the battleground state of Pennsylvania. <-

\*\*But NOW he wants to raise taxes by $4.7 TRILLION DOLLARS...

\*\*

Which would cut jobs, slash wages, and reduce economic growth for families already struggling to get by.

And if Joe Biden gets his way, \*\*this will start on October 1st, 2023.\*\*

What will happen to you?

\*\*What will you LET happen to you?\*\*

\*\*Are you prepared to accept the worst... the potential for higher inflation, higher food cost, and less money overall for yourself...\*\*

Or do you want to protect yourself from Biden’s plan...

\*\*BEFORE he does something worse than change the tax laws?\*\*

Right now — but potentially not for much longer — there’s a unique IRS loophole that could help protect your IRA, 401(k), pension, TSP, or savings account from Joe Biden’s economic disaster.

You could protect your money 100% tax- and penalty-free, too. For now.

\*\*Oh, one last thing...\*\*

Joe Biden has a long history of screwing over Americans.

It started in 1983, \*\*when he voted to slap income taxes on 50% of Social Security income\*\* , income that had previously been tax-free.

In 1994, \*\*he voted to up the amount of Social Security benefits subject to taxation,\*\* to 85%.

In 2000, \*\*he turned his attention to estate taxes, voting AGAINST the Estate Tax Elimination Act that would have phased out certain estate taxes by 2010.\*\*

Then in 2020, he wanted to raise over $3.3 TRILLION in taxes...

And now another $4.7 TRILLION!?

Don’t trust him to care about your money. Protect yourself now.

name: Blue Amp Action
subject: It's time to send Lauren Boebert packing...
body:
GOP’s lunatic caucus keeps the crazy coming
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T825e6e42-ecbf-4070-84fa-330ad55fe7be/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, [**Lauren Boebert's up to her usual tricks. Recently, she filed a motion to impeach President Biden. Why? She doesn't know.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T992d5f23-8718-4cbe-a214-513ad5b38d77/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Then, as her motion competed with Marjorie Taylor Greene's own dumb impeachment resolution, the two got into a screaming match on the House floor. _From _ The Hill:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf4c89a4a-df18-4732-bd62-869137835ac0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _That Boebert represents CO's 6th district is embarrassing. _**_It's only a +6 GOP district, with enough Republicans sick of her circus act that in 2022, it was the closest race in the country. Democrat Adam Frisch only lost by 546 votes. _** _Frisch is running again to protect a woman's right to choose, our democracy, our climate and create jobs. Boebert? She's too busy trying to impeach President Biden and getting into fights on the House floor as part of her daily **" Angertainment."**_ **_Frisch only lost to Boebert in '22 because he was massively outspent._** Meanwhile, **_Boebert has sucked up every corporate cent since_** , with **over $1MM in her campaign. **So **_we must ensure Frisch is well-funded. If he is, he'll win._** [**_Will you give Adam Frisch $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can? We need to send a businessman and family man to Congress, while ridding our Capitol of Boebert the clown. Chip in any amount now!_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te09c8073-f616-4d1b-b790-74488bdf9c84/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thanks for helping us take back the House from the GOP lunatic caucus._ Cliff
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T812d03e1-a175-457d-b952-31b901730751/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: EPA may approve toxic pesticides for another 15 years
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1862855?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Toxic pesticides _KILLING endangered species_ \- stop the EPA from approving them for another 15 years! Please take immediate action!** Neonics pesticides are extraordinarily toxic, Friend. In fact, the EPA’s own assessment found that commonly used neonics are likely driving **more than 200 threatened and endangered species toward extinction!** Emerald dragonflies, Karner blue butterflies, and the _**beloved Rusty-Patched Bumblebee**_ could disappear! The Rusty-Patched Bumblebee population has _**PLUMMETED 90%**_ in just the past few decades. Despite SPIRALING wild bee populations and the threats to hundreds of endangered species,**the EPA is set to approve neonics for another 15 years!** We don’t have 15 years --**bees are dying _every second_ we wait! ****[Please, Friend, tell the EPA to BAN bee-killing pesticides before it’s too late! Add your name by 11:59 pm TONIGHT!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1862856?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** *** 327 SIGNATURES MISSING FROM YOUR STATE, FRIEND *** | [Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1862857?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Bees and other pollinators support **1 of every 3 bites** of food that we eat. Our grocery stores rely on them to keep shelves stocked. But neonics have made U.S. agriculture nearly _**48x MORE TOXIC TO BEES**_ over the past few decades, making it harder for bees to support the crops we rely on.
The science is clear, Friend: neonics are a danger to pollinators, endangered species, our food system, and the planet. The EPA itself has come to this conclusion, but it still could move forward with approving these toxic pesticides for fifteen more years. [**Help save bees and endangered species from neonic pesticides!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1862858?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1862857?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Kendra Klein
Deputy director of science,
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: Karen Greenhalgh
subject: Get Involved with Team Greenhalgh
body:
| | | Folks, I hope you had a great 4th of July! I was able to spend time with my family and reflect on the great opportunities that this nation has allowed us and look toward what we will be able to accomplish together over the next year. That’s where you come in. So much is at stake this fall, the progress we have been able to make over the past two years under Governor Youngkin’s leadership is just the beginning! In my last election, I won by less than 150 votes – if anyone hadn’t done what they did to help me get elected, I might not have won. So, I am asking for your help again. **This Saturday we will be deploying door knockers with Kevin Adams’ Campaign.**
---
---
Who: You! (and me)What: Door KnockingWhen: 10AM on Saturday July 8thWhere: Our Campaign HQ 468 Investors Place Suite 202 If you have never knocked on doors before, my team will be there to train you and answer any questions. name: Shift WA
subject: Why Shift? Our work following the money.
body:
City of Mukilteo residents were treated to a newsletter with a hefty price tag of more than $60,000 - courtesy of their hard-earned tax dollars. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61941808:WI1v9ZDN9:m:1:2610672541:F001AB06EF29ED444804BB85FFCE86DD:r "Shift Washington")
---
|
Friends, Back in 2014, Shift WA brought to readers' attention what must have been one of the world's priciest government newsletters. City of Mukilteo residents were treated to a newsletter with a hefty price tag of more than $60,000 - courtesy of their hard-earned tax dollars. The newsletter was penned by none other than Democrat State Senator. Marko Liias himself, and one would have assumed they would have a true masterpiece on their hands. Alas, the newsletter failed to meet expectations. Readers were given nauseatingly bland articles like, "What to do about caterpillars?" and "Summer Safety Tips." More disappointing was the fact that most, if not all, of the articles were not actually written by the well-connected partisan Sen. Liias. How did it all come about? Then-Mukilteo Mayor Jennifer Gregerson, a longtime political ally of Liias, hired him to manage the city newsletter and other assigned projects. She contracted Liias for a part-time job with an astonishing salary of $65,450 per year. After Shift WA exposed the details of Liias' new job spread, charges of cronyism finally began to fly - especially given Liias' time-consuming work in the State Senate. Mayor Gregerson swiftly responded to the allegations by assuring the media that Mukilteo would work out an unpaid "leave of absence" arrangement for the time Liias would spend in Olympia. But Mayor Gregerson steadfastly maintained that Liias was simply the best person for the job and not receiving any special treatment. The story may have been humorous - but it exposed something far more serious: Democrats' undeniable cronyism. Democrats' reward their allies - from other politicians to far-Left organizations - with taxpayer dollars. It's a pattern, and we here at Shift WA are here to expose it when it happens. [**If you like our work, please help us spread the word about our work by sharing this humorous - but eye-opening - piece with your friends and neighbors on Facebook.**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61941809:WI1v9ZDN9:m:1:2610672541:F001AB06EF29ED444804BB85FFCE86DD:r) Simply [**click here**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61941809:WI1v9ZDN9:m:1:2610672541:F001AB06EF29ED444804BB85FFCE86DD:r) and help us gain a larger audience today! Thank you for your continued support, The Shift WA team | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61941810:WI1v9ZDN9:m:1:2610672541:F001AB06EF29ED444804BB85FFCE86DD:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14230072&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/oWI1v9ZDN9).
---

name: Joe Sweeney
subject: Democrats want to Flip the House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Granite Solutions, Joe Sweeney Chairman
body:
We must stop them.

| | | | |
---
| | Derek,

We've been making great strides here in New Hampshire, accomplishing substantial legislative victories such as passing a balanced budget with no new taxes and expanding our Educational Freedom Accounts program. But all of this progress is now under threat.

Democrat State Representatives have openly declared their goal: **to wrest control of the New Hampshire House back into their hands through special elections _this term_.** Their intent is clear - they want to undo everything we've achieved for the people of our great state.

---
[](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.granitesolutions.org%2Fdonate/1/010001892b1435b5-cd97f1fa-bae9-46f8-b4ba-b5d86f7f7e29-000000/wSJelE6rf8S7yzyPrwo_qeqy0lY=329)
---
**We cannot let that happen.****
**
We need to rally our troops and fight back with every ounce of our strength. Our mission at Granite Solutions has always been to deliver real wins for conservatives and to ensure our beloved New Hampshire remains a beacon of liberty and prosperity.

To do that, we need to maintain control of the New Hampshire House. We need to hold our ground in these special elections.

**That's why I'm reaching out to you today.****
**
Your generous donation will enable us to organize, to rally, and to turn out every single Republican vote in the coming special elections.[Whether it's $10, $25, $50, or $100 - every single dollar you contribute goes directly to our mission: maintaining our Republican control of the New Hampshire House.](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.granitesolutions.org%2Fdonate/2/010001892b1435b5-cd97f1fa-bae9-46f8-b4ba-b5d86f7f7e29-000000/LgiVyX0k8l_DXsJgLl5OVFseqzk=329)

We need your support more than ever.

[Donate now at www.granitesolutions.org/donate, and together, we can hold the line and keep New Hampshire under Republican leadership.](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.granitesolutions.org%2Fdonate/3/010001892b1435b5-cd97f1fa-bae9-46f8-b4ba-b5d86f7f7e29-000000/SUHYLYRZZd57OdL99Usz8jk-0vM=329) Let's show these Democrats that we are not backing down - not now, not ever.
Thank you for your unwavering support.

---
---
Rep. Joe Sweeney
Founder, Granite Solutions

_P.S. Remember, our entire agenda - the balanced budget, no new taxes, and the expanded Educational Freedom Accounts program - is threatened if Democrats take control. We can't afford to let that happen._[_Please, donate today and help us hold the line._](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.granitesolutions.org%2Fdonate/4/010001892b1435b5-cd97f1fa-bae9-46f8-b4ba-b5d86f7f7e29-000000/Bii77TcgGkvybP081V-OV1487BU=329)

### [2023 GENERAL ASSEMBLY BILLS BECOME LAW](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kHICFikqKjlaYuOQbJ_zSQiTGL_X4C0xi1LX5z7hr_ojdEESomlBdLEzkt1X_tivjvDMJx-DIV6doEAzWYqi6z5-6v8Zquyn9DFsVGsnEeQjvsh7fkA4iVbUlmPIcqkUpDo3wVkYa2X6YAH7Ppc9VK4V_4oz1hrXc2Q-w9KegJeB9GsfZOvsge-sArXhdyd6D4QBHeZ6jbElfEQF5xZJ2xbFpwWWS1cU3a0YBSm_8ko=&c=nvS1SO9BSHlczR7eMpr4s9DafUptotPLuILbFnNKMHlhrX7A_RnTsg==&ch=CJypQ8KhdHgbxqHuM-5Y6PGUqWT0Ov3eywQUI0SYLKJYdrRF6l5D5Q==)

As of July 1st, many new Virginia laws are now in effect. From requiring employees with disabilities to be paid at least the state minimum wage to now having to switch lanes or slow down when any vehicle is pulled over on the side of the road flashing their hazards, there are hundreds of new laws here in Virginia.

The Young Doctors Project Summer Academy exposes young men of color to careers in health and medicine.
They are hosting a Pop-Up Health Clinic TODAY from 3-5 pm at the Gainsboro Library Community Room (15 Patton Ave NW). Call: (540) 556-8891 for more information.

### [Patty Quesenberry for HD-47 ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kHICFikqKjlaYuOQbJ_zSQiTGL_X4C0xi1LX5z7hr_ojdEESomlBdLEzkt1X_tivXIZP9ockF6gdwfuNjVLfrnDEADwUMkIfzo5kYh5c2yPKUbR4GOsUErlnKaFHr76WdaVcF2jlLzd0hwekUvFPkCPbi0mlhWj5ez_Sa6XfmX8=&c=nvS1SO9BSHlczR7eMpr4s9DafUptotPLuILbFnNKMHlhrX7A_RnTsg==&ch=CJypQ8KhdHgbxqHuM-5Y6PGUqWT0Ov3eywQUI0SYLKJYdrRF6l5D5Q==)

Patty Quesenberry is the Democrat running for Delegate in Virginia's new 47th District.
She is a lifetime member of the Floyd County Rescue Squad and volunteered for them for 25-plus years, as well as is a small farmer. She has a small and humble farm named Sweet Heart Farm.
She is ready to fight in Richmond to address the climate and housing crisis Virginians are facing. She will prioritize investing in our infrastructure, childcare, and the way we treat mental health/substance abuse disorder. Additionally, she will advocate for responsible gun ownership, campaign finance reform, women's rights, and worker's rights.
She is running for this office so that she continue to serve Southwest Virginia and make our voices heard.

### Chris's Coffee & Custard Looking for Volunteers
---
Chris needs volunteers for the shop and the upcoming truck. They need compassionate, dependable volunteers to support their young adult employees.
Would you like to be able to create hope and opportunities for young adults and help them accomplish their dreams and goals? You could be that one person that will believe in them and help them develop a sense of dignity, purpose and belonging. They have many opportunities to serve!

### Backpack Drive
---
West End Youth Center will be hosting a back-pack drive on July 19th from 5:30-7:30 pm. If you bring a backpack to their event with Crystal Spring Grocery, your name will be added to a drawing for a Crystal Spring Gift Basket.
If you absolutely can't get there that night, feel free to take a backpack to RunAbout Sports Roanoke beginning now. They will accept the donation and get your info to be included in the drawing.

---

### Bug + Bat Night - July 7
---
Join others in Mill Mountain Park for s'mores as they explore some of the nighttime insects and their predators, bats, that inhabit our parks and backyards with a park Naturalist.
They'll use black lights to bring out some tree dwelling insects like the Hercules beetles that we otherwise never get to see and use special detectors that isolate and amplify the echolocation of the bats flying around the park! $10/individual or $25/family

---

clean_body: | | | | | | == | == | | | ACROSS THE COMMONWEALTH | | | | == | == | == As of July 1st, many new Virginia laws are now in effect. From requiring employees with disabilities to be paid at least the state minimum wage to now having to switch lanes or slow down when any vehicle is pulled over on the side of the road flashing their hazards, there are hundreds of new laws here in Virginia. | | == The Young Doctors Project Summer Academy exposes young men of color to careers in health and medicine. They are hosting a Pop-Up Health Clinic TODAY from 3-5 pm at the Gainsboro Library Community Room (15 Patton Ave NW). Call: (540) 556-8891 for more information. | == | == | | | CANDIDATE SPOTLIGHT | | | | == | == | == Patty Quesenberry is the Democrat running for Delegate in Virginia's new 47th District. She is a lifetime member of the Floyd County Rescue Squad and volunteered for them for 25-plus years, as well as is a small farmer. She has a small and humble farm named Sweet Heart Farm. She is ready to fight in Richmond to address the climate and housing crisis Virginians are facing. She will prioritize investing in our infrastructure, childcare, and the way we treat mental health/substance abuse disorder. Additionally, she will advocate for responsible gun ownership, campaign finance reform, women's rights, and worker's rights. She is running for this office so that she continue to serve Southwest Virginia and make our voices heard. | | | | | == On Sundays, join Team Lily at the South County Library Parking Lot from 12 - 12:30 pm for a Roanoke canvassing event! Bring your walking shoes, a charged cell phone, and water. When you arrive to their launch location you will receive a brief training and literature before being sent out to turf. Questions? Email Beth at egunter3@gmail.com or call 540-353-3645. South County Library Parking Lot, 6303 Merriman Rd, Roanoke, VA 24018 | | | IN THE COMMUNITY | | | == Chris's Coffee & Custard Looking for Volunteers Chris needs volunteers for the shop and the upcoming truck. They need compassionate, dependable volunteers to support their young adult employees. Would you like to be able to create hope and opportunities for young adults and help them accomplish their dreams and goals? You could be that one person that will believe in them and help them develop a sense of dignity, purpose and belonging. They have many opportunities to serve! | == | == Backpack Drive West End Youth Center will be hosting a back-pack drive on July 19th from 5:30-7:30 pm. If you bring a backpack to their event with Crystal Spring Grocery, your name will be added to a drawing for a Crystal Spring Gift Basket. If you absolutely can't get there that night, feel free to take a backpack to RunAbout Sports Roanoke beginning now. They will accept the donation and get your info to be included in the drawing. | == | == Salem Fair - Now - July 9 The Salem Fair is a regionally based agricultural fair in the western part of the Commonwealth of Virginia, and it is coming back beginning next week through July 9th! The Salem Fair is the largest fair in the state and has been recognized as one of the top 100 fairs and expositions in the country. Please see event website for details on fair information, schedule, attractions, ride and exhibitor information, midway map and clear bag policy. | == | == Small Town Summer in Floyd - July 6 The Town of Floyd invites you to a free event in the Warren G Lineberry Park in downtown Floyd, Virginia. Bring the whole family and enjoy the beautiful Warren G Lineberry Park filled with music, movies and fun activities for the whole family. Featuring music, movies, face-painting, inflatables, games, food and beverage and special activities presented by a variety of community organizations! | == | == Bug + Bat Night - July 7 Join others in Mill Mountain Park for s'mores as they explore some of the nighttime insects and their predators, bats, that inhabit our parks and backyards with a park Naturalist. They'll use black lights to bring out some tree dwelling insects like the Hercules beetles that we otherwise never get to see and use special detectors that isolate and amplify the echolocation of the bats flying around the park! $10/individual or $25/family | == | == Ride for Palestine - July 16 This year will be the first organized Ride for Palestine in Virginia and on the East Coast. Participate in this event to raise money for a great cause! The hope is that this ride will increase local awareness and solidarity among our friends, families and neighbors of all ages. If you have any questions, please email: mailto:rideforpalestine.virginia@swva.net | == | | | | | == | Join the Roanoke City Democrats! name: Your America
subject: Our country is facing a constitutional crisis
body:
The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c27284%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HQt5%2fmCmkzGTNBy0d65ekA&sysid=1)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c27295%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xZHMPd3FG8nruw5HcyG7ow&sysid=1).
## Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state--that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans?
[YES](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c27296%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0u5v4wrtM%2bw33IhtPc83dw&sysid=1) [NO](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c27297%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fezQjjLUeXXCb4%2bS2FKwgA&sysid=1) Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It’s a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of “We the People” is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can’t just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION --to DO SOMETHING about it, while there’s still time to save our country. **

That is why I’m writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of “We the People”--before it’s too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c27298%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fk1e6CBzYwD8Czjao76PVQ&sysid=1)**

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Your America News
---

name: Jameson Ellis
subject: UPDATE: Will you be part of the movement?
body:
It's happening Monday...

| | | |
---
**We're mobilizing patriots and promoting Texas-owned businesses through community engagement!**
Last week I sent out an email regarding an initiative I started called Project Defiant and I wanted to provide an update...
I'm dropping the truck off to get wrapped on **Monday, July 10** , so **if you'd like to have your name/logo displayed on the truck**... or **if you'd like to sponsor your favorite Texas-owned business to have THEIR name/logo displayed on the truck** , please reply back _ASAP_ and let me know.
Most business owners make this part of their marketing budget for tax purposes. I'm not a tax professional, but I can tell you from experience that doing this helps for tax reasons.
Here is the final design on the actual print template for both the driver and passenger sides:
**NOTE:
Project Defiant is in no way affiliated with my official campaign for Congress. However, I am proud to share that the truck is being wrapped by a Texas-owned business located in CD2!**
**Sponsorships start at $1,000 which includes:**
* Your Name/Logo Displayed on Truck Tailgate, T-Shirts, & Website (standard size, 1-year minimum)
* Your Name/Logo on all Printed Promotional Material (1 year, minimum)
* Your Company Mentioned on all Social Media Platforms (1 post minimum – audience 100k+)
* Invitation to Project Defiant Backyard BBQ
* Free Project Defiant T-Shirt

**Sponsorships can be purchased via:**
* Credit/Debit on our website
* Check
* Zelle
* Cash App
* PayPal
* Cash

Invoices will be provided for contractors/businesses for tax purposes.
I invite you to rally behind our movement and either become an official sponsor or become a sponsor on behalf of your favorite local business!
Let's unite under shared principles and drive growth with this powerful symbol. By building bridges within our community and celebrating our patriotic spirit, we can work toward a Texas that stands firm on life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.
**Click or tap below to learn more or become a sponsor today!**
(if the button doesn't work, visit [projectdefiant.com](https://jamesonellis.lt.acemlna.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZwcm9qZWN0ZGVmaWFudC5jb20=&sig=6Sr4KGxDVpyScAocsqaSRHpf66La37HKqgKTTX7B3pyS&iat=1688666689&a=%7C%7C611311006%7C%7C&account=jamesonellis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=QCf8AvCAUOTQLIpvR4Q%2FU%2B8pZnC2YygcmcU3buppZa3rGnEI%3AxrJfoenHka%2F7LZvuXU%2BXaA900SMPQVt%2F&s=cabcbe31a720242486b887158a77876f&i=193A216A1A1667))
[LEARN MORE](https://jamesonellis.lt.acemlna.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZwcm9qZWN0ZGVmaWFudC5jb20=&sig=6Sr4KGxDVpyScAocsqaSRHpf66La37HKqgKTTX7B3pyS&iat=1688666689&a=%7C%7C611311006%7C%7C&account=jamesonellis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=QCf8AvCAUOTQLIpvR4Q%2FU%2B8pZnC2YygcmcU3buppZa3rGnEI%3AxrJfoenHka%2F7LZvuXU%2BXaA900SMPQVt%2F&s=cabcbe31a720242486b887158a77876f&i=193A216A1A1667)
_For Liberty,_
| | |
