name: Team Tuberville
subject: 💪 Protect Women’s Sports in Alabama
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
Coach is fighting back against the left’s radical trans agenda. Read more >>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/7feffc8940b7a86b/1784b45c04ab7d6fc3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
Peter, Over five decades ago, Congress approved Title IX to ensure equal access for men and women to the lessons, life skills, and opportunities that come from competitive sports. _Before the passage of Title IX, very few young women had the chance to participate in sports._ _ _ Today, thanks to Title IX, more than 50,000 high school girls play sports in Alabama alone. **But, as you read this email, the Radical Left is threatening to destroy Title IX by allowing males who identify as transgender to compete in women’s sports.**** ** Make no mistake – if we let this happen, women’s sports will be overrun by biological males who have an unfair advantage over their female counterparts. That’s why Coach Tuberville is introducing legislation that will withhold federal funding from any institution that allows males to compete in female-only sports. [**Please read Coach’s op-ed article on 1819news.com to learn more >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/7feffc8940b7a86b/694c13503b77bde7c3d6b838967d376c/33013)** ** This legislation will SAVE Title IX and ensure our daughters and granddaughters have the opportunity to compete on a safe and level playing field. Thanks, as always, for your support – and we hope you’ll take a second to [check out Coach’s op-ed](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/7feffc8940b7a86b/03441e63e1419804c3d6b838967d376c/33013) today! -Team Tuberville [PS: If you support Coach’s mission to STOP the Radical Left from destroying Title IX and women’s sports as we know it, please chip in your best gift today!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/7feffc8940b7a86b/a43d4d8673806401c3d6b838967d376c/33013)

name: Colin Allred
subject: re: Ted Cruz and Book Bans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18988?t=1001&akid=3374%2E346206%2EQHnzih ][IMG]

I've always been a big reader, Peter. Growing up, my world was
pretty small. I used to treat our local bookstore like a library, sitting
there for hours, reading books cover to cover because I didn't have the
money to buy them.

Reading opened my eyes to new perspectives, far-off places, and different
career opportunities – it helped me dream big. Our kids deserve the same
opportunity to learn and grow through books, but Ted Cruz and the GOP are
fighting to ban books about anything that doesn't align with their
far-right agenda.

That's part of why I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz – to stop the
Republicans' outrageous censorship and attacks on our kids' education. But
I have to raise $50,000 every single day to power this campaign against
Ted Cruz. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18988?t=1002&akid=3374%2E346206%2EQHnzih ]Will you please split a donation of $25 today between our
campaign and Charles Booker to help send me to the Senate? →

Experts agree we have a real chance to win this thing: CNN says Ted Cruz
is the most vulnerable Republican senator on the ballot, and we're just
five points down in the polls. I know in my bones Texans are sick and
tired of Ted Cruz and ready for change.

But this is already on track to be one of the most competitive and
expensive races in the country, and I'm counting on grassroots Democrats
like you to be by my side every step of the way. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18988?t=1003&akid=3374%2E346206%2EQHnzih ]So please, before my
midnight fundraising deadline, will you split a donation of $25 or more
between our campaign and Charles Booker to help me defeat Ted Cruz and
flip Texas blue? →

Every dollar makes a difference – thank you so much for giving what you
can.

Colin

clean_body: [ ][IMG] I've always been a big reader, Peter. Growing up, my world was pretty small. I used to treat our local bookstore like a library, sitting there for hours, reading books cover to cover because I didn't have the money to buy them. Reading opened my eyes to new perspectives, far-off places, and different career opportunities – it helped me dream big. Our kids deserve the same opportunity to learn and grow through books, but Ted Cruz and the GOP are fighting to ban books about anything that doesn't align with their far-right agenda. That's part of why I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz – to stop the Republicans' outrageous censorship and attacks on our kids' education. But I have to raise $50,000 every single day to power this campaign against Ted Cruz. subject: The Democrats want me gone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Can you help me?

_**Do you know what the Democrats hate more than a Republican? A Republican that GETS RESULTS and stands for AMERICA, Friend.**_

That’s why the radical Left and their cronies led by our clueless President in Washington are targeting my race.

**[KEEP FLORIDA FREE](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661776%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZkTUgZLu1jiHFTHKBOEQlA&sysid=1)**

The FREE state of Florida will be ground zero for Democrats targeting Republican-held seats like mine, and I cannot OVERSTATE how important it is that we KEEP Florida red.

The math is simple. **Republicans MUST hold onto all our Senate seats like mine PLUS win 2 Democratic seats to take back the Majority.**

Democrats are DESPERATE, and they really want me gone. The last time I ran, their dark-money groups poured over $80 MILLION into defeating me. Luckily I won, but it was NOT easy. I was told YOU are a top supporter, and I could use your help to ensure our campaign can compete against the far Left.

What do you say, Friend? Can you help us keep Florida FREE AND put Republicans back in the Majority?

name: Gabe Amo
subject: Thank you from #TeamGabe
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/105455/images/Gabe%20Amo%20Header_V6.png]

Friend,

I hope that you and your friends and family had a fantastic 4th of July! I spent my day with my team and thousands of Rhode Islanders in Bristol for their historic 4th of July Parade.

[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/105455/images/F0MwoVvWwAEJfVB.jpeg]

Since I launched this campaign, just eleven weeks ago, we have accomplished so much – together:

✅ I formally filed my declaration of candidacy last week
✅ Our campaign announced that it hit our fundraising goal for last quarter (from over 1,000 individual donors!)
✅ Began our #GabeOnTheRhode series, knocking on doors, and talking to voters in every city and town in Rhode Island’s First District

[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/105455/images/FzzkQL4XsAMwFuQ.jpeg]

This campaign is only possible because of the support of people like you. From the bottom of my heart, thank you for everything.

We have a lot of hard work ahead of us. In fact, just yesterday, one of my opponents announced that he was putting in $600,000 of his own money to try and win this race, nearly two times the amount of money he raised himself.

You shouldn’t have to be wealthy to run for office – and win.

I might not have lots of money, but I do have deep public service experience and a commitment to working every day to serve the people of Rhode Island’s First Congressional District.

So, thank you for all that you have done to help get us to this point. If you can, help us fund the next phase of the campaign by contributing any amount that you are able:

Express Donate: $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email-july?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=express_lane_5]
Express Donate: $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email-july?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
Express Donate: $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email-july?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
Or, donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email-july?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

In gratitude,
Gabe

Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email-july]
https://www.facebook.com/gabeamoforcongress [https://www.facebook.com/gabeamoforcongress] https://twitter.com/gabeamo [https://twitter.com/gabeamo] https://www.instagram.com/gabeamoforcongress/ [https://www.instagram.com/gabeamoforcongress/] https://www.gabeamo.com/ [https://www.gabeamo.com/]

Gabe Amo for Congress
P.O. Box 40457

clean_body: [] Friend, I hope that you and your friends and family had a fantastic 4th of July! I spent my day with my team and thousands of Rhode Islanders in Bristol for their historic 4th of July Parade. [] Since I launched this campaign, just eleven weeks ago, we have accomplished so much – together: ✅ I formally filed my declaration of candidacy last week ✅ Our campaign announced that it hit our fundraising goal for last quarter (from over 1,000 individual donors!) ✅ Began our #GabeOnTheRhode series, knocking on doors, and talking to voters in every city and town in Rhode Island’s First District [] This campaign is only possible because of the support of people like you. From the bottom of my heart, thank you for everything. We have a lot of hard work ahead of us. In fact, just yesterday, one of my opponents announced that he was putting in $600,000 of his own money to try and win this race, nearly two times the amount of money he raised himself. You shouldn’t have to be wealthy to run for office – and win. I might not have lots of money, but I do have deep public service experience and a commitment to working every day to serve the people of Rhode Island’s First Congressional District. So, thank you for all that you have done to help get us to this point. If you can, help us fund the next phase of the campaign by contributing any amount that you are able: Express Donate: $5 [] Express Donate: $10 [] Express Donate: $25 [] Or, donate another amount [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. In gratitude, Gabe Donate [] [] [] [] [] Gabe Amo for Congress P.O. subject: Teamsters Endorse Dave Min for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dave Min for Congress 2024**
body:
Just After Poll Shows Min In Strong Position To Win General Election, Intl. Brotherhood of Teamsters Join Min’s Impressive Coalition Of Support | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/7c3f4c0c0867/teamsters-endorse-dave-min-for-congress-15658260?e=7017cc100e)
---
| |
---
| | **For Immediate Release:** July 5, 2023
**Contact:**[press@davemin.com](mailto:press@davemin.com) **Teamsters Endorse Dave Min for Congress** _Just After Poll Shows Min In Strong Position To Win General Election, The International Brotherhood of Teamsters Join Min’s Impressive Coalition Of Support_ **IRVINE, CA** — Today, the International Brotherhood of Teamsters District Joint Council 42, which represents nearly 250,000 working and retired members in Southern California, endorsed Dave Min for Congress in California’s 47th Congressional District. The announcement comes a few weeks after a [Public Policy Polling](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=dfe607fc76&e=7017cc100e) poll showed Min with a commanding lead against his likely Republican opponent in the 2024 General Election. The Teamsters join over 125 local, state, and federal leaders, The California Federation of Teachers, police officers, SEIU , and the Congressional Asian Pacific Islander Caucus’ ASPIRE PAC in endorsing Min’s run for Congress.
“**Dave's record as a state senator on behalf of working people, fighting corruption, and providing a level playing field for all citizens earned him the Teamsters' unanimous backing of the Union's political coordinators** ,” said Chris Griswold, President of Teamsters Joint Council 42. “**He is a candidate that we are looking forward to helping send to Washington**.”
Teamsters Joint Council 42 represents workers across a variety of fields, including truckers, construction workers, airline employees, food manufacturers, and port and rail employees. Their early endorsement adds to Min’s broad coalition. Just since announcing his candidacy in late January, Min’s campaign has been endorsed by incumbent Congresswoman Katie Porter, as well as over 125 local, state, and federal officials, including California Lt. Governor Eleni Kounalakis, Attorney General Rob Bonta, Superintendent of Public Instruction Tony Thurmond, Treasurer Fiona Ma, Insurance Commissioner Ricardo Lara,, AAPI Victory Fund, Asian American Action Fund, the Asian American and Pacific Islander Congressional Caucus’s ASPIRE PAC, which represents 21 members of Congress, and many others. A full endorsement list is available[ here](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=4beb04e638&e=7017cc100e). Senator Min, the only Korean-American in the state legislature, serves as Chair of the Senate Natural Resources and Water Committee and as Senate Vice Chair of the Asian and Pacific Islander Legislative Caucus. Min, who was formerly a law professor at UC Irvine School of Law and has three children in Irvine public schools, also serves on the Senate’s Budget Subcommittee for Education, which oversees all budget funding for California’s public schools, community colleges, the California State University system, and the University of California system. Min has proven himself an incredibly effective legislative leader in the Senate, authoring 16 bills signed into law by the Governor, including leading legislation on [hate crimes](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=eeba91e90a&e=7017cc100e), [gun violence prevention](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=1b6dcc8d6a&e=7017cc100e), family safety, and [women’s reproductive rights](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=631a763a25&e=7017cc100e), and procuring over $70 million in direct appropriations for priorities in his district, including for fire response, parks and open spaces, and climate innovation. In the wake of the 2021 Huntington Beach Oil Spill, he stood up to the oil industry and led efforts to end [offshore drilling](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=4c2a6f1014&e=7017cc100e). Min sits on two key environmental committees, chairing the Natural Resources and Water Committee and serving on the Energy and Utilities Committee, as well as the Budget Committee, the Budget Subcommittee for Education, the Judiciary Committee, and the Banking and Financial Institutions Committee. Senator Min previously served as Chair of the Select Committee on Cybersecurity. Before entering the State Senate, Min was a law professor at UC Irvine, where he taught and researched in the area of business law. He resides with his wife Jane Stoever, a UC Irvine law professor who specializes in domestic violence and family law, and their three children in Irvine. Dave is a native Californian, a product of California public schools who graduated from the Wharton School and Harvard Law School, and an Eagle Scout.
_#####

California’s 47th is an open Congressional District in Orange County that includes the Cities of Costa Mesa, Huntington Beach, Irvine, Newport Beach, and Seal Beach, and portions of Laguna Beach, Laguna Hills, and Laguna Woods. Incumbent Katie Porter is vacating the seat to run for U.S. Senate. In 2022, Porter defeated former Assemblymember Republican Scott Baugh by 3.44% in this “toss-up” district. State Senator Dave Min currently represents over 80% of Congressional District 47 in Sacramento. In 2020, Min received over 158,000 votes within CA-47, defeating incumbent John Moorlach by 5.15% in this area. 19% of the registered voters in CA-47 are of Asian and Pacific Islander descent, including one of the largest Korean-American populations in the country._
---
| |
---
| | | | | | | **Paid for by Dave Min for Congress 2024**
PO Box 5959 Irvine, CA 92616
---

clean_body: We have to be ready to FIGHT BACK | Peter, As we come back from a long holiday weekend celebrating July 4th and our great country, I’m asking for your help. Kamala Harris is set to visit Arizona TODAY where she will be touting the Biden Administration’s so-called “accomplishments.” With her and D.C. Democrats more determined than ever to take back the House majority next year, we can also expect her to launch an onslaught of lying attacks in their attempt to FLIP this all-important seat. After we paused our fundraising for the holiday weekend we’ve fallen behind and that’s why I need your help to make sure we have the resources to FIGHT BACK! As 1 of the 5 seats that gave Republicans the House majority, we’ve become the Left’s top target. With Kamala coming to our state to campaign for Biden and fellow Democrats, we have to be ready for anything. I’ve dedicated my career to defending the American Dream and the Left can’t stand that. They know that the American Dream is a threat to their power and control. That’s why I’m counting on my army of grassroots supporters to help me prepare for Kamala’s visit and attacks to ensure we defend this critical seat. Thank you, Rep. Juan Ciscomani Arizona’s 6th Congressional District PAID FOR BY CISCOMANI FOR CONGRESS P.O. Box 35103 Tucson, AZ 85740

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Fighting for you…and for the rule of law!
body:
The Left is trying to advance laws and programs that create discrimination in America

| | |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

On behalf of all of us at Judicial Watch, I hope that you had a wonderful Independence Day! We are so grateful that, backed by the support of our members, we are fighting for our America's founding principles, including respect for the rule of law.
And as we move into the second half of the year, I am proud to report that, thanks to you, we're building on the momentum gained on several critical fronts...and now our work is exploding. Simply said, we're carrying our most significant caseload _ever_ , and we need to respond to increasing attacks on the rule of law by the Left.
**[That’s why I hope I can count on you to give Judicial Watch your support today!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64045&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)**
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64045&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

Let me fill you in on just some of the things Judicial Watch is working on now:

* **We continue to challenge leftist policies that violate constitutional provisions against policies that unlawfully discriminate based on race, ethnicity, gender and sexual orientation.**

Judicial Watch and our friends at the Allied Educational Foundation filed multiple _" friends of the court"_ briefs with the U.S. Supreme Court in support of challenges to race-based admission policies at **Harvard College** and the **University of North****Carolina**. Last week, the High Court majority agreed with the arguments we made in our briefs and struck down these policies in a major victory _against_ racial discrimination and _for_ a color-blind society.
* **We continue to lead the fight for protecting the _integrity of our elections_**.

This year we have successfully settled our "clean voter rolls" lawsuits against **Colorado** and **Pennsylvania,** after those states removed hundreds of thousands of ineligible voters from the rolls...and clean voter rolls are the best insurance against voter fraud! We are also fighting to preserve traditional election safeguards through our lawsuit against **Illinois,** where state election officials want to extend Election Day for 14 days beyond the date established by federal law,_which would be an open invitation to confusion and voter fraud_.

* **We continue to fight government secrecy.**

We recently made headlines when we _forced the release_ of public records showing that American tax dollars went to the **Wuhan Institute** in China...and the work the US helped fund may have led to the emergence of Covid-19!

Clearly, we don't just _complain_ about the evils of discriminatory laws and programs...or voter fraud...or chronic government secrecy. _Our investigators and attorneys use federal and state laws to expose and stop lawless government corruption_ , _and support the rule of law_ ...[but they need your support and commitment at this critical time!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64045&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64045&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

This kind of thorough and persistent work is what Judicial Watch has been doing since 1994. _Because while others talk, we act_!

But we face constant stonewalling and foot-dragging by Biden government bureaucrats who _hate_ government transparency.

And we regularly find ourselves in court facing open-borders and other far left-wing groups funded by radical billionaire **George Soros**.

After 29 years, we continue to be the one organization in America doing the important work of holding the corrupt Washington Establishment - _both Democrats and Republicans_ - accountable under the law.

**[So I am counting on you to join the Judicial Watch team with a generous gift today!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64045&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)**

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64045&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

Your support is essential to our continued success, and it is what will make it possible for us to lead and fight even more effectively on so many fronts.

**_Thank you for helping Judicial Watch today_!**

Sincerely,

Thomas Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64045&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

|
---
|
---

425 Third Street SW, Suite 800
Washington, DC 20024
(C)2023, All Rights Reserved
Judicial Watch is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. Contributions are received from individuals, foundations, and corporations and are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law.
| |

subject: Brett Kavanaugh STEPS DOWN?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jake Ellzey for Congress
body:
The liberal media is going ballistic & Democrats have just called for Justice Kavanaugh's removal days before major SCOTUS opinions to be issued.

| |
---
| | | | | _**BRETT KAVANAUGH STEPS DOWN?**_

Joe Biden’s presidency has been failure after failure.

Inflation is skyrocketing. America is choosing wokeness and weakness. The President of the United States won’t even acknowledge our border.

body:
"We love our country – at least some of us do – but to wrap arms around this Radical Left and say we're all on the same team right now is to deny reality...”

| |

---
| | | **Megyn Kelly LAYS DOWN THE LAW against the Radical Left:**
_"We love our country - at least some of us do - but to wrap arms around this Radical Left and say we're all on the same team right now is to deny reality. These people want to hurt our children. And break up families. They weaponize our legal system to hurt their enemies. They undermine any institution that won't push their radical agenda - harm to America be damned! The good news is: the American People are not falling for it."_

Megyn Kelly hit the nail on the head.

Just in the past few weeks, we've seen the Radical Left throw decency and precedent out the window to DESTROY their political enemies at any cost.

_**[And unfortunately for us, they have an overflowing war chest to backstop a complete Liberal takeover of America. We aren't joking, the Democrats and their donors are investing MILLIONS in this mission:](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zc11fsmrblk0qp89bg3ji7qovotfuufal25r7ubg_rp22sh2s8i66o70sdhm1oj6c3h2bs "And unfortunately for us, they have an overflowing war chest to backstop a complete Liberal takeover of America. We aren’t joking, the Democrats and their donors are investing MILLIONS in this mission:")**_
* Adam Schiff announced a record-shattering $8.1M fundraising haul last quarter
* Colin Allred put up $6.2M to flip Texas blue FOREVER
* Gavin Newsom dropped $10M to flip red states like Arkansas, Florida, and Texas

The Radical Left's ARMY of Liberal megadonors are taking FULL ADVANTAGE of our lagging fundraising. If we fail to respond in record time, everything we've done to defeat the Radical Left will come crashing down... **That is, unless Conservatives everywhere rise to the occasion before it 's too late.**

Every Conservative in America has a choice to make:

We can either hunker down and hope the Radical Left - which just arraigned Trump in federal court, indicted the top political rival of the sitting president, is indoctrinating our kids in school, and undermining our God-given rights - fails to destroy our country...

... OR WE CAN DIG DEEP AND STOP THEM OURSELVES!

_**[Here's our plan: We have a critical fundraising benchmark at midnight tonight and we still need to raise another $12,938. If everyone reading this steps up, we'll break through our goal and have the resources we need to turn the tide.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zimp7vm2kqbb4oe3a16ohb9cidmsjlgef8rjlpi0_rp22sh2s8i66o70sdhm1oj6c3h2bs "Here’s our plan: We have a critical fundraising benchmark at midnight tonight and we still need to raise another $12,938. If everyone reading this steps up, we’ll break through our goal and have the resources we need to turn the tide. ")**_

Our average donation last month was about $17. Can we count on you for that much? We can hit this goal before tonight as long as we receive 100% participation - no exceptions!

**Remember: **

This is a battle we can either ignore and lose... or step up and win. The fate of our country hangs in the balance, and the pressure is on.

_**[Are you with us? We're asking ALL CONSERVATIVES to put some skin in the game by donating $17 right now. This is important. PLEASE: don't let these Radicals win!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zb2v0ilgl4fum3icji4ka6ipfrh7hj8t6di37g78_rp22sh2s8i66o70sdhm1oj6c3h2bs "Are you with us? Every Conservative in America has a choice to make: We can either hunker down and hope the Radical Left - which just arraigned Trump in federal court, indicted the top political rival of the sitting president, is indoctrinating our kids in school, and undermining our God-given rights - fails to destroy our country... ... OR WE CAN DIG DEEP AND STOP THEM OURSELVES! "Here’s our plan: We have a critical fundraising benchmark at midnight tonight and we still need to raise another $12,938. If everyone reading this steps up, we’ll break through our goal and have the resources we need to turn the tide. " Our average donation last month was about $17. Can we count on you for that much? We can hit this goal before tonight as long as we receive 100% participation - no exceptions! Remember: This is a battle we can either ignore and lose... or step up and win. The fate of our country hangs in the balance, and the pressure is on. "Are you with us? We’re asking ALL CONSERVATIVES to put some skin in the game by donating $17 right now. This is important. PLEASE: don’t let these Radicals win! # The Williams Weekly
---
## First Edition!
### Hey Everyone,
I've been working hard on the ground in-district and in DC and wanted to reach out to keep you in the loop. Loving and serving NY-22 is my mission and I am fighting every day to work on your behalf. My Priorities:
* Improve our local infrastructure
* Grow manufacturing and increase jobs
* Lower energy costs
* Keep our streets safe
* Protect Social Security and Medicare
* Speak up for law enforcement and first responders
* Stand with and for our veterans

---
| | |
---|---|---
---
## Happy Fourth of July!
As we celebrated our independence, we were able to reflect on how much has been accomplished because a few people had the courage to put their livelihoods on the line for something they believed in. Patriots from all across CNY and the Mohawk Valley came together to celebrate America’s Birthday. It was an honor to join-in. The patriotism was on full display and was a beautiful sight. clean_body: I've been working hard on the ground in-district & in DC & wanted to reach out to keep you in the loop. Loving & serving NY22 is my mission. | The Williams Weekly First Edition! Hey Everyone, I've been working hard on the ground in-district and in DC and wanted to reach out to keep you in the loop. Loving and serving NY-22 is my mission and I am fighting every day to work on your behalf. My Priorities: Improve our local infrastructure Grow manufacturing and increase jobs Lower energy costs Keep our streets safe Protect Social Security and Medicare Speak up for law enforcement and first responders Stand with and for our veterans | | | ---|---|--- Happy Fourth of July! As we celebrated our independence, we were able to reflect on how much has been accomplished because a few people had the courage to put their livelihoods on the line for something they believed in. Patriots from all across CNY and the Mohawk Valley came together to celebrate America’s Birthday. It was an honor to join-in. The patriotism was on full display and was a beautiful sight. I love this country. We cannot waiver in the defense of our Independence! 🇺🇸 Show your support for America 👇 | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Fighting for Bald Eagles Bald Eagles in NY will be slaughtered by Progressive energy policies. This is madness. Wind farms must reduce bird deaths by 80% by 2030 or lose federal subsidies. Save our national bird! | | | Bridge Updates Happy to have brought my experience in engineering to try and better CNY. The NYSDOT will be moving forward with my recommendation to put a traffic light at the bridge. | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | ---|---|--- Working For Our Veterans When our service members return home, they deserve nothing less than the best service and care. Recently, I convened my Veterans' Advisory Council—including vet business owners, local VSOs and nonprofits—to ensure we deliver the highest level of commitment & quality of life to NY-22 veterans. Show our Veterans support: | | | | Veterans' Tele-Town Hall I held a Veterans' Tele-Town Hall with House Veteran Affairs Chairman Rep. Mike Bost and it was a success—discussing how my office can ensure services are rendered in CNY and the Mohawk Valley, and ways that we can make the system work more for our veterans and their families in need. Share your thoughts: | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | ---|---|--- | PAID FOR BY BRANDON FOR CONGRESS NY22** | Brandon for Congress NY 22, 628 N Main Street, North Syracuse, NY 13212, USA, 315-220-0121

body:
If you believe in our collective strength to chip away at the GOP's power and influence, we need YOU in this fight in this critical final stretch. | | |
---
| | Here's the latest about our efforts to send two of the Tennessee Three – Reps. Justin Jones and Justin Pearson – BACK to the statehouse after the GOP _expelled them_ :
* **There's less than one month until voting ends** – which means our time to fight back and make an impact on this race is running out;
* Republicans are _pouring_ money into Rep. Jones' challenger's campaign in hopes of preventing a proven fighter from rejoining the Tennessee statehouse;
* **Together, we can show the GOP that their attacks on our democracy won’t go unnoticed** – but to do that, we're counting on committed Democrats like you to power that work in these final critical weeks.

[Can you rush $7 so we can win upcoming special elections like these? name: Ted Cruz
subject: Looking out for the Lone Star State
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate**
body:
| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9CcmlkZ2UtUGVybWl0c18yMDIzMDcwNiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUJyaWRnZS1QZXJtaXRzJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEcifQ/4kR-GwN-HMmMJWgod8zBVA)
---
Fellow Conservative, Improving the infrastructure in our state is one of my top priorities in the U.S. Senate. **That’s why I proudly partnered with five members of the Texas congressional delegation – both Democrats and Republicans – to push the State Department to speed up the approval process for _four new bridges_ connecting Texas and Mexico.** Senator John Cornyn and Representatives Henry Cuellar, Monica De La Cruz, Vicente Gonzalez, and I signed a letter asking Secretary of State Anthony Blinken to expedite the construction of these bridges.
---
_The letter said, “Mexico is one of the United States’ most important trading partners with billions of dollars exchanged in exports and imports each year. These cross-border bridges will expand such trade, creating vital jobs and economic opportunities in the Texas border region.”_ _“Many of the affected Texas communities routinely rank as some of the lowest-income towns in the state. They stand to benefit immensely from the expanded and efficient cross-border trade and tourism that these projects will bring.”_
---
I’m proud to be a part of this bipartisan effort to improve our state’s infrastructure and boost the economies of small towns near the border. [**_If you support my work on behalf of Texans, I hope you’ll donate $5, $10, $25, $50, or more to get behind my reelection campaign._**](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9CcmlkZ2UtUGVybWl0c18yMDIzMDcwNiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUJyaWRnZS1QZXJtaXRzJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEcifQ/p8-GeEdGn76ScVIT3sHUng) I’m honored to represent you in the U.S. Senate, and I’ll always fight for the best interests of ALL law-abiding citizens of our great state! -Ted Cruz

If you didn’t know, Kentucky, a deep red state, has a radical left democrat governor by the name of Andy Beshear. He’s a puppet of sleepy Joe Biden and one of many radical left governors that are attempting to fundamentally change this country forever. Since securing the Republican nomination for governor, the radical left has been **RELENTLESS** in their attacks on me. In fact, they’ve resorted to the same tactics they’ve used against President Trump. Which is why I need as many voices as possible -- 5,000 signatures strong before midnight -- to OUST DeJoy once and for all. >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66055533/415196017/1634307625?source=20230706_em_fr_b1_raja_30_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWQwZGFkZS0wZDFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yqRDURiIaM-kGv5S2_jhFL0BJqmtUjbtVbq-Ld39gZY=&emci=34a2a9cc-361b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=aed0dade-0d1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=21346897) | [**SAVE THE POST OFFICE. Peter, I’m working hard to remove DeJoy from office for good.
I’ve heard from constituents all across the country about their outrageous mail delays.
I’ve grilled Trump’s Postmaster General DeJoy in front of my committee, _[**twice.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66055540/415196024/1634307625?source=20230706_em_fr_b1_raja_30_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWQwZGFkZS0wZDFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yqRDURiIaM-kGv5S2_jhFL0BJqmtUjbtVbq-Ld39gZY=&emci=34a2a9cc-361b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=aed0dade-0d1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=21346897)_
Now, I’m calling on the USPS Board to dismiss DeJoy.
[**And I won’t stop until we oust him.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66055542/415196026/1634307625?source=20230706_em_fr_b1_raja_30_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWQwZGFkZS0wZDFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yqRDURiIaM-kGv5S2_jhFL0BJqmtUjbtVbq-Ld39gZY=&emci=34a2a9cc-361b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=aed0dade-0d1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=21346897)
[_**Before midnight, I hope you’ll sign your name in support of firing DeJoy once and for all. I need a resounding 5,000 supporters on my emergency petition demanding Trump’s Postmaster General DeJoy be fired to SAVE the USPS. I want to prove we have a MASSIVE wave of grassroots supporters looking out for the Post Office. Can I count on you in this fight? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66055544/415196028/1634307625?source=20230706_em_fr_b1_raja_30_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWQwZGFkZS0wZDFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yqRDURiIaM-kGv5S2_jhFL0BJqmtUjbtVbq-Ld39gZY=&emci=34a2a9cc-361b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=aed0dade-0d1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=21346897)
Thank you,
Raja

name: Replace Sinema
subject: Tell the Senate: Don’t make flying less safe!
body:
Senator Tammy Duckworth called out Sinema for weakening airline safety | | | Peter – Senator Kyrsten Sinema is teaming up with Republicans and big money donors to water down airline pilot safety rules―and **the American people could pay the price.** **We made this video to explain the issue. Please watch and share:** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zaYbZ2Jl-UIUEfTwkdstrnZzq-YolnFug703Qj7z-3y4-XltTOslTEtbCi1Oj1Nzx61f9_-NH27TtR5AVRUi582zgHc1AfQUtQsH6anSASTBmOB7It951t1hzYWysppDoKBxF7j7D4BDZjchTZzNfVN0UZhLjoliK7JD1KwkXiO868ThQuA09623qDIIM6immjD0qww__8TqgEyaMM5JyyvzLVCCcuCz4P-f74BPW1juo6ku5MYnLO_xw6DUqkEegH_fb17GVt1iyZxsWxD9Ev1313VXqXJr7JktvMA7Hs5-6iajIuI4k-LLtNr5LiEPJwdGFU0oqhzfeSpy3AWaI5/3xn/qNHHZg2sTJurW1sxC1JpGg/h0/0p-a4ImC4hQ2otyDtkRJo45TQo2TUBNlqO6sLmKIVjA)Unsurprisingly, Sinema has received nearly $200,000 in contributions from the airline industry, including more than $54,000 in 2022 alone**. So it’s no surprise that she’s siding with corporate airlines over public safety.** Senator Tammy Duckworth, who chairs the aviation safety subcommittee, warned supporters of Sinema’s amendment that they would have **“blood on your hands.”** Notably, **Senator Duckworth, who chairs the aviation safety subcommittee, has a great deal of credibility in this area: she served as a U.S. Army helicopter pilot in Iraq before being shot down by enemy fire and losing both her legs**. ******[That’s why we’re gathering signatures–add your name NOW to tell the Senate it must reject the Sinema-Thune amendment to the FAA reauthorization bill! >>>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmAOj1ZVa8DSdlAVicBfHcEoJf8xJ2o_Cxscy25A22mJcG_6zYQCT7bqSwVRVDGMJccCuKjUSHfBBfIKhu2OFj32wPARylGk50igLlrbqiIcpgRFtEEFpOETYRq6Onsy9tEgPzZ4tlFtFvNzi90E3_UaaQedRUb_E9DATnoZIakDfs4dhfK42i5Tck0wMBMHDF9NgtYDqKwjo_HPd5Zj23H0dY7Uj1vT2-ti6jX0A4Z3PW2paaRHIpiI8M0ldmjuJik6ByzWy3hnA51OcvA2WY7qD0-kXL0gOA8gDbRt3v4fWppWn4wRdo5gTFNnyqEiLFcO5XY6y1De4Rwu7OFniDxXLG39YN2OFFLQyupxTDLBhBbXSdZJYpd9TxAz6fJYMIPQH3MseFnwTBGEMo54wpCq6Td5PWS7U_3CafE1OneM8eNIU_BrPXuHXAuppjYQVLCqZ67is1que-mPSKkIHMz/3xn/qNHHZg2sTJurW1sxC1JpGg/h1/cvIfd5E-5YxecA-PyVGJOaVGTXYoUizFQlmNl8Go0wc)****** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmAOj1ZVa8DSdlAVicBfHcEoJf8xJ2o_Cxscy25A22mJcG_6zYQCT7bqSwVRVDGMJccCuKjUSHfBBfIKhu2OFj32wPARylGk50igLlrbqiIcpgRFtEEFpOETYRq6Onsy9tEgPzZ4tlFtFvNzi90E3_UaaQedRUb_E9DATnoZIakDfs4dhfK42i5Tck0wMBMHDF9NgtYDqKwjo_HPd5Zj23H0dY7Uj1vT2-ti6jX0A4Z3OhiI284xLb6iqortCmd9aBhKBk_XadwbpNCQ2WYc0FWOG0hgircuG8cj_O8OQ3uU4_46c2JGxLE_xv_ENz2YcmabpXnhCcmOmxwGITx3hVP842wtOMdGHP7AClk3vFVEVQzvtLosOrHztxno-e8CdXWEUuNIpvf9q-tP0UYoXV339Ri4-tZnXC_bYdn3DVDbqajZReBvKYa5oHkLv4x16Z2-c70tdCvgMwOCxQaDnx5/3xn/qNHHZg2sTJurW1sxC1JpGg/h2/EVkAWmvLXDgipHsKYVmsam6nPFnpZrMV2Y7oDc6wBV0) Thanks for all your help,

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Bad news for Republicans:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
Hey there,
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to split a small donation between Seth Moulton and our campaign ahead of our midnight deadline [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff] . But first, I wanted to explain why your gift is so important — especially right now.
From the moment I jumped into the race, Republicans piled on.
It actually started the night right before I announced my campaign. In one of Kevin McCarthy’s first acts as Speaker, he unilaterally removed me from serving on the House Intelligence Committee.
Then it was Matt Gaetz. He introduced legislation trying to bar me from accessing classified information.
Then came Tucker Carlson. He recently launched into a desperate rant about me on his primetime Fox News show.
Then Donald Trump piled on too. He couldn’t resist. He dedicated part of his CPAC speech to hurl insult after insult against me.
And I’m going to be honest, I don’t even send you the really crazy stuff.
It’s just the beginning. After every one of their attacks, I then receive thousands more like it online from their MAGA loyalists trying to sabotage our work to defend democracy.
Republicans see me as their boogeyman this election. Why? Because I’ve stood up to these bullies and called out their lies.
It’s clear they don’t want me in the Senate. They don’t want oversight. They don’t want me to hold them accountable. They don’t want an outspoken defender of democracy on the Senate floor.
Bad news for Republicans: I’ve never been one to give up a fight — especially when it gets tough. I’m not going to let Donald Trump or any one of his lackeys tear our campaign down.
Friend, I need to know you have my back the entire way. Will you pitch in a donation of $3 or more to Seth Moulton and our campaign before our midnight deadline? The attacks are only going to get nastier from here, so we need to prepare for everything they’re going to launch our way: [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
Thank you for your support,
— Adam
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/r_WYy1BSbkmUjvconTI5TQ2?unsubscribedata=siDCesU8%2B1qSUfXQEfig8qrsj6DDoW2lnUni3a9Jsr%2B8wzoegmQ5o1o12pirLsAF0lSAIXI343Fe%2B3HiiRc9%2FMFkr6tX%2FUfroPAobgsX1RgBAC0mgjYPTxY6a2vLbtrzw5qhMkUXyhhM1zLpF0Mtu84iqfnLr22szw7wyA3oHWSsvrRevCd7cPVcyPhfK0OdhYetXRb%2B16pWa7MRZMJwuHIziEMYEcwdrTZJIci%2F5yupUDnjwOdP9qrZIVbcb80UqNEct9Rmbz3IuCAtgpUIv1jEV3ZzXHDYffXZCI4Wa57zPyFs%2FNhpgCWfYZmSqcD%2B5efLGidczZBUemgxwdCU1uU8TpWapCLI%2BR51S46jguwunEkedHBIQ8Hq9JvkOHB5Oj385SlsQGEG3OocqzE8UVJkSo%2Fb6kyTYwp0jIfg9Oo%3D .

name: Shelby County Republican Party
subject: Fwd: Please HELP: Ohio is in a Constitutional Crisis of Epic Proportions
body:
Hello Shelby County Conservatives,

Ohio is facing the most serious threat to conservative principles any of us
have ever seen!

Bold claim, yes, but if you read this email, I’m confident you will agree
and you will want to fight with all the energy you can muster! We are in
crisis mode!

Planned Parenthood and the ACLU are swinging for the fences this Summer and
Fall in Ohio! They just, today, turned in 710,131 signatures to get a
constitutional amendment on the ballot in November. Statistically, it
looks like a sure thing it will be on the November ballot now.

This email will outline our critical fight ahead, which includes a MUST-WIN
election in August. Planned Parenthood and the ACLU are well funded and
highly motivated to take over our state’s constitution. We must FIGHT NOW
like our lives depended on it!!!

If we don’t get the conservative vote out in the next two elections (August
8th and November 7th), we stand to lose so much ground to the ultra-liberal
left that it is hard to imagine that our state could ever recover from it.
Let me set the stage for you.

There are three major facets to this crisis that we need to fight (mostly)
in sequence:

1. Protect our constitution from leftist, liberal, out-of-state meddlers in
the August Election

- See the <August Amendment Explained> attachment to better understand
this

2. Defeat Planned Parenthood and the ACLU’s unbelievably bad constitutional
amendment in the November Election

- See the <November Amendment Explained> attachment to better understand
this

3. Hold Republican politicians accountable for creating this crisis

- We need to focus on winning in August for now, but the accountability
discussion must follow

A WARNING about AUGUST: If we fail to protect our constitution in August,
our ability to defeat Planned Parenthood and the ACLU in November will be
severely compromised. The attachments will make that relationship clear to
you. Bottom Line: It is ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for this August election.

I often hear parents and grand-parents fret about the future in store for
their children and grand-children. Transgenderism and the alphabet-soup of
child-sexualization is out of control in our nation. This is a do-or-die
moment in Ohio if we want to preserve any semblance of a reasonable future
for our children and grandchildren. There is so much to be said about the
threats we face that I could easily overwhelm you, so I will try to keep it
manageable. I am making bold claims in this email, but I believe the
attachments will convince you that my claims are well founded. They will
also help fill in some of the blanks if you want/need more detail about
specific aspects of this battle.

How can you help?

Please be creative in deciding how you will help us win in August and
November. At this stage of the battle, it really boils down to us getting
more votes than them! That means we must do three things better than we
have ever done them before in Shelby County, and pray that other counties
are doing the same:

*1. Voter Awareness*

- The vast majority of voters don’t even know we’re having an election
in August, let alone how important it is.
- Please be creative in how you make people aware, but every
conservative voter in Ohio needs to be made aware of this impending
crisis. Emails, texts, phone calls, church bulletins, social media posts,
FaceBook profiles, letters to the editor, etc.
- Tell people about the importance of this election every way that
you can think of.
- Please see the attached <Yard Sign Strategy> for another very
important mechanism for raising awareness.

*2. Voter Education*

- The liberal left is masterful at confusing people with half-truths and
outright lies. Please see the <4 Big Lies> attachment. Please also see
the companion article attached as <Amendments *Should* Be Hard>.
- We need to educate our voters so they “Vote YES on Issue 1” in the
August Special Election. Two good sources are:
- VoteYesOhio.com
- ProtectWomenOhio.com

*3. Voter Turnout*

- Shelby County had less than 14% turnout in last year’s August
Election.
- Conservative counties like ours need record-breaking turnout this
August to avert this crisis.
- And PLEASE VOTE EARLY!!! August is a busy, busy time for families.
PLEASE get your vote in the bank ASAP!!!
- My family will be voting the week of July 11th and I am offering
rides to my neighbors at Dorothy Love to go vote early.
- The early in-person voting schedule at the Board of Elections is
attached. <Early Voting Hours>
- You could also request an absentee ballot and mail it in by
following the link below:
-
https://www.ohiosos.gov/elections/voters/how-to-request-your-absentee-ballot/
- Early voting can help us win! Please do it!!!

If you need signs, please stop by the Shelby County Square on Saturday
mornings, or just contact me!

If you have ideas about how to help us win these battles, please don’t
hesitate to contact me! Simply informing everyone you know and getting
them to vote early and to “Vote YES on Issue 1” will be a tremendous help!!!

Please consider forwarding this to every conservative Ohio voter in your
email address book!!!

Please be praying that God’s will be done in this matter, and that His
people rise to the occasion!

Let’s win this!!!

Soli Deo Gloria...Dan Cecil
Chairman, Shelby County Republican Party
(937) 206-2970
cecilda.usaf@gmail.com

Attachments:
<August Amendment Explained>
<November Amendment Explained>
<Yard Sign Strategy>
<4 Big Lies>
Source:

clean_body: Hello Shelby County Conservatives, Ohio is facing the most serious threat to conservative principles any of us have ever seen! Bold claim, yes, but if you read this email, I’m confident you will agree and you will want to fight with all the energy you can muster! We are in crisis mode! Planned Parenthood and the ACLU are swinging for the fences this Summer and Fall in Ohio! They just, today, turned in 710,131 signatures to get a constitutional amendment on the ballot in November. Statistically, it looks like a sure thing it will be on the November ballot now. This email will outline our critical fight ahead, which includes a MUST-WIN election in August. Planned Parenthood and the ACLU are well funded and highly motivated to take over our state’s constitution. We must FIGHT NOW like our lives depended on it!!! If we don’t get the conservative vote out in the next two elections (August 8th and November 7th), we stand to lose so much ground to the ultra-liberal left that it is hard to imagine that our state could ever recover from it. Let me set the stage for you. There are three major facets to this crisis that we need to fight (mostly) in sequence: 1. Protect our constitution from leftist, liberal, out-of-state meddlers in the August Election - See the <August Amendment Explained> attachment to better understand this 2. Defeat Planned Parenthood and the ACLU’s unbelievably bad constitutional amendment in the November Election - See the <November Amendment Explained> attachment to better understand this 3. Hold Republican politicians accountable for creating this crisis - We need to focus on winning in August for now, but the accountability discussion must follow A WARNING about AUGUST: If we fail to protect our constitution in August, our ability to defeat Planned Parenthood and the ACLU in November will be severely compromised. The attachments will make that relationship clear to you. Bottom Line: It is ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for this August election. I often hear parents and grand-parents fret about the future in store for their children and grand-children. Transgenderism and the alphabet-soup of child-sexualization is out of control in our nation. This is a do-or-die moment in Ohio if we want to preserve any semblance of a reasonable future for our children and grandchildren. There is so much to be said about the threats we face that I could easily overwhelm you, so I will try to keep it manageable. I am making bold claims in this email, but I believe the attachments will convince you that my claims are well founded. They will also help fill in some of the blanks if you want/need more detail about specific aspects of this battle. How can you help? Please be creative in deciding how you will help us win in August and November. At this stage of the battle, it really boils down to us getting more votes than them! That means we must do three things better than we have ever done them before in Shelby County, and pray that other counties are doing the same: 1. Voter Awareness - The vast majority of voters don’t even know we’re having an election in August, let alone how important it is. - Please be creative in how you make people aware, but every conservative voter in Ohio needs to be made aware of this impending crisis. Emails, texts, phone calls, church bulletins, social media posts, FaceBook profiles, letters to the editor, etc. - Tell people about the importance of this election every way that you can think of. - Please see the attached <Yard Sign Strategy> for another very important mechanism for raising awareness. 2. Voter Education - The liberal left is masterful at confusing people with half-truths and outright lies. Please see the <4 Big Lies> attachment. Please also see the companion article attached as <Amendments Should Be Hard>. - We need to educate our voters so they “Vote YES on Issue 1” in the August Special Election. Two good sources are: - VoteYesOhio.com - ProtectWomenOhio.com 3. Voter Turnout - Shelby County had less than 14% turnout in last year’s August Election. - Conservative counties like ours need record-breaking turnout this August to avert this crisis. - And PLEASE VOTE EARLY!!! August is a busy, busy time for families. PLEASE get your vote in the bank ASAP!!! - My family will be voting the week of July 11th and I am offering rides to my neighbors at Dorothy Love to go vote early. - The early in-person voting schedule at the Board of Elections is attached. <Early Voting Hours> - You could also request an absentee ballot and mail it in by following the link below: - - Early voting can help us win! Please do it!!! If you need signs, please stop by the Shelby County Square on Saturday mornings, or just contact me! If you have ideas about how to help us win these battles, please don’t hesitate to contact me! Simply informing everyone you know and getting them to vote early and to “Vote YES on Issue 1” will be a tremendous help!!! Please consider forwarding this to every conservative Ohio voter in your email address book!!! Please be praying that God’s will be done in this matter, and that His people rise to the occasion! Let’s win this!!! Soli Deo Gloria...Dan Cecil Chairman, Shelby County Republican Party (937) 206-2970 cecilda.usaf@gmail.com Attachments: <August Amendment Explained> <November Amendment Explained> <Yard Sign Strategy> <4 Big Lies> Source: <Amendments Should Be Hard> Source: <Early Voting Hours> Source: -- Dan Cecil (937) 206-2970 cecilda.usaf@gmail.com

name: Craig Segall, Evergreen
subject: A great day for climate progress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN COLLABORATIVE
body:
A story about making urgent change possible
| | | | | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/3139?t=2&akid=13487%2E53494%2EMN_WXz)
---
|
---
| | **TELL EPA: TRUCK MAKERS ARE READY FOR STRONGER STANDARDS** Truck makers have agreed to go further than ever to curb pollution and accelerate zero-emission vehicle sales—**now EPA needs to catch up.**
---
[SIGN ON](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4658?t=4&akid=13487%2E53494%2EMN_WXz)
---
| | Friend, **This is a great day for communities across the country that, for decades, have been forced to inhale deadly truck pollution. ** My name is Craig Segall, and I want to tell you the story behind today's great news: The world’s leading truck makers and their trade group—after years of foot-dragging—have agreed to commit to stronger pollution standards on trucks. As Evergreen's new vice president of policy and a former lead air quality official for the state of California, I could not be more excited about this win. Both Evergreen and my former team at the California Air Resources Board played an important role in making this happen, supporting leaders from burdened communities across the country. And now the work has paid off. Truck makers have inked a deal with California to follow its world-leading truck smog controls regardless of a wave of legal challenges, and, even more excitingly, to follow its requirements that they **vastly accelerate zero-emission vehicle sales, setting the course for 100 percent zero emissions by the mid-2030s**. For the millions of people who have been forced to inhale deadly pollution from big trucks in communities across the country—and especially communities of color due to the racist planning of our road system—this is a major reprieve. In my last role, I steered the teams developing those standards and urged the truck makers to come to the table. It's been a long road: Industry started out by threatening to sue California and EPA over pollution controls and was only fought back by continued movement pressure. Facing determined state regulators and clear-eyed movement leaders, the giant trucking industry was forced to make a U-turn. We need to keep the pressure on and hold them to these commitments—and push them to keep going further. **Crucially, those standards are way more ambitious than the rules that EPA has been working on—so this becomes a major opportunity for the Biden Administration to go further, faster, now that even industry has acknowledged it can do more.**
---
[**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4658?t=6&akid=13487%2E53494%2EMN_WXz)
---
EPA must take that next step by tightening carbon pollution and smog rules for trucks—and then clean up pollution from the rest of the dirty freight system, like locomotives and airplanes. **With this deal in hand, we finally have a chance to clear the air in the communities that need it the most.** Onward, Craig Segall
Vice President of Policy
Evergreen Collaborative
---

subject: Movie: Sound of Freedom/ Louisa Parade Update/ Other
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KtycLTdo5Iov_kYQx1e6OaDRMcSpSMVEaVYhDI4sTSvphQ-Ki01omqUiX7nv-n67ioynC6jkAuR7jEITzUw95mR72F4WGVnZ05RUKDL4Po9mPiKCwTMN6ZoeIiMiRdk1f7BN4K7--X0lFnB22gc4Un4v9EXmvDFM&c=0MiVkGmNoSI158bWW5V3GyG4DD9aYP-02Wpr9re33IW-212CchE5xQ==&ch=eSbm2pPVpi9qeQiDPtJVUa-vlcdCyprV3UJ0dhnVqoG1Dyu4xxd6iQ==)
---
| God's Children, Are Not For Sale
---
| "Human trafficking is a $150 billion a year business. The United States is one of the top destinations for human trafficking and is one of the largest consumers of child sex."
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KtycLTdo5Iov_kYQx1e6OaDRMcSpSMVEaVYhDI4sTSvphQ-Ki01omtAHk_oihLCsOyOGW0lC2fUlfawzviiRTQTrswJpzBnWqsYNdXfxpFr5KLq5ibNfeqpmah1QUOoIkvvAwOLTR-il_yIHScRtrHEFx4t1IROeyxXHBi3SVYAdf9dXYfYD6aRt9SQ4yeZS27GtIQQNC4-a5kjvfpI9RQ_rZYHhCj2Dow2vxWH9VvJFKYmEdMBo5YvEPoGEOYWk&c=0MiVkGmNoSI158bWW5V3GyG4DD9aYP-02Wpr9re33IW-212CchE5xQ==&ch=eSbm2pPVpi9qeQiDPtJVUa-vlcdCyprV3UJ0dhnVqoG1Dyu4xxd6iQ==)
---
| Human trafficking is modern day slavery and it is an evil that must be stopped. This should be a bi-partasan issue. Yesterday, I watched a heartbreaking movie, "The Sound of Freedom", with my team at Westchester Regal Cinema. It took five years to actually get this movie into the movie theaters because there is a huge effort to hide this evil truth. Human trafficking of children/ adults brings in $500 billion a year. Please go see this movie and share this story with as many people as possible. [Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KtycLTdo5Iov_kYQx1e6OaDRMcSpSMVEaVYhDI4sTSvphQ-Ki01omtAHk_oihLCsOyOGW0lC2fUlfawzviiRTQTrswJpzBnWqsYNdXfxpFr5KLq5ibNfeqpmah1QUOoIkvvAwOLTR-il_yIHScRtrHEFx4t1IROeyxXHBi3SVYAdf9dXYfYD6aRt9SQ4yeZS27GtIQQNC4-a5kjvfpI9RQ_rZYHhCj2Dow2vxWH9VvJFKYmEdMBo5YvEPoGEOYWk&c=0MiVkGmNoSI158bWW5V3GyG4DD9aYP-02Wpr9re33IW-212CchE5xQ==&ch=eSbm2pPVpi9qeQiDPtJVUa-vlcdCyprV3UJ0dhnVqoG1Dyu4xxd6iQ==) to see how you and your family can watch this movie, "The Sound of Freedom", for free.
"There are more human beings living in slavery today than any time in history - including when slavery was legal."
"The Sound of Freedom", based on the incredible true story, shines a light on even the darkest of places. After rescuing a young boy from ruthless child traffickers, a federal agent learns the boy's sister is still captive and decides to embark on a dangerous mission to save her. With time running out, he quits his job and journeys deep into the Colombian jungle, putting his life on the line to free her from a fate worse than death.
As a Navy SEAL, we were taught to use our strength to protect those who don't have the strength to protect themselves. As your State Senator, I will continue the fight to stop Human trafficking here in the Commonwealth and abroad.
[Click here ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KtycLTdo5Iov_kYQx1e6OaDRMcSpSMVEaVYhDI4sTSvphQ-Ki01omtAHk_oihLCsJca1MK0yWj14JDQCYcYqJONE5VeDlvk85rhF2mGIMj1nr6xNlrYVFouX0hH9ujG-jVjD8xwOKc_lfyDo2EnuP9zUM3tQUZvQpV4FYNEiISKTsATFYbwXiTjvqwfJIp0961RxISLjjag=&c=0MiVkGmNoSI158bWW5V3GyG4DD9aYP-02Wpr9re33IW-212CchE5xQ==&ch=eSbm2pPVpi9qeQiDPtJVUa-vlcdCyprV3UJ0dhnVqoG1Dyu4xxd6iQ==)for my bill, killed by Democrats, that would have increased felony penalties for those who participate in human trafficking, and included even stiffer felony penalties for those who traffic children.
---
| Louisa Parade Friday 7 July 6PM
---
|
---
| You have another chance to celebrate Independence Day with us. This Friday July 7, Team McGuire will participate in the Mineral City Parade in Louisa County. Line up is at 5pm at Mineral Baptist Church. The parade starts 6pm and is sponsored by the VFW 8947. Wear your red McGuire t-shirt and join us for a good time. God Bless America! Email john@mcguireforvirginia.com with questions.
---
| Goochland Tea Party Tent
---
|
---
| Stop by the Goochland Tea Party tent each Saturday 10am to 4pm at 30 Broad Street Road, Manakin Sabot, VA, 23103 next to the Food Lion in Centerville each Saturday from now to November 7. Stop by and learn about local politics, meet local candidates, get yard signs, Trump gear, McGuire gear, and more. Please bring a friend!
---

clean_body: | | | | | | == | God's Children, Are Not For Sale | "Human trafficking is a $150 billion a year business. The United States is one of the top destinations for human trafficking and is one of the largest consumers of child sex." | == | Human trafficking is modern day slavery and it is an evil that must be stopped. This should be a bi-partasan issue. Yesterday, I watched a heartbreaking movie, "The Sound of Freedom", with my team at Westchester Regal Cinema. It took five years to actually get this movie into the movie theaters because there is a huge effort to hide this evil truth. Human trafficking of children/ adults brings in $500 billion a year. Please go see this movie and share this story with as many people as possible. == to see how you and your family can watch this movie, "The Sound of Freedom", for free. "There are more human beings living in slavery today than any time in history - including when slavery was legal." "The Sound of Freedom", based on the incredible true story, shines a light on even the darkest of places. After rescuing a young boy from ruthless child traffickers, a federal agent learns the boy's sister is still captive and decides to embark on a dangerous mission to save her. With time running out, he quits his job and journeys deep into the Colombian jungle, putting his life on the line to free her from a fate worse than death. As a Navy SEAL, we were taught to use our strength to protect those who don't have the strength to protect themselves. As your State Senator, I will continue the fight to stop Human trafficking here in the Commonwealth and abroad. my bill, killed by Democrats, that would have increased felony penalties for those who participate in human trafficking, and included even stiffer felony penalties for those who traffic children. | Louisa Parade Friday 7 July 6PM | | You have another chance to celebrate Independence Day with us. This Friday July 7, Team McGuire will participate in the Mineral City Parade in Louisa County. Line up is at 5pm at Mineral Baptist Church. The parade starts 6pm and is sponsored by the VFW 8947. Wear your red McGuire t-shirt and join us for a good time. God Bless America! Email john@mcguireforvirginia.com with questions. | Goochland Tea Party Tent | | Stop by the Goochland Tea Party tent each Saturday 10am to 4pm at 30 Broad Street Road, Manakin Sabot, VA, 23103 next to the Food Lion in Centerville each Saturday from now to November 7. Stop by and learn about local politics, meet local candidates, get yard signs, Trump gear, McGuire gear, and more. Please bring a friend! | Thank you, once again, for allowing me to serve you in the Virginia House of Delegates. God willing, I will win in November and be sworn in as your next State Senator in January 2024. name: Vikram Mansharamani
subject: Donald Kreis and Vikram Mansharamani - NAVIGATING UNCERTAINTY
body:
Podcast, radio show, conversations...
| | | |
---
# Donald Kreis, Consumer Advocate for the State of New Hampshire
---
In this episode, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Donald Kreis, the Consumer Advocate for the State of New Hampshire, about his path from journalism through the legal profession to his current role. Don shares how persistence and grit, in the face of setbacks, can often open the door to new opportunities. He also explains the role of the Consumer Advocate and uses his (actual) crystal ball to look into the future of energy production and the outlook for electricity prices.
Tune in via the links below!

---
---
PRIOR EPISODES ALL AVAILABLE ON DEMAND!
For those who missed the prior episodes of NAVIGATING UNCERTAINTY, have no fear! They're all available on demand via the links below. As you sit in traffic during your weekend trips, tune in and use the opportunity to learn about some fascinating people as well as some of the most important topics of our times!
You'll find my conversations with Jeremy Hitchcock, Founder of Dyn and Executive Chairman of Minim, Phil Taub, Partner at NixonPeabody and Co-Founder of SWIM WITH A MISSION, Morgan Ortagus, Former Spokesperson for the State Department, David Jordan, Founder of Seven Hills Foundation, John Avlon, Senior Political Analyst at CNN, Derek Leathers, Chairman & CEO of Werner Enterprises, Rudy Glocker, Founder of Burgeon Outdoor, former US Senator Kelly Ayotte, NCUA Vice Chair Kyle Hauptman, Miami Mayor Francis Suarez, NH Governor Chris Sununu, NH Education Czar Frank Edelblut, Commissioner of Business and Economic Affairs Taylor Caswell, GOP Presidential Candidate Vivek Ramaswamy, former Commander of NORAD and Retired Four Star General Lori Robinson, and former Chair of House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence Mike Rogers.

---
| |
---
---
|
---
|
Navigating Uncertainty is a show in which acclaimed global trend-watcher and futurist [Vikram Mansharamani](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001q5CiKjMcvqxKY-PkJ-lodUvfNpTAIQ0VkcFbzykuaPsoJllf8b9uO6DTs7rbnFt9SRfehGVCf7QmcvsamhKIRVhnlLDPz6ls5OKOEwZHLOPuO70iCs-ETVqEI__FEUuW6X5OZaLlvDKKZZ82-D_QcA==&c=7Bo2FYYZUr-rYaBdYUs1WpyI0DlGz6ZGHngDn5dsJAx97ZJ7JcOQbw==&ch=9QkSYP_XD3uR6TN3ihpMGCcVTOhPFYR8XIGUkyktovBN2CV5gj7-lw==) dives into how leaders make decisions. Through long-form conversations that move beyond sound-bites, Dr. Mansharamani explores how some of the most successful people think about tough choices. Serious, irreverent, entertaining, heart-warming, and occasionally tear-jerking, Navigating Uncertainty offers listeners bite-sized authentic biographies of high-impact leaders from all walks of life.Weekly episodes are released every Thursday via Apple Podcast, Spotify and everywhere podcasts are generally available!

To learn more about Dr. Mansharamani, please visit his website at [www.mansharamani.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001q5CiKjMcvqxKY-PkJ-lodUvfNpTAIQ0VkcFbzykuaPsoJllf8b9uO6DTs7rbnFt9SRfehGVCf7QmcvsamhKIRVhnlLDPz6ls5OKOEwZHLOPuO70iCs-ETVqEI__FEUuW6X5OZaLlvDKKZZ82-D_QcA==&c=7Bo2FYYZUr-rYaBdYUs1WpyI0DlGz6ZGHngDn5dsJAx97ZJ7JcOQbw==&ch=9QkSYP_XD3uR6TN3ihpMGCcVTOhPFYR8XIGUkyktovBN2CV5gj7-lw==).
Dr. Mansharamani is also planning to launch an occasional newsletter this summer. To subscribe (for free), please visit [mansharamani.substack.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001q5CiKjMcvqxKY-PkJ-lodUvfNpTAIQ0VkcFbzykuaPsoJllf8b9uO7OqWC0XJnMJ4vyfkNUAScGY9pfFiWkNIj4cu6KmQSSPTjSA4XDzGWipp5X72U7PJXehvkoITuaR6mTXTl6G6mLxZW8FQ7mcpw-ahSSVcyYH&c=7Bo2FYYZUr-rYaBdYUs1WpyI0DlGz6ZGHngDn5dsJAx97ZJ7JcOQbw==&ch=9QkSYP_XD3uR6TN3ihpMGCcVTOhPFYR8XIGUkyktovBN2CV5gj7-lw==)

clean_body: Podcast, radio show, conversations... | | | | Donald Kreis, Consumer Advocate for the State of New Hampshire In this episode, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Donald Kreis, the Consumer Advocate for the State of New Hampshire, about his path from journalism through the legal profession to his current role. Don shares how persistence and grit, in the face of setbacks, can often open the door to new opportunities. He also explains the role of the Consumer Advocate and uses his (actual) crystal ball to look into the future of energy production and the outlook for electricity prices. Tune in via the links below! PRIOR EPISODES ALL AVAILABLE ON DEMAND! For those who missed the prior episodes of NAVIGATING UNCERTAINTY, have no fear! They're all available on demand via the links below. As you sit in traffic during your weekend trips, tune in and use the opportunity to learn about some fascinating people as well as some of the most important topics of our times! You'll find my conversations with Jeremy Hitchcock, Founder of Dyn and Executive Chairman of Minim, Phil Taub, Partner at NixonPeabody and Co-Founder of SWIM WITH A MISSION, Morgan Ortagus, Former Spokesperson for the State Department, David Jordan, Founder of Seven Hills Foundation, John Avlon, Senior Political Analyst at CNN, Derek Leathers, Chairman & CEO of Werner Enterprises, Rudy Glocker, Founder of Burgeon Outdoor, former US Senator Kelly Ayotte, NCUA Vice Chair Kyle Hauptman, Miami Mayor Francis Suarez, NH Governor Chris Sununu, NH Education Czar Frank Edelblut, Commissioner of Business and Economic Affairs Taylor Caswell, GOP Presidential Candidate Vivek Ramaswamy, former Commander of NORAD and Retired Four Star General Lori Robinson, and former Chair of House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence Mike Rogers. | | | | Navigating Uncertainty is a show in which acclaimed global trend-watcher and futurist == dives into how leaders make decisions. Through long-form conversations that move beyond sound-bites, Dr. Mansharamani explores how some of the most successful people think about tough choices. Serious, irreverent, entertaining, heart-warming, and occasionally tear-jerking, Navigating Uncertainty offers listeners bite-sized authentic biographies of high-impact leaders from all walks of life.Weekly episodes are released every Thursday via Apple Podcast, Spotify and everywhere podcasts are generally available! To learn more about Dr. Mansharamani, please visit his website at ==. Dr. Mansharamani is also planning to launch an occasional newsletter this summer. To subscribe (for free), please visit == LINKS TO THE SHOW | | == | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | | | | | | Vikram Mansharamani | P.O. Box 1376, Concord, NH 03302 | | Sent by mailto:vikram@mansharamani.com powered by

body:
Loomer Unleashed Newsletter

\*\*GOP Engages in Secret Plot to Undermine

Trump's 2024 Re-Election Efforts

\*\* ( https://sable.madmimi.com/c/580118?id=115348.1554.1.885ec949637f2b784800ddfb7d4630a6 )

( https://sable.madmimi.com/c/580118?id=115348.1555.1.fb646b1e9d98016af11b8c8a848172b1 )

In a groundbreaking revelation, exclusive documentation has been obtained that exposes the California GOP's clandestine efforts to modify the bylaws governing the Presidential delegation process in the state.

| Peter, Bill is back on the trail, so we will be airing a powerful encore episode of the Common Ground Podcast at 4:30PM ET this afternoon.
Today's topic is **fighting back against cancel and woke culture.** Cancel culture is not about holding people accountable for their actions. It is about shaming and punishing those with opinions that are deemed unacceptable by a radical minority. This is a dangerous trend that threatens our freedom of speech.
---
| | [CLICK HERE TO WATCH AN ENCORE SHOWING OF THE COMMON GROUND PODCAST (STARTS AT 4:30PM ET)](https://xtz223.keap-link014.com/v2/click/08c98718bc4997a45654aa7d1e83fa17/eJyNj0ELgkAQhf_LnCVRK9SbiIhoHqLOYTrUku4u6yiZ-N9bKzwVdJ353vd4IxDyglNSgQ93eti2AwYoLJlkyCkUnIry9bU3a8uxDKgZv8VKdBL88Wt4AeazZXmuATRI1MhhH4RpksenLMlTTcpC6Y6_PJ67XTTRLkgymKafXmwYRb1Wt-CT6nAeVDE9io6q1vyVSLa-aZaiaQS_6A5ercq6O5s161ELCimRV5_xKQ5vzfQE1D1ivg==)
---
|
---
| Our special guests for the episode are Antonio Sabato Jr and Riley Gaines.
---
|
---
| Antonio Sabato Jr is a model and actor who Hollywood has attempted to blacklist, solely because of his conservative views. While Hollywood preaches diversity, diversity of thought no longer exists in the entertainment industry when it comes to certain political views. Antonio is pushing back against cancel culture through his Conflict Studios, which helps actors continue their careers after getting blacklisted. Riley Gaines is a former University of Kentucky swimmer who stepped into the spotlight last year when she first spoke out against biological male athletes competing in women’s sports. Gaines became a 12-time NCAA All-American swimmer and a five-time SEC champion. But last year, the integrity of her sport — and female sports as a whole — was called into question when University of Pennsylvania swimmer Thomas, who had competed on the school’s men’s team her freshman, sophomore and junior years, began shattering records in the women’s category. Make sure you [**join us now (we'll be live right at 4:30PM EDT),**](https://xtz223.keap-link014.com/v2/click/291f29b6c0dff2fe97c125a6f1283578/eJyNj0ELgkAQhf_LnCVzrShvISKL5iHqHKZDLem6rKNk4n9vrfBU0HXme9_j9UAoU0k8Bw_u9GDMBQs0ZkIJlORXktLs9WXLheM6FhRC3kJdNQq8_mt4Asazw-bMAuoUGuSw3_oRT8JTzJPIkCrVpuMvz2a9mjTBbstjGIafXiwFBa1R1-CRbnAclAszio66MPyVSNWebWdVWVbyYjpkPsuK5mwXokUjSJVCmX_GR9i9NcMTySpisA==) Bill

name: Committee To Elect Stephen McDow
subject: Reminder: Help me fight for you
body:
You don't want to miss this.
| | | |
# Vote 2024
# Stephen R. McDow II
US Congressional Candidate, MD-06
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fiSB1woRWxIe-n7bWNknXFs9hbtFddriXLnzS67p7T7-PJGbgpQfYxgqkyjt8_E-BHPmX8tH98b5T7socQ8aieTdl9lKtbLVNL-PA0qt0WR3rPLVswMMHCiPx2_Kr4tnYUfnirPuOfII4_97yB94Sk_Y0VI2AwIf&c=YZ6vjKn07VH_VyVxiJa4rpD_r0REgH4YOORSgmWaElsmDhQHvmdfEA==&ch=dzcEAQVlQUvUgJfL1mbva0YkxgwXOo_6XRPAXIawApEa-o8qWCtXkg==)
---
| Image courtesy of David Trone for Maryland
---
| |
---
| Friends - Last week I spoke at the Garrett County Roosevelt - Kennedy Dinner in Oakland, MD. The experience taught me how compassionate, hardworking, and 'boot-strappy' citizens in Western, Maryland are. My conversations only emboldened our position that you - the voters - are tired of the politics of division and jealousy. Our message centered around the 6 Pillars is resonating with all who listen. Our rhetoric is as important as the positions we support and defend. I tell you, I will NOT allow any current fads, disgruntled leaders, or apathetic community activists discourse our mission. If anything, the pain and trauma they are experiencing has motivated me to work harder for you. My hope is that they will be renewed by my sense of hope and optimism.
Several voters from different parts of the state mentioned "Its nice to see a Democrat run a Centrist campaign - not too extreme on either side." I agree! Our goal is to collaborate with colleagues on both sides of the aisle and solve important issues through the lens of my personal moral code:

As a Blue Dog Democrat, I believe in free and creative markets, rugged but collaborative individualism, smart government, freedom and equality for all, and a strong defense! Please check out my words below:
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fiSB1woRWxIe-n7bWNknXFs9hbtFddriXLnzS67p7T7-PJGbgpQfYxgqkyjt8_E-F1NzVxW6HLAcIRfA7mpffyHBia_4DLSGbr6yRVMCvm5aPxJ04BsJaS6dQp3I1ahuFqqKH__LesVQ3nqNO6P-L2hmxXSxTHiZcX6nIsmGIV3Bs0laoMXl2A==&c=YZ6vjKn07VH_VyVxiJa4rpD_r0REgH4YOORSgmWaElsmDhQHvmdfEA==&ch=dzcEAQVlQUvUgJfL1mbva0YkxgwXOo_6XRPAXIawApEa-o8qWCtXkg==)
---
If you agree we have to FIGHT and not return to the 1960's and you want someone who can fight and win for you - Support our efforts by giving what you can below.

| | This is important. Will is a great guy and will make an incredible President. And what stands out is his message, open & honest approach, and his willingness to go head-to-head with Donald Trump. He won't sign a loyalty pledge because we all know Trump won't either and if he does, he will renege on his pledge like he did in 2016. And to be clear - Will doesn't have an issue supporting our Republican nominee. He has an issue supporting Donald Trump. But we intend to quality for the debate to see if the RNC will keep Will off stage, even if 40,000+ Americans want to see him there. _**[A $1 donation i](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=34d89e461aaa44c78b8907f4a4a14a11&_m=c5b9594ff1b54d9aafc8318ab74d71ce&_e=uwfxGlzHTWd6gcRoDanRu7zFIJ1nXSRVTCneydpW49d-Syvjt9Ilq4c2K9StLw-tzTmQgGuQf7VnAO1aGrKA1wG6TKOWzHjsR8u8s1ZjxGRIp_dy2RwXILHkPxKjqlGIkPmBBDt86zwvuQ42ak9zen-MSdpAv4389aMuJYMaiuw41OL0O6iWm5tDfrZ5iap-w6a5ZYo7ljInJlxsEkHlcWJQrdWNkI5gRaYJL2Zy2Kpg5ZMLnwv07SNw9cKA6kUbst33_nq7VTDrJ8RfnE7PH4mdOhVGSxZ0iqRrAt4CXnmQ-mbsBF6CdlZ4ssEYnl2IB3Q22pLyeIBEFe-ULeEPkn_3Z4WznRJ5jXJz5PvpR24%3D)s all we need.**_
