clean_body: | | | | | This is important. Will is a great guy and will make an incredible President. And what stands out is his message, open & honest approach, and his willingness to go head-to-head with Donald Trump. He won't sign a loyalty pledge because we all know Trump won't either and if he does, he will renege on his pledge like he did in 2016. And to be clear - Will doesn't have an issue supporting our Republican nominee. He has an issue supporting Donald Trump. But we intend to quality for the debate to see if the RNC will keep Will off stage, even if 40,000+ Americans want to see him there. all we need. In a divisive political environment, Will's message is one of unity, solutions, and new perspectives on issues like → AI and Technology → The Border Crisis → China & Russia → National Security → New Family Values That's why it's so important voters hear what he has to say. Thank you,Justin H. | Campaign Manager | | | | www.hurdforamerica.com | | |

**... an entire movement - 75 MILLION patriots strong - that will NEVER, _EVER_ SURRENDER our country to the radical Left. **

name: Michelle Vallejo
subject: Working families are the backbone of our economy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Vallejo for Congress
body:
When I’m in Congress, here’s what I'll fight for: | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/tTBUZwcBH_2q13Ow12s-jc-9PHkp7BkSZ-MbOY7TNqbHMZZ7e6z8fxUUbQYxgrxk6a2v4Aw9Ux80o37VicMJ_2RUROn59OUiTeeVHLXdV7VQ6UP0B003zvnUXl-_g03deSr_UEusiXw67aLE65aAE6fzI-j0sjww9F4B0eAw7tcbnk6wDAsXIIU_FhcSt2-h2uRhER5sV0aTgkFm-28TdAGWh_U5qZiao_57ck-M2QKVEBt96ZgX2RR-kqOXxuDb3w1PAukbgWOSNs6Z6A2Ulk3nymL2dGK8jaShft31luGW2beyUqCrPOEXi-z97svA55vLx5mm9L-TdGWBzzv97w/3xn/bXuWGgGeSRGQwgU5KaLfUA/h0/NUNfGkOVQjrdyYb7lND8C9iDoWA756k5gBTe2UufD-U)
---
Peter, I jumped into this race because I understand firsthand the struggles people in TX-15 are facing. Growing up, I witnessed the sacrifices my parents made — they worked multiple jobs, living paycheck to paycheck, all to make ends meet. This happened because of the lack of well-paying jobs providing livable wages — wages that could keep up with inflation and the rising cost of living. Decades later, many in South Texas are fighting the same battle and the American Dream too often feels out of reach. **[Working families are the backbone of our nation, yet their hard work has often gone unrewarded. I’m running for Congress to fight for working families like yours, Peter. clean_body: When I’m in Congress, here’s what I'll fight for: | | | Peter, I jumped into this race because I understand firsthand the struggles people in TX-15 are facing. Growing up, I witnessed the sacrifices my parents made — they worked multiple jobs, living paycheck to paycheck, all to make ends meet. This happened because of the lack of well-paying jobs providing livable wages — wages that could keep up with inflation and the rising cost of living. Decades later, many in South Texas are fighting the same battle and the American Dream too often feels out of reach. Every dollar raised will go directly to making sure we have all the resources we need to win come Election Day. A win for Team Vallejo is a win for working families across South Texas. My parents' story isn’t just a personal one to me — it's a story that resonates with so many people in our district. Our hard-working communities are essential to the wealth created in this country, yet they rarely reap the benefits. Juntos, we can! Michelle Vallejo | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Michelle Vallejo for Congress Michelle Vallejo for Congress PO Box 1265 Mission, TX 78573

name: Kash Patel
subject: This should piss you off
body:
This is the most dangerous time to be an America First patriot.

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zr8ij73mhcl01qqn1bqcokskiufrntr49v4ie30g_rp22sh2s8i66o70sdjm2pb2c1h2bs)

Friend,

This is the most dangerous time to be an America First patriot.

Why?

Because we are living under a two-tiered system of justice. Throw out all the stuff your civics teachers taught you in school. Currently, there are no fair trials when it comes to the government and its selective prosecution.

**_In a bombshell testimony from an IRS whistleblower, Hunter Biden sent WhatsApp messages demanding millions from a Chinese businessman_.** Hunter even went so far as to threaten the Chinese man that his father is sitting next to him and implied he would be angry unless paid.

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0ag3oio13hkbl36bippl33n9tik2efr0tuh3es8_rp22sh2s8i66o70sdjm2pb2c1h2bs)
You may be shocked. But this is a two-tiered system of justice that allows Hunter to get away with a slap on the wrist.

None of this would be known unless it was for the brave whistleblowers who are coming forward to share this information.

Friend, **I founded the Kash Foundation to provide legal and financial support to whistleblowers after they bring forth credible information about waste, fraud, and abuse.** My goal is to reclaim our government from the gangsters who weaponize our system of justice against America First patriots.

**_Our mission is ramping up quickly as more and more whistleblowers are coming forward. I have an urgent goal to raise $53,000 in the next 48 hours to defend their brave actions_.**

[Can you donate $10, $35, $100, or any amount you can afford to help Kash Foundation serve government whistleblowers? Click here to donate >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfpf20o4028he6ddv54394eqjob7ksd8nvl47q58_rp22sh2s8i66o70sdjm2pb2c1h2bs)

Whistleblowers risk their lives to expose the government gangster corrupting the Department of Justice and so any other agencies and departments.

If you're a whistleblower, you are giving up your career. You are risking the financial livelihood of your family to expose the corruption.

If you're a whistleblower, you can be hit with charges from the Department of Justice. And even if you're innocent, the process is the punishment! You will find yourselves paying thousands in legal fees.

Without whistleblowers:
* We wouldn't know about Hunter's WhatsApp message.

* We wouldn't know about the corruption at the FBI.

* We wouldn't know about the collusion happening between the FBI and IRS and the media to selectively suppress and leak information for political purposes.

Our nation is going through a crisis. We can give up and allow our justice system to be used against us. Or we can fight back. I'm not one for giving up. And I hope you can join me.

Thank you, Peter.

With your support, we met the mark on our second FEC fundraising goal of 2023. I’m so incredibly grateful and lucky to have you on the team. Your donations during these deadlines enable me to stay focused on the crucial work we are tackling in Congress.

Last week, the Supreme Court delivered crushing decisions – weakening LGBTQ+ protections, killing any hope of student loan relief, and ending affirmative action in higher education. So what happens now?

Our work continues.

Conservatives have made loud and clear where their priorities are, and I’m ready to keep working with my colleagues to expand protections for marginalized communities, among other initiatives. **But we’re in this together, so I want to make sure you have a chance to weigh in. What issues are at the top of your mind that you’d like me to look more closely at in Congress?**

Dear Peter, Emerge has trained over 5,500 women who are changing the status quo - fighting for LGBTQ+ rights, reproductive justice, fair access to higher education, and a robust democracy. And now, we are looking for the next generation of women to train so they can win. The [Emerge Boot Camp](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66060985/415217704/1127875010?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjYzJmZjZlLTFhMWMtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VjBtf4ud48OLTwCUXQpnlYB1QDDsG_fE_zTT9t6dXuA=&emci=6d103d76-b316-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=ccc2ff6e-1a1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=920818) training is designed to support women as they face the challenges of running for office, and has helped over a thousand individuals get elected. Applications for the [Emerge Southern Regional Candidate Boot Camp](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66060986/415217705/1788812956?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjYzJmZjZlLTFhMWMtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VjBtf4ud48OLTwCUXQpnlYB1QDDsG_fE_zTT9t6dXuA=&emci=6d103d76-b316-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=ccc2ff6e-1a1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=920818) are open now through July 14th. We need your help to recruit our next class of women of the New American Majority who are leading change across the country. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66060987/415217706/1127875010?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjYzJmZjZlLTFhMWMtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VjBtf4ud48OLTwCUXQpnlYB1QDDsG_fE_zTT9t6dXuA=&emci=6d103d76-b316-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=ccc2ff6e-1a1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=920818) Boot Camp participants learn the fundamentals of running a campaign, including campaign strategy, building a winning team, and fundraising. They also join a powerful network of alumni who are pushing for progress in their communities, from their local school board all the way to the U.S. Congress. But time is running out! The deadline to apply for the Boot Camp is fast approaching, and you don't want to miss this opportunity to apply, or share this with someone who should run for office in 2023 or 2024. While applications from Southern states will be prioritized in the selection process, we're accepting applications from across the country. **Applications are due on Friday, July 14th, so[apply now](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66060988/415217709/1788812956?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjYzJmZjZlLTFhMWMtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VjBtf4ud48OLTwCUXQpnlYB1QDDsG_fE_zTT9t6dXuA=&emci=6d103d76-b316-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=ccc2ff6e-1a1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=920818)!** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66060989/415217710/1788812956?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjYzJmZjZlLTFhMWMtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VjBtf4ud48OLTwCUXQpnlYB1QDDsG_fE_zTT9t6dXuA=&emci=6d103d76-b316-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=ccc2ff6e-1a1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=920818) Best regards, Brianna Carmen Political Director P.S. name: Shawn Carney
subject: The biggest threat facing the pro-life movement
body:
The weaponization of federal law enforcement

| |
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zltihmqgef8cgb5im7ejg0jo6injqu4pt2jjdt4g_rp22sh2s8i66o70sdjmaob1chh2bs)
---
Dear Pro-Life Friend, One year after the U.S. Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , the biggest threat facing pro-lifers who pray outside abortion clinics is...** _The weaponization of federal law enforcement – which is being used to target and harass pro-life Americans._** I’ll cut right to the chase. Here at **40 Days for Life** we hold two nationwide campaigns each year where our volunteers pray, fast, and hold peaceful vigils outside of abortion centers. We are there to offer help and support to mothers in, what for them is, an hour of darkness and great need.For this, our pro-life volunteers are taunted, insulted, and even spit upon. Sometimes they’re even physically attacked. It comes with the territory – with standing on the abortion industry’s front doorstep and getting between them and the “profit” they are counting on from each abortion.**But, today, we’re facing hostility from a shocking new source: the Federal Bureau of Investigation (F.B.I.).**
---
[**Stand with 40 Days for Life** ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zri8ia7bjfum9eccm3q72vf18llnkgbms5fq4mg8_rp22sh2s8i66o70sdjmaob1chh2bs)
---
| | The same F.B.I. that ignored the abortion activists who vandalized and even firebombed dozens of pregnancy centers, churches, and pro-life organizations in the aftermath of the Supreme Court overturning of Roe v. Wade...The same F.B.I. that turned a blind eye when an abortion activist leaked Justice Alito’s draft decision in the _Dobbs_ case... The same F.B.I. that was nowhere to be found when an 84-year-old woman in Michigan was _shot in the back_ as she handed out pro-life literature...Instead, the F.B.I. is using their vast resources to target and harass pro-lifers... *****Like Mark Houck whose story made national news when the****Biden Administration sent a heavily armed contingent of F.B.I. on a raid to arrest Mark (a pro-life speaker, sidewalk counselor, and participant in our Philadelphia _40 DAYS_ campaign) in front of ****his wife and children.** ***** Like Henry, a faithful 40 Days for Life participant who was questioned by two FBI****agents outside of a Minnesota Planned Parenthood.** This is nothing short of the weaponization of law enforcement – a calculated act of political retaliation (directed by the Biden Department of Justice) for the end of _Roe v. Wade._ [**This is why I’m prayerfully asking you to stand with our 40 Days for Life volunteers who risk their physical safety and their freedom to protect innocent preborn babies in the womb.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc35hofsl1s2oa24u1seq0cvvsje7j7he8hv5870_rp22sh2s8i66o70sdjmaob1chh2bs) If you’re wondering why Joe Biden, Merrick Garland, the F.B.I. and the Department of Justice would come after a group of peaceful, prayerful pro-life volunteers, look no further than the growth and the impact our movement over the last fifteen years. Since 2007 we’ve seen:
---
* 21,989 babies saved
* 242 abortion workers converted and 120 abortion facilities shut down
* 1,000,000+ pro-life Americans praying and fasting and standing vigil for an end to abortion and 20,000 churches standing up for life

---
Now you can see why Joe Biden and Merrick Garland are marshaling the full resources of the Department of Justice and F.B.I. against our volunteers. Now you can see why the ACLU called **40 Days for Life** the “ _greatest threat to choice”_ because it is so “ _highly organized and effective._ ” And now you can see why David Daleiden --- whose undercover videos exposed Planned Parenthoodharvesting and selling baby body parts --- calls us the “ _spiritual engine that has driven a lot of the success of the pro-life movement_...”You see, the formula for overcoming the weaponization of the F.B.I. is the same formula we’ve used to save so many lives.Prayer. Fasting. Peaceful vigil. When _Roe_ was overturned, many wondered what would become of our movement. Some even worried that our volunteers would think the fight to end abortion was over. You and I know that’s not the case. You and I know that it merely shifted to the states. Then it happened. A _tidal wave_ of applications for our first _post-Roe_ campaign... ...with 622 vigils, it immediately became **our largest campaign ever**.And thank God for that. Because abortion is still _legal_ in states where 80% of the population resides (or roughly 262.7 million Americans) and still _procurable_ for 100% of the country. No. The battle is not over. **Abortion by mail. Medicaid abortions. Interstate abortion referrals.** You name it. The abortion industry will do it to maintain their multibillion-dollar industry. This includes calling on their allies in the Biden Administration (like Merrick Garland) to do their “dirty work” and target our pro-life volunteers.As you’d expect, this is a real strain on our budget. Already, we spend $3,466 on each vigil site. With 622 campaigns that comes out to $2,155,852. Now, add to that the cost to hire security ($50,000 in Philadelphia alone, at the site where Mark Houck so bravely stood vigil along with his 12-year-old son), the cost of attorneys, which we provided for Mark, as we do with any of our other participants who are targeted or harassed by the abortion industry and their henchmen.Bottom-line? I need your help today. We can’t do this alone. [**That’s why I’m asking you to make a one-time contribution of $40 today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zva8rgfd0s2m4k7jq838fghbam8heho5t132jheg_rp22sh2s8i66o70sdjmaob1chh2bs) Think of it as $1 for each day of our vigil. [**Of course, if you can afford a larger donation of $50, $75, $125, $500, or even $1,000, it’d be a huge boost.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgqqk54ota5b9frpo6e2uq9ekpn0lf9le668804o_rp22sh2s8i66o70sdjmaob1chh2bs) 40 Days for Life is a 501(c)3 non-profit organization and, unlike Planned Parenthood, we don’t receive a single penny of taxpayer funding. If you’ll stand with us today, I know we can save more babies, spare more mothers and fathers a lifetime of agony and regret, rescue more workers from the clutches of the abortion industry, and persevere against the weaponization of the F.B.I. and the targeting, and harassment of our pro-life volunteers by federal law enforcement. [**So please hurry, stand with 40 Days for Life today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf7haome0c70gn6ab6rt2i4h45plm89af7fevarg_rp22sh2s8i66o70sdjmaob1chh2bs) Many thanks!For Life,
---
Shawn Carney
---
President & CEO, 40 Days for Life
---
P.S. Make no mistake, abortion is still legal in most places and Joe Biden’s F.B.I. is targeting pro-life warriors to intimidate, bully, and scare them into not showing up on Planned Parenthood’s doorstep. By joining me today, you’ll send an unmistakable message that pro-life Americans will never back down when it comes to defending the preborn! So please don’t delay. [**Please use this link to make your most generous donation of $40 or more to 40 Days for Life today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp2r2t75preiil35nu2h8ipqbl4qub67et70t3b0_rp22sh2s8i66o70sdjmaob1chh2bs)

body:
| | There’s no doubt that Washington is a special place. As a State Senator, I've worked on policies that move our state into the future, and I've never been more excited about what we've been able to accomplish during our work this session.

Together, we made the largest investments in much-needed affordable housing and environmental protections in our state’s history. These were my biggest priorities in the Capital budget and we delivered last session.

[We are making progress on the issues that matter most to our communities by working together – and in order to continue that work across Washington, I want to hear from you in my 2023 Priorities Survey:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66061048/415217876/-1620584704?contactdata=Vaeh8KddAVfeMTs3cwrh3UPj/SJ7nTPez+jXhf26DrRy3Ex7ajwCQ3xGIYU6QPGyXTXKrFg9V1ULDB7XcBMw4AgHAiKDRvNsdJiiOO0Xp6a6UVg/WxaW2PMQcYn3rAnAPuJlwzfEiYjAchTFCdVMXg==&source=MM_EM_SV_30DO_230706_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjZlMGFiNi0xYTFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aEYuNCjwPFGwJqCSdRMFIC15LnJAIk9IAEn66JdOrHM=&emci=ff9f7838-8d17-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=4b6e0ab6-1a1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=45626167) | | **[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66061049/415217877/-1620584704?contactdata=Vaeh8KddAVfeMTs3cwrh3UPj/SJ7nTPez+jXhf26DrRy3Ex7ajwCQ3xGIYU6QPGyXTXKrFg9V1ULDB7XcBMw4AgHAiKDRvNsdJiiOO0Xp6a6UVg/WxaW2PMQcYn3rAnAPuJlwzfEiYjAchTFCdVMXg==&source=MM_EM_SV_30DO_230706_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjZlMGFiNi0xYTFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aEYuNCjwPFGwJqCSdRMFIC15LnJAIk9IAEn66JdOrHM=&emci=ff9f7838-8d17-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=4b6e0ab6-1a1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=45626167)**
---
This past session, I was also proud to sponsor a bill so our families no longer have to spend their hard-earned money if their child takes a “College in the High School” course at their local public school. SB 5048 will lead to more students realizing they have the potential to be successful if they pursue post-secondary education.

I was also proud to sponsor a bill that expedites the permitting process for local housing. One of the best ways to make housing more affordable is to remove potential delays from the permitting process, which we finally achieved with the passage of SB 5290.

I look forward to sharing more about these important accomplishments and the impact the new policies will have for our state, but I want to hear more from you!

Take the survey: [https://secure.ngpvan.com/gY9zlYv-n0ukU21H4xY-nw2](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66061050/415217878/-1620584704?contactdata=Vaeh8KddAVfeMTs3cwrh3UPj/SJ7nTPez+jXhf26DrRy3Ex7ajwCQ3xGIYU6QPGyXTXKrFg9V1ULDB7XcBMw4AgHAiKDRvNsdJiiOO0Xp6a6UVg/WxaW2PMQcYn3rAnAPuJlwzfEiYjAchTFCdVMXg==&source=MM_EM_SV_30DO_230706_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjZlMGFiNi0xYTFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aEYuNCjwPFGwJqCSdRMFIC15LnJAIk9IAEn66JdOrHM=&emci=ff9f7838-8d17-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=4b6e0ab6-1a1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=45626167)

I’m looking forward to reading your responses so we can continue to work toward creative and lasting solutions to our shared challenges.

Thank you for sharing your thoughts!

Mark

|

Mark Mullet is running for Governor to make Washington safe, affordable and prosperous.

Friend, 75 million Americans are over the age of 60 — and that number will only grow in the years ahead. But elderly Americans all across the country are struggling to afford housing, food and health care. **_Right now, Washington is failing seniors._**
As a member of the **[_Special Committee on Aging_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66061126/415218040/-1691539725?code=jtk4268-su-d&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmMyZmY2ZS0xYTFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QU8X_DicXZs6QgV3waJEuFOjH6VRBVucU6BTRb6b6oU=&emci=e6d152aa-781b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=cbc2ff6e-1a1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)** , Kirsten Gillibrand is fighting every day to address this crisis. And now, she's released a new 5-point Master Plan on Aging to help seniors age with dignity. Here's what Kirsten's plan will do:
* Invest in programs to give seniors **access to affordable, nutritious food.**

* Ensure that seniors can **afford high-quality health care** by expanding Medicare benefits and lowering prescription drug costs.

* **Increase Social Security benefits** and fight scammers to make sure that seniors have economic security.

* Create more opportunities for seniors to **live in their own homes** and access the trained caregivers they need.

* Invest in low-cost, accessible, aging-friendly spaces and jobs so that seniors can **lead independent lives.**

But to get this legislation passed, Kirsten is counting on activists like you to stand with her. **[Please, will you add your name before midnight tonight to support Kirsten's plan and tell Washington that you believe seniors should age with dignity? subject: Who rules whom?
body:
The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cd6204214fe444b1ad2662bf0f9d636f&_e=b4ByiORO4g9zrnvHLd0NkSkVYk5kAnNJqMYnxNYNRceoxvpx7jBo1vIlMACTd7cKAOeurDMqGibOur16ZQQpK3PoBP3SK0oyJnZfSj2K4al5WHtUHslng-Qz5eIYiiKtz-OSzAYjYBeUgmGZ8GtS4Br3tv9PaA8iykaxJa8VBqEOJ9YMHeX84eszl0gRv8K441dZtLJ6ruCWh-MspAG1NqH-ReBhwlzDmOx59Len4Chb1rn0WsUzu3tYDhvqMHb06FxXld9rivZpCQqN7z1WBkRz2J1PK7-yAzrxNhneLtQ58QOJ7ETxBsBuUX-oLSRAt2hPn0U2f-xC5jTy2saNfQcjRAuS8NnczkN6IPuVVLG27UQy2GgDfGZRxaSyNVBKIrZVSTvZh6U1UNFySftfSdBK6U37lL8a2yJo6IDAn2A%3D)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cd6204214fe444b1ad2662bf0f9d636f&_e=b4ByiORO4g9zrnvHLd0NkSkVYk5kAnNJqMYnxNYNRceoxvpx7jBo1vIlMACTd7cKAOeurDMqGibOur16ZQQpK3PoBP3SK0oyJnZfSj2K4al5WHtUHslng-Qz5eIYiiKtz-OSzAYjYBeUgmGZ8GtS4Br3tv9PaA8iykaxJa8VBqEOJ9YMHeX84eszl0gRv8K441dZtLJ6ruCWh-MspAG1NqH-ReBhwlzDmOx59Len4Chb1rn0WsUzu3tYDhvqMHb06FxXld9rivZpCQqN7z1WBtihrAARK0J31TOu7BZfhKZ5_b-HIlB1EA2ryFSyu7ngJyeiof6L0OSh__MFROvFMj1JPlEKpNN-rXvo_liU2MfwblHQIy7MGKKg_5AoIs2k0Vr2-GYjwIN2KSHBmTwnx-xhBgEHUVworcYmKAu4lNw%3D).
## Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state--that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans?
[YES](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cd6204214fe444b1ad2662bf0f9d636f&_e=b4ByiORO4g9zrnvHLd0NkSkVYk5kAnNJqMYnxNYNRceoxvpx7jBo1vIlMACTd7cKAOeurDMqGibOur16ZQQpK3PoBP3SK0oyJnZfSj2K4al5WHtUHslng-Qz5eIYiiKtz-OSzAYjYBeUgmGZ8GtS4Br3tv9PaA8iykaxJa8VBqEOJ9YMHeX84eszl0gRv8K441dZtLJ6ruCWh-MspAG1NqH-ReBhwlzDmOx59Len4Chb1rn0WsUzu3tYDhvqMHb06FxXld9rivZpCQqN7z1WBimQQQbHO0SEsD_iowPGAB3anR2t29UsMICLb3_n0tuXhoKO2Jbws7n5Snx8Htd7998Ov2WJaxEMouoMVDh3xn6oEgymcSmemNuYf_Z8mQxfILVudpKwju_hFbfh_ELUscFhmwjNcH8J_5y4CRgQGVA%3D) [NO](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cd6204214fe444b1ad2662bf0f9d636f&_e=b4ByiORO4g9zrnvHLd0NkSkVYk5kAnNJqMYnxNYNRceoxvpx7jBo1vIlMACTd7cKAOeurDMqGibOur16ZQQpK3PoBP3SK0oyJnZfSj2K4al5WHtUHslng-Qz5eIYiiKtz-OSzAYjYBeUgmGZ8GtS4Br3tv9PaA8iykaxJa8VBqEOJ9YMHeX84eszl0gRv8K441dZtLJ6ruCWh-MspAG1NqH-ReBhwlzDmOx59Len4Chb1rn0WsUzu3tYDhvqMHb06FxXld9rivZpCQqN7z1WBk4O02d8tEPRVhYY6hEm6P33qmwgxPphviB3PNBDnxuZuC9UpezJXmy8kBFQkx9iNl-4zvVnfHItIF5lqMHt69_SdhGGLlCESQeLtERslHkb5MN2phSkoRW77aP8LFKeD13IyjEHZSRW8knwGdpp57M%3D) Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cd6204214fe444b1ad2662bf0f9d636f&_e=b4ByiORO4g9zrnvHLd0NkSkVYk5kAnNJqMYnxNYNRceoxvpx7jBo1vIlMACTd7cKAOeurDMqGibOur16ZQQpK3PoBP3SK0oyJnZfSj2K4al5WHtUHslng-Qz5eIYiiKtz-OSzAYjYBeUgmGZ8GtS4Br3tv9PaA8iykaxJa8VBqEOJ9YMHeX84eszl0gRv8K441dZtLJ6ruCWh-MspAG1NqH-ReBhwlzDmOx59Len4Chb1rn0WsUzu3tYDhvqMHb06FxXld9rivZpCQqN7z1WBqfC5E4SXG4SlcoW19docP7sgVzuy2T4mYFuR2Y87q5m6BntIjSZIcy2zJmM3eC5A1OPH3Yq_3nVWfYeOOQHlXACxY5pXdpJlA0KTSml1wlxT6sk59JXGEs-KBVGIqZjKQeBmn2-uIPhEQJ_IgQw2Y8%3D)**

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Bob Lorinser
subject: Help Us Defeat Jack Bergman and Fight for Northern Michigan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
RUSH A CONTRIBUTION [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Friend,
Let's be honest, the current political fundraising system is morally defunct. It forces politicians to rely on donations to get elected, favoring the privileged while hardworking individuals struggle paycheck to paycheck.
But the reality is, to defeat GOP MAGA extremist Jack Bergman and his policies that aren't helping people, we need to fuel our campaign. We need to amplify our message across Northern Michigan and save money for a better future.
For four decades, my life's mission has been helping people in Northern Michigan.
As a dedicated physician, I've witnessed our community's struggles with healthcare, education, housing, and childcare. These aren't just talking points for me; they are the very issues I've dedicated my career to addressing.
I firmly believe that quality healthcare should be accessible to all, regardless of income or pre-existing conditions. Our education system needs proper funding to provide equal opportunities for every child. Safe and affordable housing should be a basic right, not a luxury. And reliable childcare is crucial for working families, who are the backbone of our community.
But we can't achieve these goals alone. We need your support and the support of others who believe in our vision for Northern Michigan. Your contribution, no matter the size, will help us maintain momentum going into the third quarter. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob] Together, we can make a tangible difference in the lives of our fellow citizens.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Democrats in Michigan are on a role, and we need to keep that momentum going throughout the entire Congressional district. We must remain united, stay on course, and keep pushing forward, fighting for a brighter and more equitable future.
Join us in this fight. Donate today [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob] and help us defeat Jack Bergman and his harmful policies. Together, we will build a Northern Michigan that works for everyone and leaves no one behind.
Thank you for your unwavering support.
Sincerely,
Bob Lorinser

name: Navy SEALs for Congress
subject: Breaking News SEAL Team 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ZINKE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Another Navy SEAL steps up to Save America

| |
---
| | |
During my time as a U.S. Navy SEAL one of my favorite assignments was Commanding Officer of BUDS. I was in charge of training prospective SEALs, putting the wanna-be frogmen through the toughest training on the planet, weeding them out during Hell Week, and pushing them to their mental and physical limits. **Most of them broke. The ones who Never Quit became SEALs. **

Let me tell you: _**Recruitment is everything. Today we landed a HUGE recruit for Montana. **_

Let me introduce you to U.S. Navy SEAL, Purple Heart recipient, successful businessman, wildland firefighter, husband, father, and a True America First Patriot - **Tim Sheehy. **

In 2015 I had the honor of pinning Tim's Bronze Star and Purple Heart and today I have the honor of endorsing him to be Montana's next US Senator.

---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2d1760f30cea46b082238c05a0ac1b21&_e=E_nsTPo_hIX-A-XPttRqRqcsAEQApIS1UChRr1cEEjGltp3_G8keHYaeAvbkGBqPRdmsRfnfGm6jATgTJJNVYDIi6KedBlVJPiyoxzhqjRUAjJHv93q5z45fLqF8DG5JrOabocMe7_nosAb2xvTQCcKc4PzOPWUn8cQCLGNgAJhJVFgSuykqL_waB_RswJ4FD7ZE3jRqd7zP0SD9mVATqQLaiH2cakv3UDq7H7bZWT67noaOieggZlAuy6b2RKkr46Gfd3vTS_9WMnpGPrsvLNkK3lwYpD1URMs4CNeINo4uQvNRDx7kcIwqWYhbxfb_USQ2QroGTJiTpXcSQm8IqC8GX6RrrEYwOJDBH98-vKlUNxLlB_gWEjV32zPOYJ21yqfHq9HDfiEHOjLbTiPy4InecdwSSCkhK0yZPyKk3jX3RxRNwLIcHh8Xc2FQVq_Q8rl8ZwmoJDsAqNujPjwZppADF3aC4LWC7Dg4tZm6Cx0%3D)
---

Montana's left wing Senator Jon Tester is up for re-election. He has millions of dollars, a dark money super PAC, and the liberal machine eager to throw the race in his favor.

Tim is the warrior we need who can put old Jon out to pasture, flip the senate, and get rid of Chuck Schumer once and for all. But he needs the ammo. **[Can you make a donation now?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2d1760f30cea46b082238c05a0ac1b21&_e=E_nsTPo_hIX-A-XPttRqRqcsAEQApIS1UChRr1cEEjGltp3_G8keHYaeAvbkGBqPRdmsRfnfGm6jATgTJJNVYDIi6KedBlVJPiyoxzhqjRUAjJHv93q5z45fLqF8DG5JrOabocMe7_nosAb2xvTQCcKc4PzOPWUn8cQCLGNgAJhJVFgSuykqL_waB_RswJ4FD7ZE3jRqd7zP0SD9mVATqQLaiH2cakv3UDq7H7bZWT67noaOieggZlAuy6b2RKkr46Gfd3vTS_9WMnpGPrsvLNkK3lwYpD1URMs4CNeINo4uQvNRDx7kcIwqWYhbxfb_USQ2QroGTJiTpXcSQm8IqAtiz6JNnBS4zdlWqDld3BSY7DSlplS5wKMiqQzHM5WVCJrcfyaf_He8XNpRxXdGkIHYIaIimvas8ZwAXSZpqdd8E1cjMEFrvvmCMxaKm2ChyGjp2Tl3nCVYhiMUF9qCYs-PAXqZX9k6ycNDykqJ9QM%3D " Can you make a donation now? I was in charge of training prospective SEALs, putting the wanna-be frogmen through the toughest training on the planet, weeding them out during Hell Week, and pushing them to their mental and physical limits. Most of them broke. The ones who Never Quit became SEALs. Let me tell you: Recruitment is everything. Today we landed a HUGE recruit for Montana. Let me introduce you to U.S. Navy SEAL, Purple Heart recipient, successful businessman, wildland firefighter, husband, father, and a True America First Patriot - Tim Sheehy. subject: Teamsters Endorse Dave Min for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dave Min for Congress 2024**
body:
Just After Poll Shows Min In Strong Position To Win General Election, Intl. Brotherhood of Teamsters Join Min’s Impressive Coalition Of Support | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/fd95153ef19e/teamsters-endorse-dave-min-for-congress-15658304?e=7017cc100e)
---
| |
---
| | **For Immediate Release:** July 6, 2023
**Contact:**[press@davemin.com](mailto:press@davemin.com) **Teamsters Endorse Dave Min for Congress** _Just After Poll Shows Min In Strong Position To Win General Election, The International Brotherhood of Teamsters Join Min’s Impressive Coalition Of Support_ **IRVINE, CA** — Today, the International Brotherhood of Teamsters District Joint Council 42, which represents nearly 250,000 working and retired members in Southern California, endorsed Dave Min for Congress in California’s 47th Congressional District. The announcement comes a few weeks after a [Public Policy Polling](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=23cd7cc50d&e=7017cc100e) poll showed Min with a commanding lead against his likely Republican opponent in the 2024 General Election. The Teamsters join over 125 local, state, and federal leaders, The California Federation of Teachers, police officers, SEIU , and the Congressional Asian Pacific Islander Caucus’ ASPIRE PAC in endorsing Min’s run for Congress.
“**Dave's record as a state senator on behalf of working people, fighting corruption, and providing a level playing field for all citizens earned him the Teamsters' unanimous backing of the Union's political coordinators** ,” said Chris Griswold, President of Teamsters Joint Council 42. “**He is a candidate that we are looking forward to helping send to Washington**.”
Teamsters Joint Council 42 represents workers across a variety of fields, including truckers, construction workers, airline employees, food manufacturers, and port and rail employees. Their early endorsement adds to Min’s broad coalition. Just since announcing his candidacy in late January, Min’s campaign has been endorsed by incumbent Congresswoman Katie Porter, as well as over 125 local, state, and federal officials, including California Lt. Governor Eleni Kounalakis, Attorney General Rob Bonta, Superintendent of Public Instruction Tony Thurmond, Treasurer Fiona Ma, Insurance Commissioner Ricardo Lara,, AAPI Victory Fund, Asian American Action Fund, the Asian American and Pacific Islander Congressional Caucus’s ASPIRE PAC, which represents 21 members of Congress, and many others. A full endorsement list is available[ here](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=b8c4ff5114&e=7017cc100e). Senator Min, the only Korean-American in the state legislature, serves as Chair of the Senate Natural Resources and Water Committee and as Senate Vice Chair of the Asian and Pacific Islander Legislative Caucus. Min, who was formerly a law professor at UC Irvine School of Law and has three children in Irvine public schools, also serves on the Senate’s Budget Subcommittee for Education, which oversees all budget funding for California’s public schools, community colleges, the California State University system, and the University of California system. Min has proven himself an incredibly effective legislative leader in the Senate, authoring 16 bills signed into law by the Governor, including leading legislation on [hate crimes](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=bbc2d007cb&e=7017cc100e), [gun violence prevention](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=2f208f6dc0&e=7017cc100e), family safety, and [women’s reproductive rights](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=adeda68dc3&e=7017cc100e), and procuring over $70 million in direct appropriations for priorities in his district, including for fire response, parks and open spaces, and climate innovation. In the wake of the 2021 Huntington Beach Oil Spill, he stood up to the oil industry and led efforts to end [offshore drilling](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=f0eeee1522&e=7017cc100e). Min sits on two key environmental committees, chairing the Natural Resources and Water Committee and serving on the Energy and Utilities Committee, as well as the Budget Committee, the Budget Subcommittee for Education, the Judiciary Committee, and the Banking and Financial Institutions Committee. Senator Min previously served as Chair of the Select Committee on Cybersecurity. Before entering the State Senate, Min was a law professor at UC Irvine, where he taught and researched in the area of business law. He resides with his wife Jane Stoever, a UC Irvine law professor who specializes in domestic violence and family law, and their three children in Irvine. Dave is a native Californian, a product of California public schools who graduated from the Wharton School and Harvard Law School, and an Eagle Scout.
_#####

California’s 47th is an open Congressional District in Orange County that includes the Cities of Costa Mesa, Huntington Beach, Irvine, Newport Beach, and Seal Beach, and portions of Laguna Beach, Laguna Hills, and Laguna Woods. Incumbent Katie Porter is vacating the seat to run for U.S. Senate. In 2022, Porter defeated former Assemblymember Republican Scott Baugh by 3.44% in this “toss-up” district. State Senator Dave Min currently represents over 80% of Congressional District 47 in Sacramento. In 2020, Min received over 158,000 votes within CA-47, defeating incumbent John Moorlach by 5.15% in this area. 19% of the registered voters in CA-47 are of Asian and Pacific Islander descent, including one of the largest Korean-American populations in the country._
---
| |
---
| | | | | | | **Paid for by Dave Min for Congress 2024**
PO Box 5959 Irvine, CA 92616
---

You can [update your preferences](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/profile?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=700e70ffe1&e=7017cc100e&c=8e10ff4d57) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=700e70ffe1&e=7017cc100e&c=8e10ff4d57).

body:
Let’s put pressure on Evers.
| [](https://links.wisconsinrepublicanparty.com/u/click?_t=d8e9586dc433414d81114a9282924d1e&_m=1eee92e4f836489c8a1a21dd6074497e&_e=UvpXDUVVuuS2ajDyMLOMiwHL457t7k3bcnpmzyWfSnVqlJR-6gwkWDh9zENVJTse0w3-9h5PfoV120QSs_0kHuguseuo5WFYawIlJoIxVQ6saJIAtJ1hyI-j_MnIqF8V4S2sM7Gc0MKXgL-H3sr1X7NyF76y3pkM_xOrZ2r9piT33GQ1WfJ7mSN6biwIALp7vJYTNYTHMl6DkX6jujj6MrUgc3MOKZ0zC8TEsbUvYC5tH87Nkm0XSe341w6cM9JirSUW9nUbU4afwKrNYUtj1EPNv1RP6U8-S7HUDez9csAx7c-0zl4Q8FEdb-qwfA14a-SNhJVMKQflu1MNTZTuKnfuccwtlJF7OXNp7JLP_fk%3D)

Friend,
---
Wisconsin Republicans followed through with their promise to rebuild Wisconsin’s economy when they sent a new two-year spending plan to Democratic Governor Tony Evers’ desk.
---
But just yesterday, Evers signed the budget – **with more than 50 line-item vetoes**.
---
_He has used his veto power to eliminate the plan to cut income taxes across the board and has increased Wisconsin homeowner's property taxes for the next 4 centuries._
---
**All parts of the Left’s radical agenda that has failed Wisconsinites over the past few years.**
---
We must not back down from pushing back against these vetoes for the betterment of our great state.
---
That’s why we need your support by signing our petition.
---
[**Please add your name to our official petition to show your support as we push back against these vetoes to END Evers’ and the Left’s failing agenda and rebuild our economy.**](https://links.wisconsinrepublicanparty.com/u/click?_t=d8e9586dc433414d81114a9282924d1e&_m=1eee92e4f836489c8a1a21dd6074497e&_e=UvpXDUVVuuS2ajDyMLOMiwHL457t7k3bcnpmzyWfSnVqlJR-6gwkWDh9zENVJTse0w3-9h5PfoV120QSs_0kHuguseuo5WFYawIlJoIxVQ6saJIAtJ1hyI-j_MnIqF8V4S2sM7Gc0MKXgL-H3sr1X7NyF76y3pkM_xOrZ2r9piT33GQ1WfJ7mSN6biwIALp7vJYTNYTHMl6DkX6jujj6MhNxymcHPUkUtjbkqBtMWeCftFmKZ8vkoDKWhwcfEIU1hCgExoHE96S6faeJXmJ0xgxVVjT_0n1lv2o30h_zBNIFoHkllKdU_yZfmUPGit4InhuwhErN8GlU6ECbtqVWdhhLbCg_3DSl28M1cV4I258%3D)
---

[ADD YOUR NAME](https://links.wisconsinrepublicanparty.com/u/click?_t=d8e9586dc433414d81114a9282924d1e&_m=1eee92e4f836489c8a1a21dd6074497e&_e=UvpXDUVVuuS2ajDyMLOMiwHL457t7k3bcnpmzyWfSnVqlJR-6gwkWDh9zENVJTse0w3-9h5PfoV120QSs_0kHuguseuo5WFYawIlJoIxVQ6saJIAtJ1hyI-j_MnIqF8V4S2sM7Gc0MKXgL-H3sr1X7NyF76y3pkM_xOrZ2r9piT33GQ1WfJ7mSN6biwIALp7vJYTNYTHMl6DkX6jujj6Mi-fZ1CduAUZjpEYAix8Dehk5oOqfRO77c3GrjRtIGi_FZS3C8Nz4kks-yXaLdy6pwwxpv83Kxv0Tp0vI7UhtAqihfM-M-OaZuwchDZJhvPl7AVmoeSoWHU5MNVCHx17bYtXr-H1xU9xQpWmnDbrqFs%3D)
---

For the last few months, Republicans have worked tirelessly to block Evers’ liberal tax and spending agenda.
---
Yet he used his veto authority to go against what Wisconsinites want and need in favor of reckless spending and increased taxes.
---
He supported his choices with a statement claiming that the past four years have been spent making “smart, strategic investments — and our economy shows it.”
---
_It seems that like most Democrats, Evers is living in his own world as Wisconsinites suffer and voters' top concern remains our failing economy._
---
**We can no longer stand idly by while Evers and the Left focus on their liberal spending agenda and further destroy our economy, state, and country.**
---
But with your help, we can succeed in FIGHTING BACK.
---
[**So please, add your name to our official petition to show your support as we push back against these vetoes to END Evers’ and the Left’s failing agenda and rebuild our economy.**](https://links.wisconsinrepublicanparty.com/u/click?_t=d8e9586dc433414d81114a9282924d1e&_m=1eee92e4f836489c8a1a21dd6074497e&_e=UvpXDUVVuuS2ajDyMLOMiwHL457t7k3bcnpmzyWfSnVqlJR-6gwkWDh9zENVJTse0w3-9h5PfoV120QSs_0kHuguseuo5WFYawIlJoIxVQ6saJIAtJ1hyI-j_MnIqF8V4S2sM7Gc0MKXgL-H3sr1X7NyF76y3pkM_xOrZ2r9piT33GQ1WfJ7mSN6biwIALp7vJYTNYTHMl6DkX6jujj6MjD-mM7GDbGYlzR_eriPEyE9r3Lmd2bgiJYK24AqsBCybLZQjlI9u05eFQZQvmuUWUfoY6LwD2ujFcIDr9AUo1qhLGi-gn0XuH81bUymR2NDyHrpCz-CighvPEWj3e8wnzvJ4F_W6wjo2nc6JEq4P6k%3D)

But just yesterday, Evers signed the budget – with more than 50 line-item vetoes. He has used his veto power to eliminate the plan to cut income taxes across the board and has increased Wisconsin homeowner's property taxes for the next 4 centuries. All parts of the Left’s radical agenda that has failed Wisconsinites over the past few years. We must not back down from pushing back against these vetoes for the betterment of our great state. That’s why we need your support by signing our petition. For the last few months, Republicans have worked tirelessly to block Evers’ liberal tax and spending agenda. Yet he used his veto authority to go against what Wisconsinites want and need in favor of reckless spending and increased taxes. He supported his choices with a statement claiming that the past four years have been spent making “smart, strategic investments — and our economy shows it.” It seems that like most Democrats, Evers is living in his own world as Wisconsinites suffer and voters' top concern remains our failing economy. We can no longer stand idly by while Evers and the Left focus on their liberal spending agenda and further destroy our economy, state, and country. But with your help, we can succeed in FIGHTING BACK. Thank you, Wisconsin Republicans Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. www.wisgop.org 148 E Johnson Street, Madison, WI 53703

name: Dawn Moore
subject: My promise-keeper
body:
I wanted to share a little bit about being married to Wes for 16 years... | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66062283/415222321/1636706682?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230706anniversary_dm_180da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGU0M2FiOS0xZTFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dyjfKOFACUVAQ5gf6abPREA2dW-NDT2aKlxR9I1oWJM=)
---
Hi team,
Today, I feel beyond blessed to be **celebrating 16 years married** to one of the greatest men I've ever known – my husband Wes.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66062287/415222356/1636706682?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230706anniversary_dm_180da_xx_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGU0M2FiOS0xZTFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dyjfKOFACUVAQ5gf6abPREA2dW-NDT2aKlxR9I1oWJM=)
---
Wes and I say our meeting was "the best blind date of our lives." Our aunts and family friends thought we'd make a good couple and... suffice it to say, they were right.
Our first date started out as coffee. Then coffee turned to dinner. Then dinner turned into dancing. And one magical date turned into a relationship.
Before we knew it, Wes was getting ready to deploy to Afghanistan. I hosted a gathering with all our friends and family to make sure he felt enveloped by love before he left. And then he started giving this speech about how he had been directionless and how I was his compass... I felt so confused because this was supposed to be a party for him! Why was he talking about me?
I quite literally lost my breath as he dropped to one knee and asked me to marry him.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66062292/415222360/1636706682?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230706anniversary_dm_180da_xx_img2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGU0M2FiOS0xZTFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dyjfKOFACUVAQ5gf6abPREA2dW-NDT2aKlxR9I1oWJM=)
---
Since then, our life has been full of highs and lows. We've been blessed with two amazing kids – Mia and James. We've also made it through Wes's deployment to Afghanistan, my multiple sclerosis diagnosis, and losing beloved family members like Mama Win. We stuck together through a grueling campaign last year and now are so proud to be serving this amazing state.
**Through every bit of it, Wes has always been my promise-keeper.**
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66062296/415222364/1636706682?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230706anniversary_dm_180da_xx_img3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGU0M2FiOS0xZTFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dyjfKOFACUVAQ5gf6abPREA2dW-NDT2aKlxR9I1oWJM=)
---
That's why when he told me he wanted to run for governor, I knew he'd be amazing at the job. I knew I married a public servant. And just like he's kept his promises to me – I see how he's delivering on the campaign promises he made, too.
Today, I'm celebrating 16 years of being with a partner who makes my heart beat a little faster, my laugh a little harder, my sleep a little more sound, and my life so much fuller.
Thank you – to all of you – for your support of Wes, me, and our family,
Dawn Moore
Wife, mother, and first lady of Maryland
[P.S. While Wes and I are celebrating today, I certainly wouldn't mind being able to tell him we raised a little money to make sure we keep building a Maryland where no one is left behind.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66062301/415222370/1636706682?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230706anniversary_dm_180da_xx_ps&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGU0M2FiOS0xZTFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dyjfKOFACUVAQ5gf6abPREA2dW-NDT2aKlxR9I1oWJM=)

| Wes Moore is a combat veteran, Rhodes Scholar, former small business owner, and leader of one of the nation’s largest poverty-fighting organizations — and now, your governor! Thanks to supporters like you, we made history by electing Wes the 63rd Governor of Maryland. Support Wes as he works to move our state forward and leave no one behind.
---

clean_body: I wanted to share a little bit about being married to Wes for 16 years... | | = Hi team, Today, I feel beyond blessed to be celebrating 16 years married to one of the greatest men I've ever known – my husband Wes. = Wes and I say our meeting was "the best blind date of our lives." Our aunts and family friends thought we'd make a good couple and... suffice it to say, they were right. Our first date started out as coffee. Then coffee turned to dinner. Then dinner turned into dancing. And one magical date turned into a relationship. Before we knew it, Wes was getting ready to deploy to Afghanistan. I hosted a gathering with all our friends and family to make sure he felt enveloped by love before he left. And then he started giving this speech about how he had been directionless and how I was his compass... I felt so confused because this was supposed to be a party for him! Why was he talking about me? I quite literally lost my breath as he dropped to one knee and asked me to marry him. = Since then, our life has been full of highs and lows. We've been blessed with two amazing kids – Mia and James. We've also made it through Wes's deployment to Afghanistan, my multiple sclerosis diagnosis, and losing beloved family members like Mama Win. We stuck together through a grueling campaign last year and now are so proud to be serving this amazing state. Through every bit of it, Wes has always been my promise-keeper. = That's why when he told me he wanted to run for governor, I knew he'd be amazing at the job. I knew I married a public servant. And just like he's kept his promises to me – I see how he's delivering on the campaign promises he made, too. Today, I'm celebrating 16 years of being with a partner who makes my heart beat a little faster, my laugh a little harder, my sleep a little more sound, and my life so much fuller. Thank you – to all of you – for your support of Wes, me, and our family, Dawn Moore Wife, mother, and first lady of Maryland = | Wes Moore is a combat veteran, Rhodes Scholar, former small business owner, and leader of one of the nation’s largest poverty-fighting organizations — and now, your governor! Thanks to supporters like you, we made history by electing Wes the 63rd Governor of Maryland. Support Wes as he works to move our state forward and leave no one behind. | = Use of military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense. | By Authority: Wes Moore for Maryland, Mary Tydings, Treasurer Wes Moore for Maryland PO Box 50123 Baltimore, MD 21211 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

body:
One of the most crucial offices open in 2023 is on the Pennsylvania Supreme Court.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66062599/415223502/2096228750?refcode=EM_FR_230706VRSC_N_TEAM_90DO_7_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA5NTQ1MDBjLTFmMWMtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MQASBXXw5lJOwoW6IAhvfci6ts0edeRfA1GrIZCBvgo=)
| Fellow activist,

There are just two State Supreme Court elections across the country in 2023, and one of them is already over.

Despite ending in early April, Wisconsin turned into **_the most expensive state judicial election in U.S. history._**

**Now, it’s Pennsylvania’s turn to fill an empty seat on our own State Supreme Court.**

**[Just two years ago, a Republican won PA’s 2021 State Supreme Court Election by less than 25,000 votes. Clearly, every vote will count in 2023. Can you chip in $10 right away to help us register and engage Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth for this important election?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66062600/415223503/2096228750?refcode=EM_FR_230706VRSC_N_TEAM_90DO_7_NG_N_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA5NTQ1MDBjLTFmMWMtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MQASBXXw5lJOwoW6IAhvfci6ts0edeRfA1GrIZCBvgo=)** [DONATE ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66062601/415223504/2096228750?refcode=EM_FR_230706VRSC_N_TEAM_90DO_7_NG_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA5NTQ1MDBjLTFmMWMtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MQASBXXw5lJOwoW6IAhvfci6ts0edeRfA1GrIZCBvgo=) This competitive election could impact fundamental rights in the Commonwealth for a decade to come.

Our freedom to vote is at the top of the list among the rights under attack. In a split decision that would have been prevented by just one more pro-democracy Justice, our current six justices disenfranchised thousands of mostly Democratic voters in the 2022 elections.

With local extremists ramping up their attacks on the LGBTQ+ community, especially children, we must also be prepared for their rights to come before the courts. Given the state of the federal judiciary and the U.S. Supreme Court, a progressive State Supreme Court could be the last line of defense.

And while Pennsylvanians’ abortion rights are not under imminent threat, we must not underestimate the importance of electing a State Supreme Court that will stand up for abortion access.

**[Fellow activist, we can’t afford to wait on the sidelines until November or even 2024 to mobilize in defense of our rights and freedoms. Will you pitch in $10 right now to support our year-round voter engagement and civic education across the Commonwealth?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66062602/415223505/2096228750?refcode=EM_FR_230706VRSC_N_TEAM_90DO_7_NG_N_L2&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA5NTQ1MDBjLTFmMWMtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MQASBXXw5lJOwoW6IAhvfci6ts0edeRfA1GrIZCBvgo=)** name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Can I share something with you?
body:
this is personal...
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T18fb6c51-c0ef-4a29-bb86-11f38fe0f5d4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | I’m used to being written off, Peter. When I first ran for Congress in Wisconsin in 1997, no one thought I could win — especially when an extremely popular challenger jumped into the race. I remember huddling with one of my staffers at the time, and she said, “Well Tammy, maybe you want to rethink what you’re doing because it’s going to be tough.” I looked her right in the eye and asked, “Do you think I should wait my turn?” The next thing I said was this: I believe that women have to run — especially when it’s hard — and not wait our turn. We can’t wait until we get a tap on our shoulder or we’ll never get anywhere. I ended up winning that race and became the very first woman elected to the House of Representatives from Wisconsin. And it wouldn’t be the last time our team would make history. When I ran for U.S. Senate in 2012, an incredible team of grassroots supporters like you fought alongside me — even as some people wrote us off. You helped me become the first woman elected to the chamber from our state and the first openly gay Senator in our nation’s history. In 2018, despite being a top target for national Republicans and enduring over a year of attacks, you stood with me again, and we won. Time and again, grassroots supporters like you have defied the odds. The battle to protect this seat in 2024 will be no different, and it will require all of us working together to overcome the millions of dollars right-wing mega-donors will spend to defeat us and hand the Senate majority over to Mitch McConnell. [Together, I know we can defy the odds once again. So Peter, I’m humbly asking: Will you help us protect this seat and the Senate majority with it by splitting a donation today between my campaign in Wisconsin and Blue Amp Action? ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T37064839-d08b-4149-bece-546a37bf0174/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T059e322c-fba5-4cb0-9563-e0e2917e421c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Your support has made all the difference time and time again, and I can’t thank you enough for that. I’m so glad to have you on this historic team. — Tammy
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2b7e5917-8ea0-49f7-943a-7e7aec202815/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com

clean_body: = Hey there, Peter! Listen, I hate to bother you again, but I gotta get real serious with you for a minute. Our friend Shawn is in a real tight spot with his campaign, and he needs your help more than ever. I'm reaching out directly because Shawn's crucial filing deadline is looming, and it's make-or-break time. Trust me, this is a big deal. = | = Okay, let's get down to brass tacks, Peter. If Shawn doesn't hit his target, things could go south real fast. He's up against a bunch of contenders, and it's a crowded field out there. That's why your support is crucial to give him that extra edge. Your grassroots donation can really strengthen Shawn's campaign. I genuinely believe Shawn is the real deal for Governor of Louisiana. He's a hard-working, honest, and dedicated public servant who's got this state's best interests at heart. He's got the skills and experience to lead Louisiana forward. But he can't do it alone – he needs your support to make it happen. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Thanks a bunch, James Carville | | = | = = Wilson for Louisiana P.O. Box 4572 Baton Rouge, LA 70821 Paid for by Wilson for Louisiana

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read

| | | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdr5r7o8kimu8upp83ucj0qq9nobm9aar76p0q00_rp22sh2s8i66o70sdjm9o31cph2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqcrh5s12ok4hdqlkupomhot8mci4iul0m29gmm0_rp22sh2s8i66o70sdjm9o31cph2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdcap2hqrl60ulgrejtj53p5b6k4np65nj1qrhug_rp22sh2s8i66o70sdjm9o31cph2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn3500aqp2sgap7vk0tt699ukapremlk8eo9k5qo_rp22sh2s8i66o70sdjm9o31cph2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Trump Train News
---

body:

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Will you renew your membership for the 4th consecutive year?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This is your LAST chance.

|
---
| | | |
---

**Are you there? I still haven 't heard back from you...**

Friend,

It's Kevin McCarthy. Because you are one of our _**TOP**_ patriots, I am giving you _**one last chance**_ to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership and confirm you are a patriot willing to fight for the future of our country. **[Will you please confirm before the deadline passes?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc3o9hglg6rkgogqlkd1uirrcio2p72hedq7b9rg_rp22sh2s8i66o70sdjm9p72c5h2bs "Will you please confirm before the deadline passes?")**

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztm3cpf6tmi9psretlssbf8g36i1ncfpvd0jpau0_rp22sh2s8i66o70sdjm9p72c5h2bs)
---
| | | [RENEW MY MEMBERSHIP](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0mfvn8cgm8b1goa473m3u2nt4ne2rck2ieqhtlo_rp22sh2s8i66o70sdjm9p72c5h2bs "Generic Button")
---
**Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a Republican Member for the 4th consecutive year, or have we lost your support for good?**

name: Tennessee Democratic Party
subject: Really, Marsha?
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66065914/415230704/1746233935?refcode=AU_TNDP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230706_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjYxZDI3Ni0yNTFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wCeuc0UU6s84dbuk3FUe_LS024qQQggIay_fAfAfXNs=)
---
But wait, Marsha, didn’t you vote AGAINST the _Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act?_ **Peter, we’re tired of the Republican hypocrisy.** They’ll stand in the way of bipartisan progress only to turn around and tout the successes that Democrats had to fight them tooth and nail to pass. [**Enough is enough, Peter. Will you make a $3 monthly contribution right now to help us unseat Marsha in 2024 and hold the razor-thin Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66065915/415230705/1746233935?recurring=yes&amount=3&refcode=AU_TNDP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230706_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjYxZDI3Ni0yNTFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wCeuc0UU6s84dbuk3FUe_LS024qQQggIay_fAfAfXNs=) | [CHIP IN $3 MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66065916/415230706/1746233935?recurring=yes&amount=3&refcode=AU_TNDP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230706_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjYxZDI3Ni0yNTFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wCeuc0UU6s84dbuk3FUe_LS024qQQggIay_fAfAfXNs=)
---
The GOP is committed to standing in the way of progress, regardless of whether or not it would make a difference in the lives of Tennesseans. They know what they’re doing and they don’t care, Peter. They’d rather hold onto status and power than come across the aisle to do what’s right for their constituents.
[**Help us send them packing in 2024 by making a $3 monthly contribution through Election Day.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66065917/415230707/1746233935?recurring=yes&amount=3&refcode=AU_TNDP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230706_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjYxZDI3Ni0yNTFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wCeuc0UU6s84dbuk3FUe_LS024qQQggIay_fAfAfXNs=)
— Tennessee Democratic Party
P.S. If now's not a good time to make a monthly contribution, we understand and appreciate your support at whatever level you're able to give. [**Click here to make a one-time contribution to support our work before August's special election.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66065918/415230708/1746233935?refcode=AU_TNDP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230706_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjYxZDI3Ni0yNTFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wCeuc0UU6s84dbuk3FUe_LS024qQQggIay_fAfAfXNs=)

name: Eddimae Tisdale
subject: Why Angela is the best choice for U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/3381?t=1008&amount=25&akid=237%2E52803%2EHXtSuH ][IMG]

Hello there, Peter!

My name is Eddimae Tisdale, and I’m proud to say I’m a super-volunteer!

Anyone who’s had the pleasure of speaking with Angela knows that her
favorite part of running for office is getting to talk with the folks
she’s working to represent.

This might be hard to believe, but when I met her that wasn’t the case.

I first met Angela nearly 15 years ago, before she ran for Prince George’s
State’s Attorney. If you can believe it, she was nervous about talking to
folks at a local fish fry.

But after I gave her a quick pep talk and a little encouragement, I saw
flashes of the charismatic leader she’s become since.

I’ve volunteered for every single one of Angela’s races, and I truly
believe that Angela is the best qualified candidate to represent Maryland
in the Senate.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/3381?t=1009&amount=25&akid=237%2E52803%2EHXtSuH ]Would you please consider joining me in supporting Angela’s campaign by
chipping in $25? Your support really means the world to her.

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/3381?t=1010&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=237%2E52803%2EHXtSuH ]Chip in $25
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/3381?t=1011&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=237%2E52803%2EHXtSuH ]Chip in $50
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/3381?t=1012&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=237%2E52803%2EHXtSuH ]Chip in $100
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/3381?t=1013&express_lane=true&amount=200&akid=237%2E52803%2EHXtSuH ]Chip in $200
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/3381?t=1014&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=237%2E52803%2EHXtSuH ]Chip in $250
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/3381?t=1015&amount=30&akid=237%2E52803%2EHXtSuH ]Other Amount

Thank you so much for supporting Angela,
Peter.

Hope we cross paths volunteering in this race!

Eddimae Tisdale

P.S. We’re going to need all hands on deck to win this competitive race.
You can join the team by volunteering here: [ https://alsobrooks.actionkit.com/signup/volunteer-form?t=1006&akid=237%2E52803%2EHXtSuH ]Sign up to Volunteer!

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/89?t=1001&akid=237%2E52803%2EHXtSuH ][IMG]

We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=1002&akid=237%2E52803%2EHXtSuH ]click here.
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/115?t=1003&akid=237%2E52803%2EHXtSuH ]Text JOIN to 74064 to receive SMS updates
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/91?t=1004&akid=237%2E52803%2EHXtSuH ]Chip in a one-time donation
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/92?t=1005&akid=237%2E52803%2EHXtSuH ]Chip in a monthly recurring donation!

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=237%2E52803%2EHXtSuH

Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
Alsobrooks for Senate
PO Box 6058
Largo, MD 20792

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read

| | | This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z2j609v761gqo9j0vjlm1l9a7nq25oklr3pupgio_rp22sh2s8i66o70sdge0o72c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z540ksl16dcmsvkq5qgobo3fc5oa2no9epagfebo_rp22sh2s8i66o70sdge0o72c5h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zhjne70s12qr3gsvsjcvtkmjehmps6rar2rn603o_rp22sh2s8i66o70sdge0o72c5h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z55e5bved86gkn5b73sqmpds7ms2ct1tmke416v0_rp22sh2s8i66o70sdge0o72c5h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Deroy Murdock
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: The spiral of our country ends now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
I am not accepting a woke America.
---
| | | | | | | | | | Please see a message from our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe, click [**here**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=c2c8636ad1aa479c9df9d6792b079b63&_t=3ZFnFHUYCOSUXaWCPRusNA8UMiqUww5NQ7zigVrWYb1uobLHEBdphFjehLia-YtOxwdqE18TZjJAHUm5uN29-K7sLhRDAQgXGZ7DTw-1J8E%3D)
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=c2c8636ad1aa479c9df9d6792b079b63&_e=tvd6WlDw2YpDrP2tGfeSWs3kCjlG43o5NswVMBekxwatkbVypOCrLD9wXP9n0nfD79-bUHTO11N2_Sr2wZ-B5-vZasWYZhDOPArwAFPvkujwx1nnj9n16hnTzKNqtV_aYpJAyAXScw4gDT8etkRhIC5GO2QUnLB2Sv8Am5GxpIQgWjuKuYSrUp92bQccIceB8zNK8ouvOckARtcQDoCN5pvmHnJGV_62SnB2Ylk7W2iWhAgJMSQ2oDpVHQZvyha0BVipvdADr9bhHGTYw6KuqaSGHiH2iXw4pOVOIbnZK9vNAHWTSiOZwta3JJQ19t4wovZpFWydbCGdzkEdM0vNaWU2EOQfK-LeSXkO1q8fuNtYGu__4DvF7gPpIRxOzNmoevMqh03pW8R77eMIhjYaew%3D%3D)
Peter, Over the past few years, I've watched our country spiral. Across the country, the Left has taken advantage of a weak executive and lit the fire of cultural Marxism. The fire has smoldered in our schools; it has smoldered in corporate boardrooms; it has smoldered in the halls of government. **Right now, America needs an energetic executive who has the will to fight back and WIN against the woke agenda that is infiltrating our businesses, military, and children 's schools. In Florida, we got it done and beat the woke agenda, it's time we do it for all of America. **
---
| | [DONATE TODAY TO DEFEAT THE WOKE MOB](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=c2c8636ad1aa479c9df9d6792b079b63&_e=tvd6WlDw2YpDrP2tGfeSWs3kCjlG43o5NswVMBekxwatkbVypOCrLD9wXP9n0nfD79-bUHTO11N2_Sr2wZ-B5-vZasWYZhDOPArwAFPvkujwx1nnj9n16hnTzKNqtV_aYpJAyAXScw4gDT8etkRhIC5GO2QUnLB2Sv8Am5GxpIQgWjuKuYSrUp92bQccIceB8zNK8ouvOckARtcQDoCN5pvmHnJGV_62SnB2Ylk7W2iWhAgJMSQ2oDpVHQZvyha07UTayxhAQJ4m4q1SXXb5i4-lcMVVUhOLtoSGCqvLp1GjNcggD935-o2Njm9h5dI73XYbGxh4gdUskh96ij1sSl_PyUIJ6rTVKEk5U1WfjdMS8GqNRZvYuGVVoWWFdCgaSY3qFi35O6x5CWmMwnarQQ%3D%3D)
---
Why do Joe Biden and the Left think it's common sense to salute the Pride Flag? Or fly it equal to our American Flag?

Why does the Left find it appropriate to applaud a group of topless transgender women on the White House lawn at a "family friendly event" where children were present? Why have our federal leaders stood idly by while American children and adults have been told by the woke mob that we must accept that men can get pregnant? __**Why is America accepting decline as a choice, when success is attainable**_**?**_
---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=c2c8636ad1aa479c9df9d6792b079b63&_e=tvd6WlDw2YpDrP2tGfeSWs3kCjlG43o5NswVMBekxwatkbVypOCrLD9wXP9n0nfD79-bUHTO11N2_Sr2wZ-B5-vZasWYZhDOPArwAFPvkujwx1nnj9n16hnTzKNqtV_aYpJAyAXScw4gDT8etkRhIC5GO2QUnLB2Sv8Am5GxpIQgWjuKuYSrUp92bQccIceB8zNK8ouvOckARtcQDoCN5pvmHnJGV_62SnB2Ylk7W2iWhAgJMSQ2oDpVHQZvyha0-B7FVYXejvUSommpY4NcEMY6FO35GgpLG5o-vJVAgio6M1kaUhy1AXUBrx-bU6vQO3IkiG3x-Ja0FByC6D2xMZsb3w5XA0d4UI98_Ytbdhpk0nhL7fsqnZhYUDBlbDAQCxaaqPxYSdahNrrcR--QLg%3D%3D)
---
Enough is enough. I think about why I entered this race and look, I've got kids, we want to leave America in a better place for the next generation than where we found it. _**When elected your next President, we will restore sanity to this nation, we will return normalcy to our communities, and we will reinstate integrity across institutions. No excuses.**_ The time is now and I need your support. I'm humbly asking for your support to show this country our momentum. _**[Please consider chipping in $10, $25, $47, or any other amount you can afford.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=c2c8636ad1aa479c9df9d6792b079b63&_e=tvd6WlDw2YpDrP2tGfeSWs3kCjlG43o5NswVMBekxwatkbVypOCrLD9wXP9n0nfD79-bUHTO11N2_Sr2wZ-B5-vZasWYZhDOPArwAFPvkujwx1nnj9n16hnTzKNqtV_aYpJAyAXScw4gDT8etkRhIC5GO2QUnLB2Sv8Am5GxpIQgWjuKuYSrUp92bQccIceB8zNK8ouvOckARtcQDoCN5pvmHnJGV_62SnB2Ylk7W2iWhAgJMSQ2oDpVHQZvyha0CrIEf8EmBQVOzwKTKUZVduUqAUHQ9fPkMCpfTE5wcm5E5rsogmbdNv1dHXUOQYZTvvz9-gqddkJH3HetcA4EG86gPqJI2TebPqbamusZFQgz2IVvX-C9u5cLfwiJamMdEIikH54ua9n9nE-ZeC7cNg%3D%3D "Please consider chipping in $10, $25, $47, or any other amount you can afford.")**_

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
