| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Dear Friend,
---
The church of Satan is working to build a stronghold here on Earth. We've seen them imitate Let Us Worship before, with their own, "Let Us Burn Tour." Now they are mocking our Kingdom to the Capitol Tour by holding "Unbaptisms" and "Gender-affirming rituals" at the Washington State capitol. \---Original Message---
Peter,
When Republicans are in disarray, what do they do to distract from their own chaos? **Attack Cori.**
As the first Black woman to represent Missouri in Congress, Cori has a deep understanding of America’s historical relationship to independence and equity. She understands the long term, generational impact felt by families of the formerly enslaved that continues today. That’s why she used July 4th to highlight her call for reparations with the facts of our nation’s founding.
**She was immediately attacked by Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene, the National Republican Senatorial Committee, and former Fox News host and right-wing media personality Megyn Kelly:**

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Final stage before digital money
body:
The end is near...

| **Final stage before digital money** [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0ucbk2p7s6a4kv55ckaji4ltlrcck4i0kg4pn78_rp22sh2s8i66o70sdge4or6chh2bs) The end is near... Our financial system is about to be transformed in a way that would've been unthinkable just a few years ago. And almost nobody is prepared for the chaos that follows. According to Bank of America, this overhaul is imminent - And Dr. Nomi Prins says the final stage begins in July, with the rollout of the FedNow system. To show you everything you need to know about the FedNow system - and to help you prepare - Dr. Prins has recorded a free presentation with all the details. It's controversial, but Nomi's interview is a must-watch for anyone with more than $2,500 in an American bank or retirement fund. **[Click here to find out what you need to do to prepare for this historic transformation.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z08pg1k8ugom60leteh4lh832i0uhnmkcdth35so_rp22sh2s8i66o70sdge4or6chh2bs)**

Peter, Greta’s running for Attorney General because she’s sick and tired of Mississippi coming in last for so many critical benchmarks. At a time when hospitals continue to close, our current AG is continuing attacks on healthcare access that limit patient care and cause doctors to leave for other states. As education suffers, our AG is using her platform to divert public funds towards private schools instead of investing in our students who need it most. And while the Supreme Court upholds racist, outdated voting laws that harm our democracy, our AG is doubling down by supporting efforts here in Mississippi to make it _even harder_ to vote.

We won’t see a change until we make a change, Peter, and that’s why we need your support.

[Mississippi is in a state of crisis, and our current AG has coasted through her term and ignored the folks who have needed her help most. Help us get a champion for the people in the Attorney General’s office by chipping in $10, $25, or another amount today:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66073847/415238062/-456841951?refcode=BEB_EM_230706BetterAG_l2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzNDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGUzOWIwYzUtMmIxYy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_5_JAsgxRu8BRA9W-qZ5MJ2N8UGGAv2T9JQOWHyo9F8=)
[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66073848/415238063/-456841951?refcode=BEB_EM_230706BetterAG_biobox&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzNDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGUzOWIwYzUtMmIxYy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_5_JAsgxRu8BRA9W-qZ5MJ2N8UGGAv2T9JQOWHyo9F8=)
We can’t do this without you – thank you for standing with us!

– Team Greta
Greta Kemp Martin was born, raised, and educated in Mississippi. She is an active member of the Mississippi Bar, and currently works as the Litigation Director for Disability Rights Mississippi, the protection and advocacy agency for the state. As Attorney General, Greta will fight for the rights of everyday Mississippians, and stand up for the working people of this state.

clean_body: Mississippi is in a state of crisis, and our current AG has coasted through her term and ignored the folks who have needed her help most = Peter, Greta has been hitting the pavement all across the state talking to folks about why Mississippians deserve better from our Attorney General. = Between continued attacks on reproductive freedom, attempts to undermine our voting rights, and unchecked corruption that directly harms families in need, it’s clear that we’re past due for a change in our leadership. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Peter, Greta’s running for Attorney General because she’s sick and tired of Mississippi coming in last for so many critical benchmarks. At a time when hospitals continue to close, our current AG is continuing attacks on healthcare access that limit patient care and cause doctors to leave for other states. As education suffers, our AG is using her platform to divert public funds towards private schools instead of investing in our students who need it most. And while the Supreme Court upholds racist, outdated voting laws that harm our democracy, our AG is doubling down by supporting efforts here in Mississippi to make it even harder to vote. We won’t see a change until we make a change, Peter, and that’s why we need your support. = = We can’t do this without you – thank you for standing with us! – Team Greta Greta Kemp Martin was born, raised, and educated in Mississippi. She is an active member of the Mississippi Bar, and currently works as the Litigation Director for Disability Rights Mississippi, the protection and advocacy agency for the state. As Attorney General, Greta will fight for the rights of everyday Mississippians, and stand up for the working people of this state. = Paid for by Greta Martin for AG Greta Kemp Martin for Attorney General PO BOX 16402 Jackson, MS 39236 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Zak Malamed
subject: The Supreme Court won't fight for our freedoms, so we have to
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
When my grandmother immigrated to the US from Israel, she was driven by the promise of a strong public education system that would allow her children to achieve the American Dream.
#
Hi there,
When my grandmother immigrated to the US from Israel, she was driven by the promise of a strong public education system that would allow her children to achieve the American Dream.
Inspired by her vision and determination, I began my career fighting for a more equitable education system because **I truly believe that every person has a right to strong public education and access to that same dream.**
Sadly, we saw last week that the Supreme Court’s conservative Justices do not hold these same beliefs. In just a few days, they delivered a gut punch to our progress with their decisions to strike down President Biden's proposal to forgive student loan debt for millions of borrowers and effectively end affirmative action in higher education.
Instead of moving our country forward, this radical Court continues to manipulate the Constitution to set our country back 50 years. As a member of Congress, I will do everything in my power to move our country into the next 50 — **but first, we have to win this consequential race.**
[**I will dive deeper into what the Supreme Court’s latest decisions mean for NY-03 and our race, but if I already have your support, can I count on your $5 today?** ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230706?refcode=em20230706&amount=5&refcode2=148_8507_gFIRSM&akid=148%2E8507%2EgFIRSM)
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230706?refcode=em20230706&amount=5&refcode2=148_8507_gFIRSM&akid=148%2E8507%2EgFIRSM)**
**After the Court’s disastrous decisions last week, it is undeniable that the American dream has been pushed further and further out of reach for far too many New Yorkers — especially here in NY-03.**
As someone who had tens of thousands of dollars in student loans, I know how much of a burden they are and delay — and even completely prevent — important life events like buying a home and starting a family. Under Biden’s proposed debt forgiveness plan, many residents of New York’s 3rd would have been freed from this burden.
It is clear that the Court’s naked political agenda and corruption must be stopped — and the best way to do that is by holding them accountable in Congress.
**But like I have said before, winning this race will not be easy.** Republicans are going to pour tons of money and resources into holding onto our district which means we have to do the same, if not more, in order to win.
[**So if you believe in our campaign to flip NY-03 and push for legislation and accountability that would make the American dream accessible and affordable for all, will you chip in $5 now?** ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230706?refcode=em20230706&amount=5&refcode2=148_8507_gFIRSM&akid=148%2E8507%2EgFIRSM)
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230706?amount=5&refcode=em20230706&refcode2=148_8507_gFIRSM&akid=148%2E8507%2EgFIRSM)**
In partnership,
Zak Malamed
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=148%2E8507%2EgFIRSM)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.zakforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=148%2E8507%2EgFIRSM)

To give by check:
Zak for Congress
PO Box 220421
Great Neck, NY 11022
Email us: [info@e.zakforcongress.com](mailto:info@e.zakforcongress.com)

name: Raja Krishnamoorthi
subject: personally asking, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
body:
[**_Peter, I’m about to pull back the curtain and explain the importance of grassroots donations, why your support is so critical to my campaign's success, and the future of the House Majority. I’d really appreciate if you’d read the whole thing — but if you’re short on time, will you chip in $15 before you sign off? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66075133/415241866/-1810142053?refcode=20230705_em_fr_b1_raja_30_flip&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzNjZWE2NS0yZjFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HINB7GDj3-cmTUwRq5OT4NDIZOTstPTKzwqeO1LZiR0=) Here’s the thing, Peter:

name: Senator Josh Hawley
subject: A slap in the face
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Fellow American, After several whistleblowers exposed the “investigations” into Hunter Biden’s blatant tax evasion as a sham, we’ve lost even more faith than we already had in the FBI, the IRS, and the Department of Justice under Joe Biden. **Hunter Biden getting away with these crimes just because his dad is in the White House is a slap in the face to every American who follows the law and pays their taxes.** _With Joe Biden and his family getting away with blatant corruption and criminal activity, the rule of law is eroding more and more every day in this country._ **It’s time to do something to restore law and order.** **[We’re not asking for money today, we just need your signature. Will you sign our petition DEMANDING accountability for Hunter Biden’s crimes today?](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=517276e44a7e4956b8c3f2407a798427&_e=G48Tn6x3cRxCgau_Xq4CUFVqRmpb0tDrjwID7Vznk-VUWBL7Ss-nJkKIhnTrbB4yeZEqW8NQmp03dTJxq3-87Ig2ouJkMM51-7q3dNSBqmWGhTZeY6hkBYeOjq7YDSH2AXvmMDySjDtoM2BkEfbktsWhB_b1oKwnCLDgMOJnKvxO1M7PukkoVGV7GtuHgm8SSK4-wrtc7IyxUkZWbZOVKtOngij1ILUc5f5OV_tD7aKAyMrAe0uK6bSuyP5u3QcRYcKUU0bSjsIaPdGFkhC1PbqX2ODvxvNmZ35AdS84gNAIF9E77a_FsyyvnSYHIKWOAZTSzl7sO0vpNIIiOFKshIHNJZeJHJmakKj5x4JVync78BxN5pYoF0T1wE6Hh_-aqYceyoADNecH-MmkKM7zSq6BpOyQzePrOz_oE3LYeD7M_JJKblOx6-rnp1dZLVrR6qG_-cjjhXn1dsDMB1qUNQ%3D%3D)**

---
Fellow American, America was founded on equal treatment under the law.

But in Joe Biden’s America, we have a two-tiered justice system: high-ranking Democrats and their friends can get away with anything, while conservatives are silenced and thrown behind bars.

_If our founding fathers could see our political system today, they’d be SHOCKED and HORRIFIED at what the Left is doing._

We need _every single patriot_ to step up if we’re going to take back our country and re-establish the rule of law, and that’s why we’re asking you to sign on today.

[**Please, sign our petition to hold Hunter Biden accountable NOW and DEMAND action for his crimes.**](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=517276e44a7e4956b8c3f2407a798427&_e=G48Tn6x3cRxCgau_Xq4CUFVqRmpb0tDrjwID7Vznk-VUWBL7Ss-nJkKIhnTrbB4yeZEqW8NQmp03dTJxq3-87Ig2ouJkMM51-7q3dNSBqmWGhTZeY6hkBYeOjq7YDSH2AXvmMDySjDtoM2BkEfbktsWhB_b1oKwnCLDgMOJnKvxO1M7PukkoVGV7GtuHgm8SSK4-wrtc7IyxUkZWbZOVKtOngij1ILUc5f5OV_tD7aKAyMrAe0uK6bSuyP5u3QcRYcKUU0bSjsIaPdGFkhC1PbqX2ODvxvNmZ35AdS84gNDZFcgxPBK_yBYOLabx06ZY15W8EG4JQoIfz1vofzsca3fc3rh-hrmdHIHkwQyRPpK_xpXmtumHSgUF5wRZhsTJKKR2QnIZfbzXHE8AexnShNh2JeDOkAtYSp31Q2cAI-IeVP3gVNiGZ-9YPVfAlSx-jFFP6qJkJISxDKH39U2pBg%3D%3D)

name: Ben Staton, COURIER
subject: Introducing COURIER’s latest newsroom…
body:
There’s a lot that goes into opening and establishing a new newsroom, and with the 2024 election coming up quickly, we have to start laying the groundwork now.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1206%2E120351%2ECzO3en)
Peter, Ben here — COURIER’s Finance Director. I’ve got some *really exciting* news for you...
**We have all the plans and details in place to open our latest newsroom:_The Nevadan_.**
These plans are coming together just in the nick of time since Nevada is set to be a key battleground state in the 2024 election. **There’s just one issue.**
[**Right now, we’re facing a $12,000 budget gap that we have to close in order to officially open our doors, hire talented local journalists, and start reaching Nevadans all across the state. Will you chip in $5 now to help us get _The Nevadan_ off the ground and grow our fight against bad information?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230706?refcode=em20230706&amount=5&refcode2=1206_120351_CzO3en&akid=1206%2E120351%2ECzO3en)
Peter, there are so many reasons we’re thrilled to be taking our fight against bad information to Nevada.
Democrat Jacky Rosen is considered one of the most vulnerable Senators up for reelection this cycle. You can be sure that this race will be close — _in 2022, Democratic Senator Catherine Cortez Masto won by only .9%._
And when it comes to the presidential election, polling and pundits are already suggesting Nevada could be a tricky toss-up.
All of these races will be vulnerable to the same kind of misinformation and voter intimidation that we saw in Nevada in 2022, with claims of election tampering and voter fraud.
There’s a lot that goes into opening and establishing a new newsroom, and with the 2024 election coming up quickly, we have to start laying the groundwork for _The Nevadan_ now.
[**But in order to do that, we have to close this $12,000 budget gap. Will you chip in $5 now to help us pull this off and get to work in Nevada?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230706?refcode=em20230706&amount=5&refcode2=1206_120351_CzO3en&akid=1206%2E120351%2ECzO3en)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230706?refcode=em20230706&amount=5&refcode2=1206_120351_CzO3en&akid=1206%2E120351%2ECzO3en)**
Thanks so much,
Ben Staton
_Finance Director_
_COURIER_
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=2&refcode2=1206_120351_CzO3en&akid=1206%2E120351%2ECzO3en)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1206%2E120351%2ECzO3en)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: I’m used to being written off
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Tammy Baldwin here. I’m the Democratic Senator from Wisconsin, and I’m up for re-election in 2024.
I’m used to being written off, Derek.
When I first ran for Congress in Wisconsin in 1997, no one thought I could win — especially when an extremely popular challenger jumped into the race.
I remember huddling with one of my staffers at the time, and she said, “Well Tammy, maybe you want to rethink what you’re doing because it’s going to be tough.”
I looked her right in the eye and asked, “Do you think I should wait my turn?”
The next thing I said was this: I believe that women have to run — especially when it’s hard — and not wait our turn. We can’t wait until we get a tap on our shoulder or we’ll never get anywhere.
**I ended up winning that race and became the very first woman elected to the House of Representatives from Wisconsin. And it wouldn’t be the last time our team would make history.**
When I ran for U.S. Senate in 2012, an incredible team of grassroots supporters like you fought alongside me — even as some people wrote us off. You helped me become the first woman elected to the chamber from our state and the first openly gay Senator in our nation’s history.
In 2018, despite being a top target for national Republicans and enduring over a year of attacks, you stood with me again, _and we won._
Time and again, grassroots supporters like you have defied the odds. The battle to protect this seat in 2024 will be no different, and it will require all of us working together to overcome the millions of dollars right-wing mega-donors will spend to defeat us and hand the Senate majority over to Mitch McConnell.
[**Together, I know we can defy the odds once again. So Derek, I’m humbly asking: Will you help us protect this seat and the Senate majority with it by splitting a donation today between my campaign in Wisconsin and Katie Porter?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230706-1?refcode=EMAJ06_1_SPL_20230706_V1_F&refcode2=26062_3422442_YLayWU&akid=26062%2E3422442%2EYLayWU)
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230706-1?refcode=EMAJ06_1_SPL_20230706_V1_F&refcode2=26062_3422442_YLayWU&akid=26062%2E3422442%2EYLayWU)**
Your support has made all the difference time and time again, and I can’t thank you enough for that.
I’m so glad to have you on this historic team.
— Tammy

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAJ06_1_SPL_20230706_V1_F&t=1&refcode2=26062_3422442_YLayWU&akid=26062%2E3422442%2EYLayWU)**

name: Senator Rick Scott
subject: The Democrats want me gone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC

subject: You need to see this

body:
| Republicans are looking at a pair of self-funders to take on Tammy.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=497%2E35263%2EKSC9cJ)
**Peter — _The Hill_ just ranked Wisconsin as one of the 5 most likely seats to flip in 2024. [Rush in a donation to help us defend this battleground seat and reelect Tammy.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jul23.xghWlz&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230706_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=497%2E35263%2EKSC9cJ)** | [DONATE NOW →](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jul23.xghWlz&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230706_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=497%2E35263%2EKSC9cJ)
---
This is the first time this cycle that _The Hill_ has ranked Tammy’s seat in their top 5 most likely seats to flip.
Republican candidates with massive personal wealth are considering jumping into the race — including one who said he’d spend **$15 to $20 million** out of his own pocket to defeat me.
This isn’t just shaping up to be Tammy’s most competitive race yet, _it could very well be her most expensive ever._
That’s why these early months are critical toward building up the resources it’ll take to fight back against the inevitable flood of GOP attacks and reelect Tammy next year.
**[Will you rush in a donation to help Tammy defend the Senate and keep Wisconsin blue in 2024? We can’t do this without you.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jul23.xghWlz&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230706_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=497%2E35263%2EKSC9cJ)**

name: Fair Fight Action (via Blue Amp Action)
subject: Fight back against restrictive voter ID laws
body:
Join the Movement Today!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2301a32b-6964-469c-b638-390684f20623/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | Peter, Extremists have turned to burdensome and restrictive voter ID mandates to silence already marginalized communities. These are tactics pulled straight from the voter suppression playbook, and it’s our duty to speak out as anti-voter extremists continue to push them. [**If you agree that voter ID laws are discriminatory, and if you support Fair Fight Action’s efforts to stop voter suppression tactics like this, add your name right away.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T06ee5e11-fc6e-4941-b335-811cfd0373b9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME NOW!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7c02f4b0-3be9-406d-bc66-23c77705539a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Peter, voter ID laws only started appearing in the past 20 years, as anti-voter extremists have schemed to devise new ways to block access to the ballot box. Today, there are 36 states with voter ID laws — opening the door for voter disenfranchisement. There’s no doubt that voter ID laws are a relic of the Jim Crow era. These restrictive voter ID laws disproportionately target and burden Black, brown, elderly, student, rural, and low-income voters. While anti-voter extremists often attempt to justify these laws with the claim that everyone has the necessary IDs, the fact is, a significant portion of eligible voters lack the IDs required. **Moreover, the racial turnout gap has grown in states that have passed anti-voting laws including strict voter ID laws. ** Fair Fight Action is committed to helping eligible voters make their voices heard, free from discriminatory practices like restrictive voter ID laws, but we need you in this fight. [**Will you add your name today to show that you strongly oppose burdensome voter ID laws?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T886106e9-76ec-4f30-9be0-8d1e9fe5f732/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [JOIN US!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb6f03ffc-df05-42aa-8bb9-4ceca1bdee14/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Thanks for taking action, The Fair Fight Action Team
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/baa_op_leftaction23070615?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2adb68f4-ea45-492d-90be-488361181f84/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=e9ba5471-a656-4519-b253-15456ced0694&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=e9ba5471-a656-4519-b253-15456ced0694&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

body:
Do you support President Biden’s student debt plan?
| **FIRST:** President Biden announced his historic student debt relief program — a HUGE step forward for millions of Americans!

**BUT THEN:** House Republicans ATTACKED Biden’s plan at every turn, _even if it meant holding the economy hostage!_

**AND NOW:** The MAGA majority on the Supreme Court just made our nightmares come true...they completely STOPPED student debt relief in its tracks. **It’s DESPICABLE!** **As one of the TOP Democrats in your area, we _need_ to know where you stand on this critical issue:**
[**Do you support President Biden’s Student Debt Relief? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/support_slf/?source=VPP_20230706_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC&t=6&akid=9024%2E878179%2Erzwt2J) | [ABSOLUTELY! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/support_slf/?source=VPP_20230706_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC&t=7&akid=9024%2E878179%2Erzwt2J)

President Biden’s student debt plan would provide immediate financial relief for millions of Americans, BOOSTING our national economy.

But the Supreme Court’s far-right justices are hell-bent on taking us backwards. **_We can’t sit back and let them get away with this!_**

Biden has made it clear that he’s NEVER giving up on this fight — so we need to demonstrate STRONG grassroots support for his plan right now!

Do you support President Biden’s Student Debt Relief? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/support_slf/?source=VPP_20230706_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC&t=10&akid=9024%2E878179%2Erzwt2J)

body:
In the wake of the shootings in Buffalo and Uvalde last year, we made unprecedented progress in the gun safety movement.
#

Friends -
In honor of one year since the passage of the _Bipartisan Safer Communities Act_ , we released a brand new video narrated by GIFFORDS Partner Padma Lakshmi. As a top supporter, we want you to be one of the first to see it.
[**Will you click here to watch our video and contribute $3 or any amount you can afford to GIFFORDS PAC today?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/22617?c0=giffords-em-july23-vid.TNk-F3&refcode=em230706-1-15&t=1&akid=6101%2E3935704%2EGa0XmA)

In the wake of the shootings in Buffalo and Uvalde last year, we made unprecedented progress in the gun safety movement. By drawing support from both Democrats and Republicans, we helped pass the _Bipartisan Safer Communities Act_ —the first major federal gun safety legislation passed in nearly 30 years.
We truly couldn’t have done it without you. Thank you.

This is the most dangerous time to be an America First patriot.

Why?

Because we are living under a two-tiered system of justice. Throw out all the stuff your civics teachers taught you in school. Currently, there are no fair trials when it comes to the government and its selective prosecution.

**_In a bombshell testimony from an IRS whistleblower, Hunter Biden sent WhatsApp messages demanding millions from a Chinese businessman_.** Hunter even went so far as to threaten the Chinese man that his father is sitting next to him and implied he would be angry unless paid.

None of this would be known unless it was for the brave whistleblowers who are coming forward to share this information. Friend, I founded the Kash Foundation to provide legal and financial support to whistleblowers after they bring forth credible information about waste, fraud, and abuse. My goal is to reclaim our government from the gangsters who weaponize our system of justice against America First patriots. Our mission is ramping up quickly as more and more whistleblowers are coming forward. I have an urgent goal to raise $53,000 in the next 48 hours to defend their brave actions. Whistleblowers risk their lives to expose the government gangster corrupting the Department of Justice and so any other agencies and departments. If you're a whistleblower, you are giving up your career. You are risking the financial livelihood of your family to expose the corruption. If you're a whistleblower, you can be hit with charges from the Department of Justice. And even if you're innocent, the process is the punishment! You will find yourselves paying thousands in legal fees. Without whistleblowers: We wouldn't know about Hunter's WhatsApp message. We wouldn't know about the corruption at the FBI. * We wouldn't know about the collusion happening between the FBI and IRS and the media to selectively suppress and leak information for political purposes. Our nation is going through a crisis. We can give up and allow our justice system to be used against us. Or we can fight back. I'm not one for giving up. And I hope you can join me. I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee under Rep. Nunes and uncovered that the FBI illegally sabotaged a presidential race. The Deep State spied on me while I was conducting this investigation because I exposed their unlawful conduct. I know what it's like to be targeted by government gangsters. I know how to fight back because I've successfully done this for the last several years exposing the Russiagate hoax. Now, I am counting on your help to expose the corrupt two-tiered system of justice. Thank you, Friend, Kash Patel The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible. Conservative Liberty Wire 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

body:
| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8Q7-GJx58Lmym7u1c4ZnBKH_d6CBjHPkQDLob5zr9Gnev0Ku4ps3mempiwanWQIP9G6c6PZzU4kesD3zsm8jUmKhLMPk2HXnPuOxAzUqtPmJltpS2xhZqxJS3PwYdrWH2M_Nkhj1oVjJvzYWbRayxHbpM5BUP-KDhOLwSDoxx2SwxO4IcSew83RkpVXh5fP8EKP6KmEQdaQ3PQnJwIc9dneRhECebPzvtcdp4qE_8JRuPWa6ly9EscGp6ictRgk-qtjJ9ZAXh6KE8KUvmZmlcEnxI2HguxTtvTMqPc04UfODS6tf9h-osFpIcb2e6ANtXw/3xn/l674l9OVRTyFy6q_0qtXVQ/h0/ZpAOelKgQxt1KWTL2thgjD1fatvye3ESYEEQF5UC89g)
| | Peter,

Sunday marked 59 years since the passage of the Civil Rights Act, which ended segregation in public places and banned employment discrimination, and led to other landmark civil rights bills like the 1965 Voting Rights Act, which outlaws voter discrimination, and the 1968 Fair Housing Act, outlawing housing discrimination.

But just days earlier, we saw Affirmative Action overturned for college admissions.**59 years later, and we can confirm race has and always WILL be a factor in the country built upon the constructs of white supremacy.**

This is why we fight to build Black political power and create a truly representative democracy — one that works for _all_ Americans —**and we hope you’ll agree with us when we say that this fight is more important than ever in 2023.**

[If you’re with us, will you chip in $10 right now? It makes all the difference and helps us fund Black democratic candidates across the country. ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x2n0vr6CP7mcVfNApeYaGAaEmUMRNRCF5LT2oQ3P8BaSF6G-GMHCbV7C0BoTjEAMevvfOFCkPFyFgncedQZWC5ZvZ-jQ_AGpa4qNZ1pNHJv4O6u2QSjSRI6B22CftCMzI9fZwm3dR1_lGtcGKp-cQElq67DB13Bof9HSx_ICKe2q0ChlPpo6egsyg-pHpwitAagZLgkkUUR4vfXpSv3Hz-WDbLhV9r26nOfJp7b6j50WyETf4y2s1Lg42Y_Rd7YQVjMnPR6h9KJCUvWCtCqqm4yoQjLZz4Sf_kAw5P5khL0W4cviwaY25soRVldmapUbaxEM8it9zy874zzOU5VnvioDN3yJdl9eihw16QIYySQ6lnTZFj2P-N-cock6TrE1KluctPXtTQhZTYQOE0LEBN/3xn/l674l9OVRTyFy6q_0qtXVQ/h1/Bpj17Shmni04UkutswYyQLmivSjySOw1hFDN6I-BbgU)

We leave you with the poignant words of Ketanji Brown Jackson from her dissent on the overturn of Affirmative Action:

[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x2n0vr6CP7mcVfNApeYaGAaEmUMRNRCF5LT2oQ3P8BaSF6G-GMHCbV7C0BoTjEAMevvfOFCkPFyFgncedQZWC5ZvZ-jQ_AGpa4qNZ1pNHJv4O6u2QSjSRI6B22CftCMzI9fZwm3dR1_lGtcGKp-cQElq67DB13Bof9HSx_ICKe2v9S1N74m0Pfu_VbnesoZcK-I-WAnRCs_rEGcs9TGJacDAEeCOwrvS5VQEQ1MJrhS3nc-DFMKoYMRnjsGl3eLGaxIzPP71QZ_xcbY-Px6iOUZnWV-fMNHA7IY2NNB08MfaHpcKlxCwSs8LWpDpL_1LQ8N8QqlBKC_DE2eexeoW5UhwceVrlNhQI5HJViq7gV5Tu7UPXVXsskoRmd1PJ21KcL_cKl7JrAzRTlmjoClZV-/3xn/l674l9OVRTyFy6q_0qtXVQ/h2/CYy3haQiD3pyynZFJpK2iaDVC66htkUv12Dp2h-WV90) We won't stop fighting.

The Collective PAC

* * *

[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5O3Wwmdygae0W-34efSvb_hfX51xtIkq_nCgr0tl8iRqUTOndcJRC4vm20WcsKLj2TykHfCjTeZk9MCfO7Tgsf1tPabYsDREhKrpWl-uTgf9PXB0st-GK_fhTBoE5BS5UyjbYzlDGVN05ELWvK2423OHmW6tz369oO1X94aGakQGtPMqsi7D8ic5qdyyLlZLPspqW9KBlY5xMUflldNMpXCXNVEt7B7FvvzZJgf-gRR2RUWdRRHUbvxigqWAf8A-XP-FPqQAKJZt5NRJebzGuYX43qYV6cDFeCwfQkzzZEOLfndaKLfS8Js9DruTVxnSL1mdIEEpRysR_6KPnEy0G9TkLpwo9uPb_6Q1MRJQLwoZDRlMHa8lUlU5xgUkMBYcwm8mSdxdFj_ZsRwEjsP6H/3xn/l674l9OVRTyFy6q_0qtXVQ/h3/k50RjfYVRjiPxxDuysO3eqsW0Ja1qMLxzoOQgVnP5XI) | The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people.

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, Sunday marked 59 years since the passage of the Civil Rights Act, which ended segregation in public places and banned employment discrimination, and led to other landmark civil rights bills like the 1965 Voting Rights Act, which outlaws voter discrimination, and the 1968 Fair Housing Act, outlawing housing discrimination. But just days earlier, we saw Affirmative Action overturned for college admissions.59 years later, and we can confirm race has and always WILL be a factor in the country built upon the constructs of white supremacy. This is why we fight to build Black political power and create a truly representative democracy — one that works for all Americans —and we hope you’ll agree with us when we say that this fight is more important than ever in 2023. We leave you with the poignant words of Ketanji Brown Jackson from her dissent on the overturn of Affirmative Action: We won't stop fighting. The Collective PAC | The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. To Donate by Check: PO Box 15320, DC 20003 Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ** | | Sent via . | Hi, it’s Jane Fonda. I’m reaching out with an important question: _**Do you know a climate champion who should run for local office?**_

The Jane Fonda Climate PAC is working with Lead Locally – an organization committed to electing leaders at the local and state level who pledge to fight back against the fossil fuel industry.

If you know someone who should consider running for office, nominate them to join Lead Locally’s new virtual training program this summer.

[_**Nominate a friend or someone you know today to sign up for Lead Locally’s virtual Run for Climate leadership training!**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66076942/415248223/-1353106203?referrer=jfcp-woa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdmN2M0OTg1LTM2MWMtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=F3_cj9q3O3S1H6mgzn-c4cm3tzKbJ74riOdzTp6XrHY=&emci=60eba1f2-251c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=7f7c4985-361c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=4823105)

Every year, there are crucial elections across the country that will determine the future of the fight against the climate crisis. And local elections play a crucial role in setting the stage for the fight against the fossil fuel industry as we race against time to protect our planet.

Leaders at the local level including our mayors, city councilors, county supervisors, commissioners, district attorneys, controllers, and every other elected or appointed office has the best opportunity to stop new fossil fuel projects in your neighborhood. That’s why we need as many climate champions at every level to pass effective climate legislation. [_**Nominate someone you know to secure their spot for Lead Locally’s virtual training!**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66076944/415248225/-1353106203?referrer=jfcp-woa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdmN2M0OTg1LTM2MWMtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=F3_cj9q3O3S1H6mgzn-c4cm3tzKbJ74riOdzTp6XrHY=&emci=60eba1f2-251c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=7f7c4985-361c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=4823105)

Since Andy announced he was running for re-election, Kentuckians from across the Commonwealth have come together to support him. When we say this campaign is powered by people like you, Peter, **we mean it.**

Since Andy announced he was running for re-election, Kentuckians from across the Commonwealth have come together to support him. In 2019, Andy won by just over 5,000 votes. Why? Because our campaign and supporters treated everyone with respect and dignity, understanding that every community matters, and organizing neighborhood by neighborhood, street by street. This grassroots team helped us knock on more than one million doors, some of which hadn't seen a Democratic campaign in years.

We can do it again this year, but it won't be easy. Andy's up against Mitch McConnell's protégé, who has the support of deep-pocketed dark money groups to help him buy this race. We're relying on this grassroots team once again to help us fight back.

[**Join the thousands of other supporters who are ready to protect Kentucky's progress and make a donation to Andy's re-election campaign now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66077193/415250630/950424521?refcode=em23_230706_grssrt_fnd_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230706_grssrt_fnd_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=723f01c7-371c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjNmMDFjNy0zNzFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=16j2_kVMDe_wbMRff0rpGiQZHsmTrLRS3Q1ueOkOYdI=)

clean_body: Since Andy announced he was running for re-election, Kentuckians from across the Commonwealth have come together to support him. When we say this campaign is powered by people like you, Peter, we mean it. Since Andy announced he was running for re-election, Kentuckians from across the Commonwealth have come together to support him. Hundreds of people have volunteered to help our campaign, and thousands more have chipped in to power us to victory because they know Andy is the leader we need to protect Kentucky's progress. | = = In 2019, Andy won by just over 5,000 votes. Why? Because our campaign and supporters treated everyone with respect and dignity, understanding that every community matters, and organizing neighborhood by neighborhood, street by street. This grassroots team helped us knock on more than one million doors, some of which hadn't seen a Democratic campaign in years. We can do it again this year, but it won't be easy. Andy's up against Mitch McConnell's protégé, who has the support of deep-pocketed dark money groups to help him buy this race. We're relying on this grassroots team once again to help us fight back. = Thanks, Team Beshear P.S. Ready to do more to help Andy win in November? = PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR Andy Beshear for Governor PO Box 4278 Louisville, KY 40204 United States

| | Friend, The toxic propaganda coming out of the House Freedom Caucus PR shop, also known as Fox News, leads many to think that evil Democrats are out to prosecute every registered Republican and conservative Trump supporter. **A major driver of this disinformation is Jim “Gym” Jordan, a leading member of the poorly-named Freedom Caucus who has a litany of horrifying skeletons buried in his closet.** While he was assistant wrestling coach at Ohio State University, Jordan routinely swept under the rug multiple credible reports that a team doctor was sexually assaulting student athletes during medical examinations. He also mocked a 10 year old rape victim. Who does that? **Jim Jordan is a seasoned liar who will say anything to win. ** Jordan has spent more time yelling on Fox News than doing his job in Congress. From the start of his pathetic career, Jordan cultivated an image as a professional political showman: jacket off, arms flailing in the air, and voice constantly raised in manufactured outrage—the Gym Jordan Clown Show gives the hard conservative Right the red meat they need to stay angry about pronouns and to think that Democrats are their enemy. _**For the good of the entire country, it’s time to cancel this show. **_ Can you help Tamie target the key voters that are going to decide whether Jim Jordan faces political consequences for his endless gaslighting, bloviating, and fear-mongering? **[Even $5 helps us build the war chest that we’re going to need to take on Jordan and win:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66077645/415252087/1649708063?refcode=cancel-gymjordan&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODBmM2Q0NDAtMzgxYy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=1jlkEZOGF1ralISr53Y44uu4N3bgvsRSqwLVe0HC7CY=)**

clean_body: Ohioans are sick of the petty division from politicians like Jordan.| | | = | | Friend, The toxic propaganda coming out of the House Freedom Caucus PR shop, also known as Fox News, leads many to think that evil Democrats are out to prosecute every registered Republican and conservative Trump supporter. A major driver of this disinformation is Jim “Gym” Jordan, a leading member of the poorly-named Freedom Caucus who has a litany of horrifying skeletons buried in his closet. While he was assistant wrestling coach at Ohio State University, Jordan routinely swept under the rug multiple credible reports that a team doctor was sexually assaulting student athletes during medical examinations. He also mocked a 10 year old rape victim. Who does that? Jim Jordan is a seasoned liar who will say anything to win. Jordan has spent more time yelling on Fox News than doing his job in Congress. From the start of his pathetic career, Jordan cultivated an image as a professional political showman: jacket off, arms flailing in the air, and voice constantly raised in manufactured outrage—the Gym Jordan Clown Show gives the hard conservative Right the red meat they need to stay angry about pronouns and to think that Democrats are their enemy. For the good of the entire country, it’s time to cancel this show. # Today's episode of the podcast, Beyond the Briefing...
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=3e3894db53&e=f6564bbe3b)
I’ve endorsed Bishop Gold for awhile, and this week had the chance to sit down with one of their Senior Brokers, Beau Cassidy. Beau's father, David Cassidy, was the the star of the 70s sitcom "The Partridge Family," we discussed what it was like to grow up with such a famous father. We also talked about Beau's career path, from music to real estate to precious metals.
A lot to learn in this one:
| [Listen now](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=0fed3d0e3a&e=f6564bbe3b)

# "In times of market downturn and economic instability, I turn to the experts at Bishop Gold Group”
---
In the Joe Biden economy, the stock market and inflation have become serious concerns. I’ve begun working with Bishop Gold Group to put my money in a consistent asset, gold and silver.
Bishop Gold Group are trusted experts in the precious metals space, I urge you to call them and find out how they can help you diversify your assets.
If you go to the link: [bishopgoldgroup.com/Sean](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=aea9538b98&e=f6564bbe3b), they’ll know I sent you.
Thanks to my friends at Bishop Gold Group for sponsoring this newsletter so I can continue to bring you content for free.

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9b9cd002285e4f22a198a3eab3b5ab9e&_e=KVxyWU1qMZEvPvB9vm5hfv-Tdrjew_FqRIiXf9sh-M3vBFoSbsrMRoX7fEL0o0G1uNqEsVudcd5pv9-fpNdpCFCip_p-dfM4__sAydR5LauxrUkI8JKf-9TcLK8j-e3UzvLnw0qoDLRtwAZwLLJfAqRqjy9cRFaSxMWFGJX5zfpbdPI_f5xU03TZAaK1gduqBC-9EQAThNgGvzf5uowYrFs2W8PIaFmYcouyhwTm9NJHqTjxIdXXkEKleKfXPLPEcTGFmAS8j987qE5FB7e4EFsqDYXNTPvHBwJUgi6ZeBk%3D)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9b9cd002285e4f22a198a3eab3b5ab9e&_e=KVxyWU1qMZEvPvB9vm5hfv-Tdrjew_FqRIiXf9sh-M3vBFoSbsrMRoX7fEL0o0G1uNqEsVudcd5pv9-fpNdpCFCip_p-dfM4__sAydR5LauxrUkI8JKf-9TcLK8j-e3UzvLnw0qoDLRtwAZwLLJfAmEl4XgHWTzssOti0FoBwJyRXZVV2enaxBdrI8x-sGth5Ew3l5Kynw25wqw6VjoJYajbqx8-8oqen5R24nDEb9spywCEObztLkDzB6g_uovHUhoaCRfZDEuSVK2WLgGvIYqYkBvFbRIVlD5swgJChtY%3D)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9b9cd002285e4f22a198a3eab3b5ab9e&_e=KVxyWU1qMZEvPvB9vm5hfv-Tdrjew_FqRIiXf9sh-M3vBFoSbsrMRoX7fEL0o0G1uNqEsVudcd5pv9-fpNdpCFCip_p-dfM4__sAydR5LauxrUkI8JKf-9TcLK8j-e3UzvLnw0qoDLRtwAZwLLJfAsJVKpbWtgG5RuXb3OoXglCtxWTzyLUa5vys8vjgb3uo0y2-8Oi1SU_im3iseDuz6w5diOwdvyaz_FilXIrA53yA-5sPrMOONXSyCLbtytDqMdrDn4kW2HkMLqLUwFjyDm7TWWe9v_BxnJh71WwNJIg%3D)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9b9cd002285e4f22a198a3eab3b5ab9e&_e=KVxyWU1qMZEvPvB9vm5hfv-Tdrjew_FqRIiXf9sh-M3vBFoSbsrMRoX7fEL0o0G1uNqEsVudcd5pv9-fpNdpCFCip_p-dfM4__sAydR5LauxrUkI8JKf-9TcLK8j-e3UzvLnw0qoDLRtwAZwLLJfAjz6szh-hkH69ZYPx0647hpjWfNzxi2so2gDvvh659HRvsVTBEs8hzg15mUeeVgoIpMtkLrWWroT8RbhidWfm_Nhex7yulC_FktmuCheV3DOII-uS02w0qQlVemetYNZF-SX7VJH9-cjgQYEzX0jhPo%3D)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9b9cd002285e4f22a198a3eab3b5ab9e&_e=KVxyWU1qMZEvPvB9vm5hfv-Tdrjew_FqRIiXf9sh-M3vBFoSbsrMRoX7fEL0o0G1uNqEsVudcd5pv9-fpNdpCFCip_p-dfM4__sAydR5LauxrUkI8JKf-9TcLK8j-e3UzvLnw0qoDLRtwAZwLLJfAqIvygUMhydOWrJwPhrV8nisKmZ0MDnhDuaBWuTScWjY7-woYo5_8Rdo5wZKSGJQkVqco08dO12c_VcAB1xF3mppjE7iOn11sXzf9acbGt2wnxzcVqUQblh0gXpwkp1HlGuGxYc1B8WcaMNvcRuF4wM%3D)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9b9cd002285e4f22a198a3eab3b5ab9e&_e=KVxyWU1qMZEvPvB9vm5hfv-Tdrjew_FqRIiXf9sh-M3vBFoSbsrMRoX7fEL0o0G1uNqEsVudcd5pv9-fpNdpCFCip_p-dfM4__sAydR5LauxrUkI8JKf-9TcLK8j-e3UzvLnw0qoDLRtwAZwLLJfAjbfMNocGCb6fRaQvzulyOFzJNF7fXT2ETX5WKtgh-LElDm4Y9gUGd80QM1_v9nBSgUlBHtK8VZrSO5ne_ef5e_9vV9l-AZ0Y9_9vV4BTqtlUTCJqTG9IKmaNREL4OszLUyVOg22Pcb6WjyIVRFy9OI%3D)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9b9cd002285e4f22a198a3eab3b5ab9e&_e=KVxyWU1qMZEvPvB9vm5hfv-Tdrjew_FqRIiXf9sh-M3vBFoSbsrMRoX7fEL0o0G1uNqEsVudcd5pv9-fpNdpCFCip_p-dfM4__sAydR5LauxrUkI8JKf-9TcLK8j-e3UzvLnw0qoDLRtwAZwLLJfAlflNDEumsi47RR0TAgf0HqUQeFFA5M0LiQuxMM9E6SzyG4Y5sW9VvW31zJhxw8D7KLmXhP2NXbvIwlrg8cBZr8tZThznTLLUezfRrx4GEBY4-JJVqXNhGslPYwhfgl8nJIUnXp5F5WH64Jd7BxOEVY%3D)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9b9cd002285e4f22a198a3eab3b5ab9e&_e=KVxyWU1qMZEvPvB9vm5hfv-Tdrjew_FqRIiXf9sh-M3vBFoSbsrMRoX7fEL0o0G1uNqEsVudcd5pv9-fpNdpCFCip_p-dfM4__sAydR5LauxrUkI8JKf-9TcLK8j-e3UzvLnw0qoDLRtwAZwLLJfAhyUdrSsGbD6gy8mwZFJ85v0SHy_6drdQE3wkYU9UyOn9cjRtHVlajj0jajeCXpsnc4u6XejJE_vTsRdjHEGRzAhYB1cgMOHKPdwIdcVka6yFGBEefdzLjnJuquU6V871dx1jeABQYKP_1LBTK5A0IQ%3D)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9b9cd002285e4f22a198a3eab3b5ab9e&_e=KVxyWU1qMZEvPvB9vm5hfv-Tdrjew_FqRIiXf9sh-M3vBFoSbsrMRoX7fEL0o0G1uNqEsVudcd5pv9-fpNdpCFCip_p-dfM4__sAydR5LauxrUkI8JKf-9TcLK8j-e3UjVpxiiXhn0nbIAjJvOysiY-2PMfYvZk-XDrhzd8Ajm3bO8lCpyJvPgDA-Suy-89q7PMghELZZHG2f2lAvZh0tLRw1gTzejxbutnpdTs1NhWbNzKkeHlpd5t9NfvfOzKls462VL6hm2QfAmeVjObm0ENePTRmUWw8HXv8P-taetE%3D)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9b9cd002285e4f22a198a3eab3b5ab9e&_e=KVxyWU1qMZEvPvB9vm5hfv-Tdrjew_FqRIiXf9sh-M3vBFoSbsrMRoX7fEL0o0G1uNqEsVudcd5pv9-fpNdpCFCip_p-dfM4__sAydR5LauxrUkI8JKf-9TcLK8j-e3Uv5jH0qOeYtQnQUyRGY86HOoU_8c2EJaFu7mCxuwUoIMdmhOgr-ntED6iPhzV1qkfAPbXSR0YT1eQ4bGgSnFHWcT-9nJ3GPucE1IE1tgOsGq3549NyipMwopKQYZTtTXKrlTIa48G4sYZOzx_-hYHl5VcLz5OSQqz1_nGjSAL3bM%3D)

[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9b9cd002285e4f22a198a3eab3b5ab9e&_e=KVxyWU1qMZEvPvB9vm5hfv-Tdrjew_FqRIiXf9sh-M3vBFoSbsrMRoX7fEL0o0G1uNqEsVudcd5pv9-fpNdpCFCip_p-dfM4__sAydR5LauxrUkI8JKf-9TcLK8j-e3U1J1-j0ftTWMc2EMavZj3e6g1A46vKvMDfw3NRkDIaS-7UR55pIO-UOxTv33ary3Jmj4Q29C6XJ4Os-0Csb7-avXhFcxY9f7Y7tj-No3WB_MVlgidg54uOQL5fvPg4ASixUWXiDWPqDwIUn0i7wOYMOpUrydhPBGpirfHuCWYUBH1a-GVhLCbJHOvILvym92t)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

clean_body: I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Friend, This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation. For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop. In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. Now I 'll share my story... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities. Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking. We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals. This is WRONG. I've dealt with racism... I 've even received death threats. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable. But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up. I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. I am breaking the rules. It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... I 'm not doing that. You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country. So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss). When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing. Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

clean_body: Since she was first elected in 2018 – flipping VA-07 blue for the first time in 50 years – she’s been committed to delivering results for her constituents. | = | Peter, We know summer is a busy time, but we wanted to take a moment to discuss the critical work Abigail is taking up in Congress. = | = Since she was first elected in 2018 – flipping VA-07 blue for the first time in 50 years – she’s been committed to delivering results for her constituents. Here are just a few ways our community has benefited from her advocacy in Congress: 💊 – Abigail led the charge to cap the cost of lifesaving insulin for seniors at $35 per month. 🏥 – She’s working tirelessly to codify Roe v. Wade into law so reproductive rights are protected for all Americans. 📈 – She’s leading the effort to ban Members of Congress from trading individual stocks, and her bipartisan bill is gaining momentum every day. This is just a sampling of Abigail's important work in Congress, and she needs your support to continue it. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for your support, Team Spanberger * | | = Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress P.O. Box 3112 Fredericksburg, VA 22402 United States | | | ---|---|--- Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. name: Jon Tester
subject: the little guy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
I first ran for office to make sure our government was serving hardworking Americans like my grandparents a hundred years ago.

| Hi Peter.

Here’s a photo of my grandparents, Arnfred and Christine, on their wedding day in 1905. That was seven years before they picked out a flat piece of grassland just outside Big Sandy to build their homestead.
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66078169/415254759/665036970?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230706-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE1NTYzY2Y3LTM5MWMtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aVGgAORnTj-_pbsZzl9FGttWnHIPC8RL6XLcYN24wdI=)
That patch of loamy, alkaline clay-soil is the same one where I grew up; and where Sharla and I raised our kids and still farm the land.

Things weren’t easy for Fred and Christine. They suffered devastating windstorms, bitter cold, shooting fire, poisonous snakes—pretty much everything but locusts. And in the late teens, the drought hit, wiping out the farm entirely. My grandparents were forced to leave.

But they were determined to return to their homestead. They saved up enough to start all over again on the same little piece of land. They had a couple hundred acres to their name, a newly-built barn, a windmill, their healthy son and daughters (including newborn Helen, my mom), strong muscles, and the powerful work ethic that built rural America.

**I first ran for office to make sure our government was serving hardworking Americans like my grandparents a hundred years ago. Folks like our teachers, farmers, and construction workers deserve a government that works for them.**

But too many Washington politicians are deep in the pockets of right-wing special interests. They promise one thing when the camera is rolling, then make secret backroom deals with their wealthy megadonors.

That’s not how I operate, and it’s why we’re running this campaign differently. **I’m counting on grassroots folks like you chipping in what you can, when you can, to build a team strong enough to take on the outside groups and Republican attacks.**

[_**Can I count on you to split a contribution today between my campaign and Fight for Progress? Your donation (no matter the size) *sows the seeds* of our movement, ensuring we grow and build the resources we need to win.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66078170/415254760/665036970?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230706-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE1NTYzY2Y3LTM5MWMtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aVGgAORnTj-_pbsZzl9FGttWnHIPC8RL6XLcYN24wdI=)
