name: Mark Warner
subject: Justice Alito
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
and the ongoing ethics crisis at SCOTUS

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66078233/415254819/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTU2ZTkyMy0zYTFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qVkA0-b2BUkDknZMjYKeN7wMHfCg2S1DIL6tEikU6ZQ=&emci=9161d276-251c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=3156e923-3a1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, First it was Justice Thomas and the revelation that he not only accepted a ridiculously lavish vacation from right-wing donor Harlan Crow, but that he also sold his properties in Georgia to Crow without disclosing the sale. Now we’re hearing disturbing reports about Justice Alito. It was revealed that _another_ GOP donor – Leonard Leo – whose lifelong mission is to capture control of our Supreme Court through the conservative Federalist Society, landed the Justice a free fishing vacation in Alaska with billionaire Paul Singer... before his hedge fund brought business before the Court. Frankly, I’m getting kind of tired of saying this, but here we are: **It’s time to pass a basic code of ethics for Supreme Court justices.** It’s a good thing I’m on a bill to get it done! **_[Can you chip in $5 so I can continue my work in the Senate to bring ethics reform to SCOTUS?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66078234/415254820/-2114184091?refcode=mw_em_230706_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTU2ZTkyMy0zYTFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qVkA0-b2BUkDknZMjYKeN7wMHfCg2S1DIL6tEikU6ZQ=)_** We’re really not asking for much. Week after week, the Supreme Court is handing down cases that change the lives of Americans and shape our future. We saw this first-hand last week when they struck down affirmative action in college admissions. SCOTUS is supposed to look out for the American people. But because there’s no binding code of ethics whatsoever, they’re instead beholden to millionaire donors who take them on fancy vacations. My _SCERT Act_ would implement accountability at the Supreme Court and hold our Justices responsible for their ethical violations. **Supreme Court justices have tremendous power over our lives. They should be held to a basic code of ethics. ****_[**Donate today to join me in this fight for ethics reform at the most powerful court in our country >> **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66078235/415254821/-2114184091?refcode=mw_em_230706_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTU2ZTkyMy0zYTFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qVkA0-b2BUkDknZMjYKeN7wMHfCg2S1DIL6tEikU6ZQ=)_** Thank you, Mark Warner ************[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66078236/415254822/-2114184091?refcode=mw_em_230706_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTU2ZTkyMy0zYTFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qVkA0-b2BUkDknZMjYKeN7wMHfCg2S1DIL6tEikU6ZQ=)************

It was revealed that another GOP donor – Leonard Leo – whose lifelong mission is to capture control of our Supreme Court through the conservative Federalist Society, landed the Justice a free fishing vacation in Alaska with billionaire Paul Singer... before his hedge fund brought business before the Court. Frankly, I’m getting kind of tired of saying this, but here we are: It’s time to pass a basic code of ethics for Supreme Court justices. It’s a good thing I’m on a bill to get it done! = We’re really not asking for much. Week after week, the Supreme Court is handing down cases that change the lives of Americans and shape our future. We saw this first-hand last week when they struck down affirmative action in college admissions. SCOTUS is supposed to look out for the American people. But because there’s no binding code of ethics whatsoever, they’re instead beholden to millionaire donors who take them on fancy vacations. My SCERT Act would implement accountability at the Supreme Court and hold our Justices responsible for their ethical violations. Supreme Court justices have tremendous power over our lives. They should be held to a basic code of ethics. = Thank you, Mark Warner **********=******** | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

Fellow Patriot, I hope you had a restful 4th of July with your loved ones.After a series of major federal court victories for conservatives, AFL is utilizing these victories to bolster our lawfare against the radical left's woke agenda. Meaningful victories such as striking down affirmative action and enjoining the federal government from colluding with Big Tech to censor Americans' speech were won, but the battle continues-as the radical left is already working hard to find ways around these rulings. AFL remains vigilant and at the forefront of fighting back in the courtroom.AFL was thrilled to witness a favorable ruling for freedom and equality in _Students for Fair Admissions, Inc. v. President and Fellows of Harvard College_ , striking down affirmative action.Within mere hours of the ruling, AFL sent a demand letter to the deans of EVERY law school in the United States, demanding that they cease discriminating based on race and sex in student admissions, faculty hiring, and law-review membership and article selection. This patently illegal practice has harmed countless Americans--not only in academia, but throughout corporate America as well, and AFL has been leading the way in fighting woke corporations.Read more about this initiative here: [_https://aflegal.org/america-first-legal-sends-letters-to-200-law-schools-demanding-the-end-of-all-racial-preferences-in-law-school-admissions-faculty-hiring-and-law-reviews/_](http://xykkk.mjt.lu/lnk/AWQAAB_)
AFL applauds the Attorneys General of Louisiana and Missouri for the monumental ruling they achieved in Missouri v. Biden, blocking Biden Administration officials from continuing to violate the First Amendment via social media platforms. The judge in this case had harsh words for the radical Biden officials, noting this is “the most massive attack against free speech in United States’ history,” the Biden administration has “blatantly ignored the First Amendment’s right to free speech,” and the Biden administration “almost exclusively targeted conservative speech.” This victory has been in the making for two years, and AFL has been forging the way in exposing this massive censorship scheme.In fact, the day after Jen Psaki admitted from the White House podium that the administration was working with Big Tech to censor Americans, AFL filed a FOIA request and relentlessly pursued proof of this collusion through litigation. We obtained and published thousands of pages of evidence, and the first documents we released were relied on by the states of Louisiana and Missouri to support the monumental ruling that they just achieved. AFL's relentless oversight work paved the way for this major win, and AFL is proud to provide assistance to our allies as we all fight for freedom.This week, AFL also filed a motion to intervene and proposed motion to dismiss in a lawsuit to protect Arizona’s “Save Women’s Sports Act,” a law that passed in March 2022 to prohibit biological males from playing on girls’ sports teams at public schools.Read more here: [_https://aflegal.org/america-first-legal-moves-to-intervene-to-protect-arizonas-save-womens-sports-act-and-save-girls-sports-from-biological-males-and-radical-transgender-ideol/_](http://xykkk.mjt.lu/lnk/AWQAAB_) AFL also filed a Hatch Act complaint with the Office of Special Counsel regarding Biden Secretary of Education Miguel Cardona. Secretary Cardona misused his position by engaging in political activity while acting in an official capacity, thereby undermining public confidence in the nonpartisan operation of government. First on June 30, 2023, and then again on July 1, 2023, Mr. Cardona blamed “Republican state officials” and “Republican elected officials” for the Supreme Court’s opinion rejecting the Biden Administration’s unilateral, unlawful efforts to forgive student loans. Secretary Cardona’s statements clearly violate the Hatch Act, and he should be sanctioned consistent with applicable precedent. As you may recall, previously AFL secured a ruling that Biden's former Chief of Staff, Ron Klain, violated the Hatch Act, and we will continue to doggedly pursue accountability to those who violate the law.More here: [_https://aflegal.org/america-first-legal-files-hatch-act-complaint-against-biden-education-secretary-miguel-cardona/_](http://xykkk.mjt.lu/lnk/AWQAAB_bg8oAAAAOjRAAAEcY2LAAAAABL9MAAGV0ABg1MgBkpyHF4EDkhjNWSZyGR9NPrCfEnQAXqZI/4/VXy3lZyCJ-kjd9XvLYi7hA/aHR0cHM6Ly9hZmxlZ2FsLm9yZy9hbWVyaWNhLWZpcnN0LWxlZ2FsLWZpbGVzLWhhdGNoLWFjdC1jb21wbGFpbnQtYWdhaW5zdC1iaWRlbi1lZHVjYXRpb24tc2VjcmV0YXJ5LW1pZ3VlbC1jYXJkb25hLw) Last, but certainly not least, this week AFL filed a brief with the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Sixth Circuit in support of a Tennessee law that protects children from being subjected to dangerous and experimental gender-modification surgeries and treatments: [_https://aflegal.org/afl-files-brief-at-the-sixth-circuit-court-of-appeals-in-support-of-tennessee-law-protecting-children-from-irreversible-gender-procedures/_](http://xykkk.mjt.lu/lnk/AWQAAB_bg8oAAAAOjRAAAEcY2LAAAAABL9MAAGV0ABg1MgBkpyHF4EDkhjNWSZyGR9NPrCfEnQAXqZI/5/in1l_vm0nQnExr9N9N1bsQ/aHR0cHM6Ly9hZmxlZ2FsLm9yZy9hZmwtZmlsZXMtYnJpZWYtYXQtdGhlLXNpeHRoLWNpcmN1aXQtY291cnQtb2YtYXBwZWFscy1pbi1zdXBwb3J0LW9mLXRlbm5lc3NlZS1sYXctcHJvdGVjdGluZy1jaGlsZHJlbi1mcm9tLWlycmV2ZXJzaWJsZS1nZW5kZXItcHJvY2VkdXJlcy8) I sincerely thank you for standing with us as we fight for liberty. Together, with your help, AFL will continue to lead the way in defending America in the courtroom. Blessings, Mary Thomas
| [**DONATE >>**](http://xykkk.mjt.lu/lnk/AWQAAB_bg8oAAAAOjRAAAEcY2LAAAAABL9MAAGV0ABg1MgBkpyHF4EDkhjNWSZyGR9NPrCfEnQAXqZI/6/WhsC6AwGbpxVZhu0atz_kQ/aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9hbWVyaWNhLWZpcnN0LWxlZ2FsLWZvdW5kYXRpb24vd2Vla2x5LWRvbm9yLWVtYWlsLXBhZ2U_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249QUZMX3dlZWtseS1kb25vci1lbWFpbC0wNjIyMjNfMjAyMzA2MjImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD13ZWVrbHktZG9ub3ItZW1haWwtMDYyMjIzJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEc)

Our extreme Supreme Court just overturned President Biden’s student loan forgiveness...
Americans are suffering from crippling debt and unmanageable kitchen table budgets, while Republicans fiddle with tax cuts for the mega-rich and block relief for the rest of us.

Due to school loans, many student borrowers have had to put off buying a home, starting a family, saving for retirement, or starting their own business. Student debt has become all consuming for borrowers, as it affects the money they’re able to spend on groceries and necessities.

**Derek’s opponent, Rep. Jay Obernolte actually signed on to an amicus brief arguing against student loan forgiveness!

[We need representatives like Derek who will work to improve the lives of working Californians and all Americans. The Supreme Court and conservatives in Congress are out of touch with the struggles of everyday Americans.

Forty million student borrowers have now seen their economic situation grow more dire, and our entire economy will bear the brunt of this disastrous ruling.

**Student debt makes it challenging for millions of Americans to pay the rent, put food on the table and pay for the basic necessities of life.

[Derek is fighting for a higher education model that doesn’t require students to take on decades of debt to climb the social ladder and have economic mobility. clean_body: = = Our extreme Supreme Court just overturned President Biden’s student loan forgiveness... Americans are suffering from crippling debt and unmanageable kitchen table budgets, while Republicans fiddle with tax cuts for the mega-rich and block relief for the rest of us. Due to school loans, many student borrowers have had to put off buying a home, starting a family, saving for retirement, or starting their own business. Student debt has become all consuming for borrowers, as it affects the money they’re able to spend on groceries and necessities. Derek’s opponent, Rep. Jay Obernolte actually signed on to an amicus brief arguing against student loan forgiveness! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = = = The Supreme Court and conservatives in Congress are out of touch with the struggles of everyday Americans. Forty million student borrowers have now seen their economic situation grow more dire, and our entire economy will bear the brunt of this disastrous ruling. Student debt makes it challenging for millions of Americans to pay the rent, put food on the table and pay for the basic necessities of life. = An education shouldn’t be a debt sentence. name: Team Shyne
subject: No country without workers
body:
Hi team,

It’s been 88 years since the passage of the National Labor Relations Act that guaranteed the right of private sector employees to join unions and collectively bargain.

While it was a critical milestone in the ongoing struggle for worker rights, the fact is **the labor movement in the U.S. is no less fraught than it was nearly a century ago.**

Wage stagnation, extreme wealth inequality, worker exploitation in the gig economy, insidious union-busting tactics, corporate consolidation, the impact of Citizens United, and unlimited election spending tell us loud and clear: **We need transformational action, and we need it NOW.**

[**Sepi has always stood in solidarity with workers, which is why she fought hard to raise the minimum wage in WeHo to the highest in the nation. Chip in $5 to elect an unwavering voice of worker solidarity in Congress today. >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66078480/415255654/1120139897?refcode=em23_230706_Labor_fndd_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230706_Labor_fndd_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=0465a9fe-3a1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM5MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDQ2NWE5ZmUtM2ExYy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=QAW_TsRfF1p969bY2VQwzi_F7hrWIwbkXtJSIt2Uanc=)

Workers are the lifeblood of our country. Aside from keeping our economy moving, they literally feed, shelter, and care for us. During the pandemic, workers were forced to be on the frontlines, saving lives while we weathered one of the worst crises in our country’s history. Yet, workers across the country are still fighting for their right to live with dignity and security as the wealth gap continues to grow larger and larger.

In the wealthiest nation in the world, it is unconscionable that a person working a full-time job cannot afford basic necessities, like rent, but that’s the cold, harsh reality in our country.

Sepi has never wavered in her commitment to empowering the most marginalized voices in our country. From hotel workers to electricians, teachers to frontline workers who save our lives, Sepi is ready to get to work building an economy that works for all of us, not just the wealthy.

[**Join the fight for workers everywhere by chipping $5 or any amount you can today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66078487/415255661/1120139897?refcode=em23_230706_Labor_fndd_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230706_Labor_fndd_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=0465a9fe-3a1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM5MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDQ2NWE5ZmUtM2ExYy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=QAW_TsRfF1p969bY2VQwzi_F7hrWIwbkXtJSIt2Uanc=)

— Team Shyne

_Mayor Sepi Shyne has taken on WeHo's biggest issues and delivered results. From raising the minimum wage to the highest in the nation to significantly reducing homelessness – she's running for Congress to fight for all of us. As the first out Iranian LGBTQ+ woman elected anywhere in the world, Sepi is committed to making the American dream a reality for everyone: For immigrants, the LGBTQ+ community, women, and anyone trying to make ends meet. clean_body: Hi team, It’s been 88 years since the passage of the National Labor Relations Act that guaranteed the right of private sector employees to join unions and collectively bargain. While it was a critical milestone in the ongoing struggle for worker rights, the fact is the labor movement in the U.S. is no less fraught than it was nearly a century ago. Wage stagnation, extreme wealth inequality, worker exploitation in the gig economy, insidious union-busting tactics, corporate consolidation, the impact of Citizens United, and unlimited election spending tell us loud and clear: We need transformational action, and we need it NOW. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Workers are the lifeblood of our country. Aside from keeping our economy moving, they literally feed, shelter, and care for us. During the pandemic, workers were forced to be on the frontlines, saving lives while we weathered one of the worst crises in our country’s history. Yet, workers across the country are still fighting for their right to live with dignity and security as the wealth gap continues to grow larger and larger. In the wealthiest nation in the world, it is unconscionable that a person working a full-time job cannot afford basic necessities, like rent, but that’s the cold, harsh reality in our country. Sepi has never wavered in her commitment to empowering the most marginalized voices in our country. From hotel workers to electricians, teachers to frontline workers who save our lives, Sepi is ready to get to work building an economy that works for all of us, not just the wealthy. = — Team Shyne Mayor Sepi Shyne has taken on WeHo's biggest issues and delivered results. From raising the minimum wage to the highest in the nation to significantly reducing homelessness – she's running for Congress to fight for all of us. As the first out Iranian LGBTQ+ woman elected anywhere in the world, Sepi is committed to making the American dream a reality for everyone: For immigrants, the LGBTQ+ community, women, and anyone trying to make ends meet. It's our time to Shyne, make a donation today. = = Sepi Shyne For Congress 8149 Santa Monica Blvd #280 West Hollywood, CA 90046 United States

| | Sens. Hirono and Duckworth's Right to Contraception Act has been *reintroduced* [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66078612/415256098/-1903924494?sourceid=1050421&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDdhNTdiZC0zYjFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nmMN7xVXWYQwJnigYEYuNK3ZMqK1FR4DGJz_ErAj0oQ=&emci=fa62cbb6-3b1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=647a57bd-3b1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Sens. Hirono and Duckworth have reintroduced the **Right to Contraception Act** to the Senate floor — to _codify_ our right to contraceptive access and protect reproductive health care access for _millions_ of Americans.

**Make your voice heard, Peter: Do you support the Right to Contraception Act?** **[YES](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66078613/415256099/-1903924494?sourceid=1050421&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDdhNTdiZC0zYjFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nmMN7xVXWYQwJnigYEYuNK3ZMqK1FR4DGJz_ErAj0oQ=&emci=fa62cbb6-3b1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=647a57bd-3b1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) **| [**NO**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66078614/415256100/-1903924494?sourceid=1050421&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDdhNTdiZC0zYjFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nmMN7xVXWYQwJnigYEYuNK3ZMqK1FR4DGJz_ErAj0oQ=&emci=fa62cbb6-3b1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=647a57bd-3b1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Peter,

Republicans applauded the Supreme Court's disastrous decision last year to place millions of Americans' access to abortion in the hands of anti-choice state legislators. Then this spring, we witnessed anti-choice extremists launch a fresh attack on medication abortion.

**We _need_ leaders who will codify our right to reproductive health care — and Sens. Mazie Hirono (HI) and Tammy Duckworth (IL) have proven that they're up to the task.**

Just last month, Sens. Hirono and Duckworth reintroduced the Right to Contraception Act to the Senate floor — a landmark piece of legislation that would _codify_ our right to contraceptive access. When autonomy is on the line, EMILYs List-endorsed women are rolling up their sleeves and fighting hard.

Today we're reaching out to pro-choice supporters like you, Peter, to see where you stand on the issue: **Do you support the Right to Contraception Act?** **[YES](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66078615/415256101/-1903924494?sourceid=1050421&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDdhNTdiZC0zYjFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nmMN7xVXWYQwJnigYEYuNK3ZMqK1FR4DGJz_ErAj0oQ=&emci=fa62cbb6-3b1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=647a57bd-3b1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) **| [**NO**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66078616/415256102/-1903924494?sourceid=1050421&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDdhNTdiZC0zYjFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nmMN7xVXWYQwJnigYEYuNK3ZMqK1FR4DGJz_ErAj0oQ=&emci=fa62cbb6-3b1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=647a57bd-3b1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) We value your feedback. Thanks for letting us know where you stand.

body:
We’re adding this to our list of reprehensible things Josh Hawley has done. Josh Hawley has tweeted some _utterly terrible_ things in the past. Including, but not limited, to: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66078662/415256338/-1824387518?refcode=em23_230706_tweets_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230706_tweets_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=1eef6bf9-3b1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWVlZjZiZjktM2IxYy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pt9mSff4n6UpeJekgnlOMq9G-rteoU-s4PFJW8-GuDU=)
And:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66078664/415256341/-1824387518?refcode=em23_230706_tweets_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230706_tweets_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=1eef6bf9-3b1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWVlZjZiZjktM2IxYy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pt9mSff4n6UpeJekgnlOMq9G-rteoU-s4PFJW8-GuDU=)
And now he's done it again, tweeting out a quote FALSELY attributed to Patrick Henry on Independence Day..._and it's still online for everyone to see._
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66078667/415256343/-1824387518?refcode=em23_230706_tweets_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230706_tweets_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=1eef6bf9-3b1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWVlZjZiZjktM2IxYy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pt9mSff4n6UpeJekgnlOMq9G-rteoU-s4PFJW8-GuDU=)
Peter, Patrick Henry never said this. This quote originates from an antisemitic and white nationalist magazine from _1956._

We want to be shocked, but at this point none of the lies Hawley says are shocking anymore. It's just further proof that we need to send him packing.

[**It's time Missourians had a leader in the U.S. Senate who will fight for our shared American values of liberty and justice for all (as Patrick Henry would have wanted). of winning in name: Conservatives Give
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ced33954b0b04a95bcee00805ada23c4&_e=MDcEJcIFYw7h8jBIyEafbGkMxBxKHPhUpxAVRwPwJRLeWqBGOPXWF-72uK6di3n0lAZrrqwDRuiZFsZx4q70iNgBWHOMvMyd71m2u9IqU_mHHYKIrXnFYbP_i0wTnutpF5sLocwBBQRCsz6dgSIhqT1i33itz19_rR348rMUR96ZU13xWbIhMXIxgr6gpYlO0ioLMkFtdJVKj8zm2IG0YmUujhCYOYjE83OsZ3M8ru0HNf26HS9RGoiStDw8J--qN-4tiCOsaImZyhY1Xw9AKxhHqoT3CTEAsWPKERpzis-AKzKoMg0nsYKhkRomcZ0q3-xKRBED7XjU3e4oBsTMPV0Tz9DakxbUF2c9jQSsh6tUg-s7GQ1D-F8JzurpAFbx-fbk_xOtWrNuVvyZ86J94g%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ced33954b0b04a95bcee00805ada23c4&_e=MDcEJcIFYw7h8jBIyEafbGkMxBxKHPhUpxAVRwPwJRLeWqBGOPXWF-72uK6di3n0lAZrrqwDRuiZFsZx4q70iNgBWHOMvMyd71m2u9IqU_mHHYKIrXnFYbP_i0wTnutpF5sLocwBBQRCsz6dgSIhqT1i33itz19_rR348rMUR96ZU13xWbIhMXIxgr6gpYlO0ioLMkFtdJVKj8zm2IG0YmUujhCYOYjE83OsZ3M8ru0HNf26HS9RGoiStDw8J--qajJizlEn1o_08CfGUw4IRVzJoP6UrokX8MGCInbpPx5kAZ7QmPu5_6SVU4nCIOHmPT9Hedu-0Msr38O85heKSVXVucRhWgm9XknomxvljdHbpJKaoIlTi5_9TuFg5FD315dCmEeON2txVDpR71WJ_w%3D%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ced33954b0b04a95bcee00805ada23c4&_e=MDcEJcIFYw7h8jBIyEafbGkMxBxKHPhUpxAVRwPwJRLeWqBGOPXWF-72uK6di3n0lAZrrqwDRuiZFsZx4q70iNgBWHOMvMyd71m2u9IqU_mHHYKIrXnFYbP_i0wTnutpF5sLocwBBQRCsz6dgSIhqT1i33itz19_rR348rMUR96ZU13xWbIhMXIxgr6gpYlO0ioLMkFtdJVKj8zm2IG0YmUujhCYOYjE83OsZ3M8ru0HNf26HS9RGoiStDw8J--q1pd2ts4GsaSkXbvsTMCCE7BZ2sj2sMZ2yHOwmbbi3U1UpfMsYkQHJfMHqeVOcXR2UtCFLBdOLmCMJoCEWDHh-qBOhWxhGXghT2QU89MK0lOECmtsozoUXZ8CQMiX2LKArAV4EEbA8d1YTZfZRyoZPA%3D%3D) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Conservatives Give
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=ced33954b0b04a95bcee00805ada23c4&_t=Dtd0QG3liG77opbDv2tDRCIldMEi7778XVy9EoHfHXqQmoM6La-BkJhBHUsCfrC3ncWgJtQTwFVba622x3I_C5FzI1Ow5zHqo8GQu9hHjI8uUn1jdMa6Y3oM4cBfRPOe9mXuur2LQTXiQmCwelZBFmxvsFBUmsnYnbfAF_2Zzps%3D)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ced33954b0b04a95bcee00805ada23c4&_e=sfusNfBDo4AoQeecWF5xVo93MHjARiUBd9afGhGPoCFegpyTjmsp3okaEqJGIWQyj4fITryB-fH4mA41gjT5rAlsdamK28l3Oyy3TcbsSAGo8-bHpexxNdPcV1ouEzhhfn0wxbCl5MuO-QE69D5w8h3mFysCMp4BGbGcTr40gYijsJ5mev3cxL6El9A6PX1P_-jSPIbMLVXeettEzHXfYzhIb_elanOJtJ8gdAfEyisthLGxQc6tGcd4NVPFLRMNu1UCG_e6RPiCinLxgBr3VQ%3D%3D)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ced33954b0b04a95bcee00805ada23c4&_e=MDcEJcIFYw7h8jBIyEafbAPYncweZ1mDQj11H7NPkyhy9eNpMOU9swiM84XwKDHx2zV7VekV_ypIgn0Fy0UZlwT1iTJG0uFIv6H13EhfHhz4m0U6IDscB4t1BdQFZUysVWvXPs48S8wGkA99KTZWe8iCMyfdGunJHuhbel_Gb2zul2p1brQWaXzwLo1U6BxcWXLinvyH6rPXtvYMjaMvwFp01k2hg9qByqOvHtNp2Ls%3D)_

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dcd01a7c350a4b119e41bea6fe59fd45&_e=UTj7B-h6ght-KegOnVdawR92OwHli0-qsl9czqA73ShpJ3nCfffNMmi_npIXeew_y_fJBF52goCqliJ3-pBdQhr6GXFpx4856efC6QxUcFOsaoUkSwrq4pIp2YFLpsI1lPy8-OAuIrtfy0-qfn7PzCp_uAoXcquSKgKY9ggiBnOzhc8y8ioX5_PtbAco-TFt3Z8eDHUAH-w1iVZ8UeR-CupIurRMhfIgsgpQuhggBPgDjHFGahTlr_KjsGHI9_hN3Gmj7c9Vp-oki-5SqmvEW6Ox8L2frXJSPpsgJt2doz0%3D)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dcd01a7c350a4b119e41bea6fe59fd45&_e=UTj7B-h6ght-KegOnVdawR92OwHli0-qsl9czqA73ShpJ3nCfffNMmi_npIXeew_y_fJBF52goCqliJ3-pBdQhr6GXFpx4856efC6QxUcFOsaoUkSwrq4pIp2YFLpsI1lPy8-OAuIrtfy0-qfn7PzNZuBe7IUjcplwNFzbQfOzRMV5Q76x0x-GQQq3VcV5UuBpQaZp1hnNvtdPGAkStw4G-JJWddDfVdCFrvQmgf4Df5M25BfZcwapb0zDrrBmdjI-zFvA6PHaTq-4SJoMwdqV5y-K_a3_ns7jRGnTDtWJM%3D)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dcd01a7c350a4b119e41bea6fe59fd45&_e=UTj7B-h6ght-KegOnVdawR92OwHli0-qsl9czqA73ShpJ3nCfffNMmi_npIXeew_y_fJBF52goCqliJ3-pBdQhr6GXFpx4856efC6QxUcFOsaoUkSwrq4pIp2YFLpsI1lPy8-OAuIrtfy0-qfn7PzDH7j1ciqv1h5lUD3jrkuTlW5RxE3eOee0gefOKAeR_zJPpt0PypkONz4B_94yHcI4QGPk7OauxqDzhpz-3gBTjMNCSqVBQPyMcLjfj-PtkOOrjY5arjKM_9eKk0pUlaDRcqmqE9dZS2OvGSlt8suJI%3D)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dcd01a7c350a4b119e41bea6fe59fd45&_e=UTj7B-h6ght-KegOnVdawR92OwHli0-qsl9czqA73ShpJ3nCfffNMmi_npIXeew_y_fJBF52goCqliJ3-pBdQhr6GXFpx4856efC6QxUcFOsaoUkSwrq4pIp2YFLpsI1lPy8-OAuIrtfy0-qfn7PzPIGUBiCwHyujrMDffYV5hZOCHH81X2n1CDCWTqFu4hbhNMg6u7HcflhQvz052IKqOZxOjnTgxlkSM4viHzpU9v5JCqr9zTUOrLeNIZujePs8Px3Cs23RZYBDGIcHdsGoBeAmJ1kGXllX0JOZ_NjlXg%3D)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dcd01a7c350a4b119e41bea6fe59fd45&_e=UTj7B-h6ght-KegOnVdawR92OwHli0-qsl9czqA73ShpJ3nCfffNMmi_npIXeew_y_fJBF52goCqliJ3-pBdQhr6GXFpx4856efC6QxUcFOsaoUkSwrq4pIp2YFLpsI1lPy8-OAuIrtfy0-qfn7PzNQLAqBtIjaNcPh493D3BSShKyz-JATzuj1PTdUpatDt31YpQXWxAlSvNGwB8UHKxGh-RSrMQ8Ga2yztmtNShUMxlGHTDoF7p3cOnwt2u8WCEgpdXvW97glOw0kGvseKRiygu00IPuf7u21iXahI1Gg%3D)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dcd01a7c350a4b119e41bea6fe59fd45&_e=UTj7B-h6ght-KegOnVdawR92OwHli0-qsl9czqA73ShpJ3nCfffNMmi_npIXeew_y_fJBF52goCqliJ3-pBdQhr6GXFpx4856efC6QxUcFOsaoUkSwrq4pIp2YFLpsI1lPy8-OAuIrtfy0-qfn7PzM8CtMHKjr3NpYOxNyZOWfwMO7SzaykAlerASikVX-8RiPl4y0DHBrYCi3Kk8wKWDbSbOyEmuMH6nRtXiOwbbrdJq621aEyu6kBPU-njDeflyuZAgluaf-jCoUWqWzLw77Zznd-8Ziov5HbVXe8qrFs%3D)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. clean_body: I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Friend, This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation. For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop. In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. Now I 'll share my story... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities. Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking. We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals. This is WRONG. I've dealt with racism... I 've even received death threats. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable. But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up. I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. I am breaking the rules. It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... I 'm not doing that. You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country. So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss). When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing. Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: 4,211 signatures needed to help save vulnerable polar bears from Big Oil
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1864861?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Polar bears are on the path to EXTINCTION due to Big Oil Arctic drilling and pollution![Act NOW!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1864862?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** **Time is running out Friend.** The Arctic ice is _melting**FAST.** _Polar bears are hungry, weak, and **CLINGING** to survival... all the while, Big Oil is profiting from **destroying our planet with oil drilling and fracking.** The Arctic’s landscape is one of nature’s most majestic places -- high snowy mountain peaks that reach clouds to glaciers and icebergs that cover the sparkling blue icy waters. Arctic species and the ecosystem rely on the cold, rigid climate to _eat, reproduce, and survive._ With the Arctic melting **TWICE as FAST** as the rest of the world, this wonderous place and the creatures that call it home, like polar bears, are at the _BRINK_ of **EXTINCTION.** [**The existence of these beloved creatures now falls on us, Friend. We need you to tell FWS to STOP Arctic drilling! Will you fight back with us and PROTECT vulnerable polar bears by taking action NOW? >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1864863?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1864864?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
_Friend, how long will we let the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service (FWS) appease the fossil fuel industry and put Big Oil profits above our polar bears and our planet?_
Greedy fossil fuel companies are endangering vulnerable polar bears by DESTROYING their habitats and hunting grounds. In fact, studies have shown that the current technology used to detect these gentle giants’ dens can be _**inaccurate.**_ This can result in polar bears and cubs being**CRUSHED,**_run over, or buried alive by oil drilling machinery._
That’s not all, Friend. The U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service (FWS) also confirmed that there is a**95% probability** that permitting this drilling activity will _cause serious injury or death to polar bears._ We need accountability and protection of our planet and its inhabitants. Will you sit by while the federal government gives **_dirty energy handouts_** to the fossil fuel industry? Or will you speak up today and fight back to DEFEND voiceless polar bears from corporate greed? [**Take action NOW to demand that FWS does NOT authorize dangerous expanded oil and gas activities in the Arctic! >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1864865?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1864864?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

[**July 6, 1928:** "Lights of New York," the first-ever all-talking motion picture, made its premiere at the renowned Strand Theatre. This groundbreaking event marked a major milestone in the film industry, revolutionizing the way stories were told on the big screen.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=e210d7fe9b4f4b3184c56d4c9c0786e0&_e=khTgc7Xdm6Od3Y5MBCmdMbS31AtvTMgotp-guUlLkeEKZV983W5obiBVP94rO9vTkAIz13wVG0LdnoHKsf7otAz7BHz8PMxFXZ65RUNIkHN8NC5YlcZvJgqWP51qiMVfy2UCEMZAy6_EM08KdqSMJl9AJiHEqvXSISXKT0JpYT3cN25Q77XrRvIxXLneAWV-pdR6w4sDUTKThkJ1nQpgHvgmQmAgzrt6PblO7psMXjxKSArZKFBspoa7cR2EtJCtkjDQYKy3UGYOaJ3yPYpsboje2--SwWsTsWlOmJGIg_6jCV6SBnvM6qf7pckAoiK6pQbfu1-bdxhAF9k-FGzQ2Q%3D%3D) **Source -[untappedcities.com](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=e210d7fe9b4f4b3184c56d4c9c0786e0&_e=khTgc7Xdm6Od3Y5MBCmdMbS31AtvTMgotp-guUlLkeEKZV983W5obiBVP94rO9vTkAIz13wVG0LdnoHKsf7otAz7BHz8PMxFXZ65RUNIkHN8NC5YlcZvJgqWP51qiMVfy2UCEMZAy6_EM08KdqSMJl9AJiHEqvXSISXKT0JpYT3cN25Q77XrRvIxXLneAWV-2ggHxLB0hwB98-lP8OaWmr0bnTLOoPE9dUy_OJZWyM23im9IKPdSf1fJc-12oc-z5f2HFgyxyPhV2J6nXTfN-CoTS5Xmm-DFKFIY54gyB2yA5g59DcfByhytGjwJbCRspT0uKlY8A62cLGOp9vjHng%3D%3D)**

[**July 6, 1957:** The encounter occurred when Lennon's band, The Quarrymen, were performing at the St. Peter's Church fete in Liverpool. McCartney was introduced to Lennon through a mutual friend. This brief meeting marked the beginning of an extraordinary partnership that would shape the course of popular music. Little did they know that this chance encounter would lead to the formation of The Beatles, one of the most beloved bands in music history.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=e210d7fe9b4f4b3184c56d4c9c0786e0&_e=khTgc7Xdm6Od3Y5MBCmdMbS31AtvTMgotp-guUlLkeHMffFRS082ObzvEjUGNhpbHiH4ZVh-zUe6JfkQwJiLsDySzdhpBTMtYGn7HZWYE23RVrPI9QN1F-1-Cd2hatkKT264Qw9_PvujdEmVGpghnKsdK0xmLQJxBqbL_OX00Zw-Ak5ttQat0V0xg3vDSmkip2ndJlMP2uaFZ9AVU2JatG7Oi6znWgOyDJBlklwQTtcFRN4MEAtLNgYdkA8Qed7Be66oAmRke0lhWpzJQSgSBQ%3D%3D) **Source -[history.com](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=e210d7fe9b4f4b3184c56d4c9c0786e0&_e=khTgc7Xdm6Od3Y5MBCmdMbS31AtvTMgotp-guUlLkeHMffFRS082ObzvEjUGNhpbHiH4ZVh-zUe6JfkQwJiLsDySzdhpBTMtYGn7HZWYE23RVrPI9QN1F-1-Cd2hatkKBSlPdKQusmEntOljBe1onjlAPoRacggtaMEHXnHmftYMoZ6vZp9eOWanRfpk5xprqvksviSH72ckkTfEuW4WAmVSlgHRFJv05xwFjARgRJWhA9lrxZowx08qFqH0Bv7SnrBjjkdS8c5N8OgISsgc5w%3D%3D)**

name: Team Engel
subject: Juan Ciscomani is bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Juan Ciscomani was on the front page of the Arizona Republic, but not for reasons that will make him or his campaign happy.
Ciscomani has done everything he could to dodge questions about abortion while on the campaign trail, including deleting his own tweets. Last year, he literally ran away from voters when asked about it.
But here's the kicker: even though he wants to avoid talking about abortion, he's already taken multiple votes to attack reproductive rights across the country — including to limit access to mifepristone, one of the most common abortion pills.
https://www.azcentral.com/story/news/politics/arizona/2023/06/30/democrats-to-challenge-juan-ciscomani-on-abortion-in-2024-election/70367189007/ [https://www.azcentral.com/story/news/politics/arizona/2023/06/30/democrats-to-challenge-juan-ciscomani-on-abortion-in-2024-election/70367189007/]
Ciscomani can try to avoid this issue, but that's not an option for the millions of women living in states with new abortion restrictions since Roe was overturned, including here in Arizona.
Polling has shown that Arizonans are overwhelmingly pro-choice. Kirsten Engel will be our champion in Congress — fighting to protect and expand our fundamental rights, not restrict them. But to win this seat, we need to keep getting Kirsten's message out.
Last year, we were outspent 6:1. But even up against that spending, we only lost by one percentage point.
We have a major opportunity to flip this seat next November. Our campaign is already getting support from outside Democratic organizations, but a strong grassroots network will be just as important.
Whatever you can donate now will make a difference. These early months of the campaign are crucial, and we need to capitalize off the momentum of this article. Will you chip in here? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_070623_Article_Act]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_070623_Article_Act]
Thank you so much!
— Team Engel
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_070623_Article_Act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_070623_Article_Act] Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer.
She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District.

clean_body: [] Juan Ciscomani was on the front page of the Arizona Republic, but not for reasons that will make him or his campaign happy. Ciscomani has done everything he could to dodge questions about abortion while on the campaign trail, including deleting his own tweets. Last year, he literally ran away from voters when asked about it. But here's the kicker: even though he wants to avoid talking about abortion, he's already taken multiple votes to attack reproductive rights across the country — including to limit access to mifepristone, one of the most common abortion pills. [] Ciscomani can try to avoid this issue, but that's not an option for the millions of women living in states with new abortion restrictions since Roe was overturned, including here in Arizona. Polling has shown that Arizonans are overwhelmingly pro-choice. Kirsten Engel will be our champion in Congress — fighting to protect and expand our fundamental rights, not restrict them. But to win this seat, we need to keep getting Kirsten's message out. Last year, we were outspent 6:1. But even up against that spending, we only lost by one percentage point. We have a major opportunity to flip this seat next November. Our campaign is already getting support from outside Democratic organizations, but a strong grassroots network will be just as important. Whatever you can donate now will make a difference. These early months of the campaign are crucial, and we need to capitalize off the momentum of this article. Will you chip in here? [] DONATE NOW [] Thank you so much! — Team Engel [] Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

of $5 or more clean_body: The first ever BOC program is now underway. | | Peter, A little over a year ago, we set out to change the way we did politics: from the ground up, with courage, kindness, authenticity, and a healthy dose of scrappy. Together, we built a community-centered campaign dedicated to Vermont, allowing us to elect a queer middle school teacher from Brattleboro to be our state’s very first congresswoman! Now, Becca is sharing her wisdom and learnings with Vermont’s next generation of organizers through her signature program, Balint Organizing Corps (BOC)! = Our inaugural BOC class is officially underway from now through August! This six-week program will train and mentor young Vermonters and future campaign staffers who want to shape the future of our state by electing progressive, forward-thinking leaders to every level of public office! We were able to launch BOC with small contributions from people like you! But in order to keep our efforts going year round, we need ongoing support from our grassroots team. = = = = Every dollar donated to BOC allows us to fully-staff this program and pay each class member $15/hour for their work and state-wide organizing efforts. We know that change doesn't happen with one person or campaign. It’s a team effort built cycle-over-cycle, and starts with planting the seeds of passion and political power in young people across Vermont. Thank you for helping support these young leaders who are ready to make a difference in the future of progressive politics in our state! – Team Becca = If you'd like to receive fewer emails and only see our most important updates, **If you'd rather not stay up to date with Becca's work, you can . If you prefer to contribute by check, you are welcome to send a contribution to the campaign at the address below. To comply with Federal law, we must use our best efforts to obtain, maintain and submit the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle. Thank you in advance for including that information along with your check. | Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont Becca for Vermont P.O. Box 291 Burlington, VT 05302 United States

subject: Out work the hate
body:
While Republicans make disgusting remarks to rile up their bigoted base, Cori is showing real leadership.
#
Peter, Megyn Kelly just went after Cori Bush for speaking truth to power about the 4th of July:
[Cori Bush is under attack and we need your help to fight back. Please rush a split contribution right now.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/135523?refcode=em20230706-29767&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=29767%2E1203867%2Eatb3RU)
As the first Black woman to represent Missouri in Congress, Cori has a deep understanding of America’s historical relationship to independence and equity. She understands the long term, generational impact felt by families of the formerly enslaved that continues today.
That’s why she used July 4th to highlight her call for reparations with the facts of our nation’s founding.
**She was immediately attacked by Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene, the National Republican Senatorial Committee, and former Fox News host and right-wing media personality Megyn Kelly.**
[Cori needs the resources to push back in the face of GOP hate. Please split a $3 contribution between Cori Bush and Justice Democrats right now to help them fight back against these ring-wing attacks.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/135523?refcode=em20230706-29767&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=29767%2E1203867%2Eatb3RU)
**[Donate](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/135523?refcode=em20230706-29767&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=29767%2E1203867%2Eatb3RU)**
Throughout our country’s history, the federal government has enslaved and exploited people of African descent. This anti-Black racism is built into our country’s institutions, including our criminal legal system, housing, education, and healthcare.
In Cori’s home state of Missouri, Black people are almost 5 times more likely to be killed by police compared to white people. In the U.S., Black people die at 3 times the rate of white people during childbirth.
Across the country, Black people are also 3.6 times more likely to be arrested for cannabis possession than white people, despite using it at similar rates. Arrests and convictions have lifelong impacts that deny people of their basic rights, including voting rights and opportunities for housing and employment.
**This is all part of the legacy of chattel slavery and its evolutions, such as Jim Crow, segregation, and redlining.**
While Republicans make disgusting remarks to rile up their bigoted base, **Cori is showing real leadership, addressing anti-Black injustices including introducing the Reparations Now Resolution** , which recognizes the federal government’s responsibility to provide reparations for the enslavement of Africans -- and for the harm our government continues to inflict on millions of Black people.
[Cori is a bold leader for justice and she will not back down to right-wing hate. Split a contribution today to show Cori you have her back in the face of Republican attacks.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/135523?refcode=em20230706-29767&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=29767%2E1203867%2Eatb3RU)
**[Contribute $3](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/135523?refcode=em20230706-29767&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=29767%2E1203867%2Eatb3RU)**
Together, we will out-work the hate and create a truly multiracial democracy where we all can thrive.
Thank you,
Team Cori
Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=24&akid=29767%2E1203867%2Eatb3RU) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=25&akid=29767%2E1203867%2Eatb3RU) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230706-29767-footer&t=26&refcode2=29767_1203867_atb3RU&akid=29767%2E1203867%2Eatb3RU)**

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: Take Our Poll: Who Is the Best Candidate to Protect the Unborn?
body:
the 2024 presidential election is quickly approaching

| [ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a57dafd0eb804ee18c03063f54202a95&_e=S-fsTIAExeQY1BO4jj6fPo-mtXwd1L1mdsZImGpPBLh-68c3fgMJ2wpqZ5gSqoyS21QFWGhDLwUxVuQzu9bXuXVw7OFlJA2LP5bdgMegBlnwLA2PStssT6Z1toqwplJkpLSbyHgU2MXZlRxAUXURaFKbjaQXdY6EQpRXfP0eu-_UT1RzWX3P0Iq4yUWOpQWMeSDmffKbK1TyV79H1E7a2x2a5ArHMqrbrC0ObAjSIizJCv0zV7N5tVf8X8oyFbW4VPBCqI_gjK0LezpjsLZlhF1gprjRRQwYm8tCnZPC2g47r3-5sGiPc_x-m8JQKHKjFpvB0wXoES4q-AMtPEk0EE8tU72c4KUIgNRvTIWGd5rC9XK3ZZ2KhwArJ_skniVxUPAcGmn8oc4dZGhc0T4kFXVqJkT2JN9MKf_eyYTvfgbC6hGnAj4HyN5cWY-Z6YEI)

#
Hello Pro-Life Supporter,

As you know, the 2024 presidential election is quickly approaching, and [**it's more important than ever for us to make our voices heard.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a57dafd0eb804ee18c03063f54202a95&_e=S-fsTIAExeQY1BO4jj6fPo-mtXwd1L1mdsZImGpPBLh-68c3fgMJ2wpqZ5gSqoyS21QFWGhDLwUxVuQzu9bXuXVw7OFlJA2LP5bdgMegBlnwLA2PStssT6Z1toqwplJkpLSbyHgU2MXZlRxAUXURaFKbjaQXdY6EQpRXfP0eu-_UT1RzWX3P0Iq4yUWOpQWMeSDmffKbK1TyV79H1E7a2x2a5ArHMqrbrC0ObAjSIizJCv0zV7N5tVf8X8oyFbW4VPBCqI_gjK0LezpjsLZlhF1gprjRRQwYm8tCnZPC2g5LIBD04zrMBWofTXAEZ9GiuaK115UGKpSxUlQzlLaYAtB4jxjoi47WA6RFWkpb45odCjX6UCHKHCAzXNgTvkYKWAvX5u6OeIVhWrvg4dgVUJDR-vMSjbsCw25NTqqjyANC-D7-D3AnfVW1wF7tRxI2) There are a number of candidates who have pledged to defend the unborn, but not all of them are created equal.

Here at SBA Pro-Life America, we are committed to educating voters on which candidate supports the end of abortion and passionately defends a child's right to life. And we want to hear from you!

[**Who do you think will be the National Defender of Life in 2024?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a57dafd0eb804ee18c03063f54202a95&_e=S-fsTIAExeQY1BO4jj6fPo-mtXwd1L1mdsZImGpPBLh-68c3fgMJ2wpqZ5gSqoyS21QFWGhDLwUxVuQzu9bXuXVw7OFlJA2LP5bdgMegBlnwLA2PStssT6Z1toqwplJkpLSbyHgU2MXZlRxAUXURaFKbjaQXdY6EQpRXfP0eu-_UT1RzWX3P0Iq4yUWOpQWMeSDmffKbK1TyV79H1E7a2x2a5ArHMqrbrC0ObAjSIizJCv0zV7N5tVf8X8oyFbW4VPBCqI_gjK0LezpjsLZlhF1gprjRRQwYm8tCnZPC2g6KOr2_L5TGwqPSoTanM4FHqEawmtHd2pBLmw1wuXFSnMHm1QCSC5V3uvq2_sw9qeA9WTsRNEWxwu_zE0oA4LH5L_6rWNEj6T5JmYns17AGRyUhJC9TEyD7O8Ynv5JWcIa_kFlusCI9PIO1RkG-2e9o)

It is more important than ever for voters to make their voices heard. As a pro-life American, you have a critical role in ensuring our elected officials will protect unborn children and their mothers.

The poll is quick and easy to take, and it will help us know who pro-life voters believe will be the National Defender of Life in 2024.

You can participate in this short, 3-minute poll and share your views on the pro-life movement and the candidates at this link: [**https://action.sbaprolife.org/best-presidential-candidate-poll**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a57dafd0eb804ee18c03063f54202a95&_e=S-fsTIAExeQY1BO4jj6fPo-mtXwd1L1mdsZImGpPBLh-68c3fgMJ2wpqZ5gSqoyS21QFWGhDLwUxVuQzu9bXuXVw7OFlJA2LP5bdgMegBlnwLA2PStssT6Z1toqwplJkpLSbyHgU2MXZlRxAUXURaFKbjaQXdY6EQpRXfP0eu-_UT1RzWX3P0Iq4yUWOpQWMeSDmffKbK1TyV79H1E7a2x2a5ArHMqrbrC0ObAjSIizJCv0zV7N5tVf8X8oyFbW4VPBCqI_gjK0LezpjsLZlhF1gprjRRQwYm8tCnZPC2g7uVBOxE3GZBs3doMAiCUEn8I_RqKhF5MvEDQ4xTpAIoK2511GYR3uAjqiEMZ4kvK2QaZcOPo2dBOZIZJkJtockEBFfwlq9u8yV-hvfJTM938mRsCCsgyQz5tKIchLbLa7nqQ0N7W6ud7zXV-jHn8Bt)

Thank you for making your voice heard on who you believe is the best pro-life presidential candidate for 2024.

For LIFE,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America, 2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr., PO Box 803, Arlington, VA, 22206

Reclaiming American Freedom

subject: Here's what Derek has been fighting for in the House Appropriations Committee:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
"When it comes to funding the programs overseen by the federal government, the Appropriations Committee is ‘the room where it happens.'"

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66080482/415262436/1325108145?ms=em23_230706_approp_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&refcode=em23_230706_approp_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&source=em23_230706_approp_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230706_approp_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=Y60jTfdcTPWVj6oumNTR7xGR4tGUsCl0aQv5yRB9JxsmktD2N05rXL46fwXttkJYKEbjvXqoMoikfSOsvq+3Qu145zgKV6Y+2PC2KaMhDz3rY5pjALYNj9dn1I7mRCc6IW6GKdKAW5jthiqSoqMQPmIFkG0b2yL6z7fbA+XuPLU=&refcode2=d9c76a8d-411c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDljNzZhOGQtNDExYy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YBbW3f-iBLm2HcXFTyuAJWWG1S0OnmCJ-MNCcaJ3UXs=&emci=86750ec4-171c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=d9c76a8d-411c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)
**"On Appropriations, Kilmer brings home the bacon"**
Peter,

Derek is literally in the room where it happens. As a member of the House Committee on Appropriations, Derek is bringing home tangible investments in our region — _and all of Washington State._

**Take a look at what Derek's been fighting for:**
1. Investing in the Gorst resiliency project to fix the transportation challenges and ensure the Gorst corridor remains open and provides access to the shipyard during a natural disaster.

2. Building a new breakwater at the Port Orchard Marina, which is past its 25-year lifespan.

3. Investing in low-income housing in Bremerton, preserving properties, and providing affordable housing for fellow residents.

[SIGN ON IN SUPPORT!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66080483/415262437/1325108145?ms=em23_230706_approp_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&refcode=em23_230706_approp_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&source=em23_230706_approp_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230706_approp_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=Y60jTfdcTPWVj6oumNTR7xGR4tGUsCl0aQv5yRB9JxsmktD2N05rXL46fwXttkJYKEbjvXqoMoikfSOsvq+3Qu145zgKV6Y+2PC2KaMhDz3rY5pjALYNj9dn1I7mRCc6IW6GKdKAW5jthiqSoqMQPmIFkG0b2yL6z7fbA+XuPLU=&refcode2=d9c76a8d-411c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDljNzZhOGQtNDExYy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YBbW3f-iBLm2HcXFTyuAJWWG1S0OnmCJ-MNCcaJ3UXs=&emci=86750ec4-171c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=d9c76a8d-411c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)
By investing in infrastructure, we can create jobs, improve transportation, and provide affordable housing options for the people who need it. But none of this work is possible without your support.

**[Can Derek count on you to sign on in support of his work on the Appropriations Committee today? Your engagement is crucial to ensuring that our community's needs are represented and prioritized at the federal level.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66080484/415262438/1325108145?ms=em23_230706_approp_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&refcode=em23_230706_approp_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&source=em23_230706_approp_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230706_approp_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=Y60jTfdcTPWVj6oumNTR7xGR4tGUsCl0aQv5yRB9JxsmktD2N05rXL46fwXttkJYKEbjvXqoMoikfSOsvq+3Qu145zgKV6Y+2PC2KaMhDz3rY5pjALYNj9dn1I7mRCc6IW6GKdKAW5jthiqSoqMQPmIFkG0b2yL6z7fbA+XuPLU=&refcode2=d9c76a8d-411c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDljNzZhOGQtNDExYy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YBbW3f-iBLm2HcXFTyuAJWWG1S0OnmCJ-MNCcaJ3UXs=&emci=86750ec4-171c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=d9c76a8d-411c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)**

clean_body: "When it comes to funding the programs overseen by the federal government, the Appropriations Committee is ‘the room where it happens.'" "On Appropriations, Kilmer brings home the bacon" Peter, Derek is literally in the room where it happens. As a member of the House Committee on Appropriations, Derek is bringing home tangible investments in our region — and all of Washington State. Take a look at what Derek's been fighting for: 1. Investing in the Gorst resiliency project to fix the transportation challenges and ensure the Gorst corridor remains open and provides access to the shipyard during a natural disaster. 2. Building a new breakwater at the Port Orchard Marina, which is past its 25-year lifespan. 3. Investing in low-income housing in Bremerton, preserving properties, and providing affordable housing for fellow residents. By investing in infrastructure, we can create jobs, improve transportation, and provide affordable housing options for the people who need it. But none of this work is possible without your support. Thanks for your help, Team Kilmer Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign. = = Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer People for Derek Kilmer PO Box 1381 Tacoma, WA 98402 United States Peter, thank you so much for being a supporter of Derek Kilmer and Democrats up and down the ballot. | =

subject: Sharice needs you to take a stand for LGBTQ+ rights→
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| The recent Supreme Court ruling to allow discrimination against LGBTQ+ Americans is outrageous.

It’s disheartening to see the highest court in the land—which is meant to protect the right to liberty and freedom for ALL—move towards extremism. They’ve turned back the clock on equality and, team, we need to stand up against this ruling right away.

**[Join Sharice in condemning this decision to discriminate against LGBTQ+ Americans by signing our petition in the next 24 hours:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66080499/415262456/-1154848912?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230706_PT_SCLGBTQ_1.1_0_3MO_campaign_NA_NA_scotusruling&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2M3NmE4ZC00MTFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XyTDFWSy4Pp7Uj020U42bwWKdzNni8uZimXKs_n21k4=&emci=154b6e70-401c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=dcc76a8d-411c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=22117458)** | | [Sign On](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66080502/415262459/-1154848912?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230706_PT_SCLGBTQ_1.1_0_3MO_campaign_NA_NA_scotusruling&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2M3NmE4ZC00MTFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XyTDFWSy4Pp7Uj020U42bwWKdzNni8uZimXKs_n21k4=&emci=154b6e70-401c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=dcc76a8d-411c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=22117458)

Standing up for all of our freedoms is a top priority of Sharice in Congress. She introduced the Respect for Marriage Act, which became law late last year, because she saw the court was moving in the direction of banning marriage equality and she wanted to make sure it was protected no matter what they did.

Sharice also just reintroduced the Equality Act to curb discrimination in the workplace and introduced the Pride in Mental Health Act to combat the high rates of suicidal thoughts in LGBTQ+ kids.

**Sharice will never stop fighting for equality for all, regardless of race, gender, or who you love.**

This ruling will not only impact the LGBTQ+ community, but could open the doors for discrimination against other minority groups. We must do what we can to show we’re not backing down—we will fight back at the ballot box and win.

**[Help us reach 5,000 signatures in the next 24 hours to prove to the Supreme Court that Kansans will not just accept this discriminatory ruling.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66080504/415262461/-1154848912?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230706_PT_SCLGBTQ_1.1_0_3MO_campaign_NA_NA_scotusruling&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2M3NmE4ZC00MTFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XyTDFWSy4Pp7Uj020U42bwWKdzNni8uZimXKs_n21k4=&emci=154b6e70-401c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=dcc76a8d-411c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=22117458)**

Keep the faith—and let’s keep fighting!

Thank you,
Team Sharice
