Hey, I went on MSNBC to talk about Florida's Concealed Carry law **(I like to call it “Political” Carry)** that went into effect July 1. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66080516/415262532/-349209661?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=JMFC_20230706_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzI3NDRiYi00MTFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Bw7IO5Sza5DagJmFz4m3QvS6NKJ_lY2xUnpQXiKsRIw=) Do you know how many guns are currently in America? Take a guess.

**400 million.** That’s how many guns are in America.

The NRA-backed Republican House is continuously rolling back gun violence prevention laws that we are fighting to keep and expand.

After Parkland, I knew something had to be done. So, I worked with my colleagues across the aisle — many of whom were rated A+ by the NRA — and PASSED the Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School Public Safety Act. It raised the age to buy guns from 18 to 21 and instituted red flag laws, which have been used more than 9,000 times since 2018. This was all done with bipartisan support under a Republican legislature and signed into law by a Republican governor.

[**We need more gun violence champions in Congress, team, to work across the aisle for solutions. I’m fighting day in and day out to end this crisis. Will you chip in just $7 to my campaign today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66080517/415262533/-349209661?amount=7&refcode=JMFC_20230706_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzI3NDRiYi00MTFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Bw7IO5Sza5DagJmFz4m3QvS6NKJ_lY2xUnpQXiKsRIw=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66080518/415262534/-349209661?amount=5&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&refcode=JMFC_20230706_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzI3NDRiYi00MTFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Bw7IO5Sza5DagJmFz4m3QvS6NKJ_lY2xUnpQXiKsRIw=)

clean_body: | = Hey, I went on MSNBC to talk about Florida's Concealed Carry law (I like to call it “Political” Carry) that went into effect July 1. = Do you know how many guns are currently in America? Take a guess. 400 million. That’s how many guns are in America. The NRA-backed Republican House is continuously rolling back gun violence prevention laws that we are fighting to keep and expand. After Parkland, I knew something had to be done. So, I worked with my colleagues across the aisle — many of whom were rated A+ by the NRA — and PASSED the Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School Public Safety Act. It raised the age to buy guns from 18 to 21 and instituted red flag laws, which have been used more than 9,000 times since 2018. This was all done with bipartisan support under a Republican legislature and signed into law by a Republican governor. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = It means a lot, Jared | | Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress P.O. body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_070623_Survey_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_070623_Survey_act]
Hi team! We hope you had a good holiday weekend.
It’s hard to believe that we’re already halfway through 2023.
Michael wants to hear from you as he plans his agenda for the rest of the year. You can let him know where you stand by filling out our Supporter Priorities Survey here. [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/supporter-priorities-survey-2]
Nothing is more important to Michael than hearing directly from his constituents.
He will always fight for legislation that makes a difference in the lives of Colorado families — like expanding the Child Tax Credit, supporting working parents, and protecting our public lands for our children and grandchildren.
By filling out this survey, you can let Michael know what issues you care about, and what you want to see him fighting for.
We created a personalized link to the Supporter Priorities Survey just for you. It will only take a minute — will you fill it out now?

clean_body: [] Hi team! We hope you had a good holiday weekend. It’s hard to believe that we’re already halfway through 2023. Michael wants to hear from you as he plans his agenda for the rest of the year. You can let him know where you stand by filling out our Supporter Priorities Survey here. [] Nothing is more important to Michael than hearing directly from his constituents. He will always fight for legislation that makes a difference in the lives of Colorado families — like expanding the Child Tax Credit, supporting working parents, and protecting our public lands for our children and grandchildren. By filling out this survey, you can let Michael know what issues you care about, and what you want to see him fighting for. We created a personalized link to the Supporter Priorities Survey just for you. It will only take a minute — will you fill it out now? michaelbennet.com/a/supporter-priorities-survey-2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com [] FILL OUT OUR SURVEY >> [] FILL OUT OUR SURVEY >> [] Thank you! — Team Bennet Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States WWW.MICHAELBENNET.COM [] | INFO@MICHAELBENNET.COM [info@michaelbennet.com] | PRIVACY POLICY [] PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO CLICK HERE TO RECEIVE FEWER EMAILS FROM OUR CAMPAIGN [] By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: Freedom Virginia
subject: re: student loan forgiveness

body:
The Supreme Court's ruling on student loan forgiveness will undermine the economic opportunity of working and middle class families and perpetuate income inequality in Virginia and across the nation.

| | | **Supreme Court strikes down Biden’s student debt relief plan**

_-Politico_
---
| [TAKE ACTION! ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66080856/415263572/624659205?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS84NTU2NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjhjMTZmNy00MjFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DmChqDzB6UM7Xvw0u-EKb993zqNbzPI2wtE4wc597lA=&emci=bacfe5ef-421c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=a28c16f7-421c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=6782597)
---
Peter,

Last week, the Supreme Court struck down President Biden’s student loan forgiveness plan. _**But the fight isn’t over.**_

Thousands of Virginians are already struggling to cope with the skyrocketing costs of living and still recovering from the impacts of the pandemic. With the Supreme Court’s latest devastating decision – _**their economic burden will only increase.**_ The Supreme Court's ruling on student loan forgiveness will undermine the economic opportunity of working and middle class families and perpetuate income inequality in Virginia and across the nation.

At Freedom Virginia, we believe in an equitable future for ALL, and we must hit the ground running to fight for Virginian borrowers. [_**Will you add your name to show your support for student loan forgiveness?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66080858/415263574/624659205?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS84NTU2NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjhjMTZmNy00MjFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DmChqDzB6UM7Xvw0u-EKb993zqNbzPI2wtE4wc597lA=&emci=bacfe5ef-421c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=a28c16f7-421c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=6782597)

clean_body: The Supreme Court's ruling on student loan forgiveness will undermine the economic opportunity of working and middle class families and perpetuate income inequality in Virginia and across the nation. | | | Supreme Court strikes down Biden’s student debt relief plan -Politico | Peter, Last week, the Supreme Court struck down President Biden’s student loan forgiveness plan. But the fight isn’t over. Thousands of Virginians are already struggling to cope with the skyrocketing costs of living and still recovering from the impacts of the pandemic. With the Supreme Court’s latest devastating decision – their economic burden will only increase. The Supreme Court's ruling on student loan forgiveness will undermine the economic opportunity of working and middle class families and perpetuate income inequality in Virginia and across the nation. | Peter, wanted to reach out personally to give a sincere thank you for supporting my campaign in the past month. As North Carolina faced severe attacks on voting rights, reproductive rights, and LGBTQ+ rights, you stepped up. Though the recent SCOTUS victories on voting rights won’t stop Republicans from pushing their extreme agenda, our strong network here in North Carolina and beyond reaffirms my belief that we’ve got what it takes to fight back.

But Peter, we need to be much louder to drown out the noise that comes from the Republican party’s hateful rhetoric. Supporting campaigns like mine goes a long way in expressing support and helping us fight back against legislative attacks. We can’t afford to quiet down.

As we enter another quarter and a slow summer season for fundraising, **I hope you’ll continue supporting my campaign. Defeating extreme Republican policies will take a concerted effort from all of us, but I know it’s within reach.**

With a gun violence prevention majority in the Senate, we’ll be able to pass an assault weapons ban, universal background checks, and so much more! = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thanks for your support, Stop Gun Violence PAC * | | = Paid for by Stop Gun Violence PAC Stop Gun Violence PAC 600 PENNSYLVANIA AVE SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States | = If you do not wish to receive emails about this important movement to end gun violence, please

| | Dear Friend, America’s gravy train is still full steam ahead when it comes to the war in Ukraine. Last week, there were signs that [Putin may be on his heels](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=5335007c5b474d70b312f840a9d23072&_e=uej6ZKP1ueU7BiSVxCEEUYpQy_K6t5LtQKPBnQqtmJl3Xg3Qwwd9IBOJybGPtuuEENSQQTg1zqDF547C-SMvq4AvU4MQPWKlO1OzAhz_V6m7COFA-c9n3v7aBZSY-SP3s9BdcIKhCrOUtL6hAJNkL5dNmj3_vcyEje6VVPWZofCYJd2MBxS0cfXTaJJ2OEXaIW8SnXWeven8ZVdyMlYcHCRcP6AP3Kjbvwg1pZk5aXVKzhTwsbwoYvUmGhdkXHeYFavaChA5q8Lkg-PGi3ocZN8WtLKVX6aZJn5QzMEGw0s%3D), which prompted people to ask whether I’m still leery of all the aid we’re providing. The answer is a resounding yes, especially now that he’s back to his [old tricks](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=5335007c5b474d70b312f840a9d23072&_e=uej6ZKP1ueU7BiSVxCEEUW1MCx0RNzPBTuiBmC5DokEz9MVxyZIjtW_D_j55PA7ktXHd7Uq1wo_bn-4P9cYcl3TzM63uYGz0JqNmSGUgyS3Dz4j1nKXG-t6vROxfx2pHI1F19CEXnp0htQ4ieYqrCjGpLkYG6dnvIqpCTRoHUpePx7-HNcsjpZjcBIT1bmWX4MCfrM3wLF1_F9wawIF8hGJYOB4qEWASq8dvzdsO_BymdV-xmEjgQH6HiHDzFv9-_rYv71UNbgrGAZrkpov3DA_CZRAlK8sXsig-bTbFegk%3D). Don’t get me wrong, I'm a supporter of these folks fighting for their freedom and independence, especially in the face of someone like Putin. But what's hard for me to get behind is the overflowing billions of unchecked dollars we're pouring into this whole shebang. We've given the green light to a whopping [$113 billion](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=5335007c5b474d70b312f840a9d23072&_e=uej6ZKP1ueU7BiSVxCEEUSHzCCnvAXTrfBCSIG4MK9nO3KYuEJtEAJ5UQVOb7UxbusOrFEi7cPY570qL-PXQjdZghi-5_qmWdfTmpMhTZ11iNq5oRwNGJqCynAHCCVRt24RIscA8SNX-SGqmaBBYEK2nGoRrbzaTQXokUUztqWv2u_iIJJ7gCJVsDm7bZCPaGxcvS3swGe5lh9keEY5DDVckcERChdWV_gtHp1jRJLSjNAU_HVR1YnQAYkllrTYVBQUwaovPYFqo_SbKskxFMDhRqK_1Ym6SU42NzULZqnXPsxKQwX5y1vOGkcFZBtay) across four rounds of aid since Russia's invasion. This massive money pit has me deeply concerned about our country and where our priorities lie. That’s why I am demanding accountability from our government. Congress has a duty to keep the Defense Department in check by ordering improved [tracking of this aid.](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=5335007c5b474d70b312f840a9d23072&_e=uej6ZKP1ueU7BiSVxCEEUUtDZvIGR0Tmo8LXKGTPGM3YI3P6wFDNMOpZKyaGP-Yby3Q1taADh6aaKxXI01PE0yc9aoOXlYDJwUkrVmgrOnVpzaeWrWt9-uGhkqLiOeSTr-eEf69ByR9oQdTZVtulLMAG7r38E86wYUKewuSH_FrJqT_-RiEzdq_UKLxHOUzXdchZVTcdtWo9J4KhFqdvo5x7ZniR1rpW9X9F2cX6DKCT9C7q7rIKPrZ7GxRMw5fO4SVs_EFRLrr3FIb1ipZC7Q%3D%3D) It's the absolute minimum we can do when we're funneling taxpayer dollars into this conflict. When all is said and done, I still stand firm by my original concerns, friend. Yes, Putin might be a no-good scoundrel, but the fact of the matter is there are conflicts sprouting up all over the world that we aren’t sticking our noses into, and the war in Ukraine should be on that list. [**If you agree with me on this issue, will you chip in $25 to show your support? I’ll continue to voice my concerns, but I need you in my corner.**](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=5335007c5b474d70b312f840a9d23072&_e=uej6ZKP1ueU7BiSVxCEEUSl7OerNOhZ_pWpsf6rBL_NdfcSrZ3u9cKL1QlLpUykkJ_PCOH6-pOr_8Kk-0fSuG8cvvPC9XF_h1PD9dtM1pVrYQixC5Txo2jcMdHMC6ybMqsdo_HuhaGdxo5_9U6bWVkZhiAS1s0IrO1vBfCkzWNfClXbCKT274relwGMmK18VcYUXRAe263rNv1_MjsNpt3Nfp7N0SvNXKL47Lgws_lUF0RULrq7RcQ8I_HRpQI4K0DrCLyO5hqqnBV5xL63b1SbKRSxUXlog5MeXeitOPHYlzdib2rnOyeS7p_GDNXQbveHLzFlnOcSqKK2SL6GNIZ0aoWwTRUmXFhYRHJdtbrnRGfyUO_AcTR3Q4gfyETpB) This is Europe’s war, and we ought to let them fight it. Sincerely, Tim Burchett

| | Friend,

---
At the end of June, I attended the GRAND OPENING of our campaign headquarters in the __FIRST-IN-THE-NATION__ primary state of New Hampshire.
---
While I was touring the building and thanking our many staffers and volunteers, I noticed a big wall that looked a bit empty.
---
I thought to myself – you know what would be great there...
---
**_...a big, beautiful Donor Wall dedicated to our most loyal supporters who are the backbone of this campaign._**
---
And I don’t mean scribbled on the wall with a crayon, like some other campaigns do... but a heavy, respectable plaque with the names of our great donors finely etched within.
---
_I’d love to add as many names as possible, but since we will have limited space, I’m asking donors to make a $75 contribution to RESERVE your spot to have your name inscribed in the Wall._
---
_But, because I still want to pay tribute to _ALL_ of our donors who made our First-In-The-Nation Headquarters possible, if you contribute ANY AMOUNT, I’ll include YOUR NAME in a beautiful book of donors that will be displayed beside our Donor Wall Plaque._

clean_body: I had a great idea when I attended the grand opening... | | | | | Friend, At the end of June, I attended the GRAND OPENING of our campaign headquarters in the FIRST-IN-THE-NATION primary state of New Hampshire. While I was touring the building and thanking our many staffers and volunteers, I noticed a big wall that looked a bit empty. I thought to myself – you know what would be great there... ...a big, beautiful Donor Wall dedicated to our most loyal supporters who are the backbone of this campaign. And I don’t mean scribbled on the wall with a crayon, like some other campaigns do... but a heavy, respectable plaque with the names of our great donors finely etched within. I’d love to add as many names as possible, but since we will have limited space, I’m asking donors to make a $75 contribution to RESERVE your spot to have your name inscribed in the Wall. But, because I still want to pay tribute to ALL of our donors who made our First-In-The-Nation Headquarters possible, if you contribute ANY AMOUNT, I’ll include YOUR NAME in a beautiful book of donors that will be displayed beside our Donor Wall Plaque. | | Thank you, Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

name: Sarah Curmi, EMILYs List
subject: [UPDATE] Where abortion laws now stand across the country:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List [www
body:
|
---
| | When choice is on the ballot, choice wins. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66081188/415264712/228261731?sourceid=1050420&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTcyZTg4ZS00NDFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9J1tQodwJL4ukAMW-lTNDROn5-oSons1q3TBVDbAg9E=&emci=d5142049-1b1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=da72e88e-441c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Peter,

In striking down _Roe v. Wade_ last June, the Supreme Court ruled that Americans do _not_ have the constitutional right to an abortion. As a result, Republicans are attacking and dismantling reproductive health care state by state.

But it's not all bad news: _thanks to the success of Democrats in last year's midterm elections_ , we were able to **protect abortion access** for tens of millions of Americans. Now, we're gearing up to do it again in 2023 and 2024. **[Are you ready to keep fighting back? Donate now to help elect the next wave of Democratic pro-choice women who will work to protect and restore abortion rights nationwide.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66081195/415264719/228261731?sourceid=1050420&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTcyZTg4ZS00NDFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9J1tQodwJL4ukAMW-lTNDROn5-oSons1q3TBVDbAg9E=&emci=d5142049-1b1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=da72e88e-441c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**

Here's a breakdown of where abortion laws currently stand across the country:
1. Abortion is **banned or mostly banned** in Idaho, North Dakota, South Dakota, Wisconsin, Missouri, Arkansas, Oklahoma, Texas, Louisiana, Kentucky, Tennessee, Mississippi, Alabama, Georgia, Florida, North Carolina, Nebraska, Indiana, and West Virginia.

2. In Arizona, Utah, Wyoming, Ohio, and South Carolina, laws banning abortion have been **temporarily blocked by courts**.

3. Abortion is still legal — **for now** — in Montana, Iowa, and Virginia. The only way to _ensure_ the continued legality of abortion in these states is to flip their state legislatures and/or defeat their GOP governors next cycle.

4. In the 23 remaining states, abortion is legal and **likely to remain protected** — _if_ we're able to protect the Senate and take back the House in 2024. Republicans in Congress have made it clear they intend to pass a **national abortion ban** if they regain power.

The last midterm elections proved that the only way to prevent and reverse abortion bans is to keep anti-choice Republicans out of power at _all_ levels of government. We now know that when choice is on the ballot, choice wins. ****Donate to help elect Democratic pro-choice women who will fight for reproductive rights _everywhere_ in 2023 and 2024:**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/Elect-Women-This-July](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66081196/415264720/228261731?sourceid=1050420&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTcyZTg4ZS00NDFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9J1tQodwJL4ukAMW-lTNDROn5-oSons1q3TBVDbAg9E=&emci=d5142049-1b1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=da72e88e-441c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**** Thank you,

Sarah Curmi (she/her/hers)
Vice President of State & Local Campaigns, EMILYs List
** ** ****[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66081198/415264722/228261731?sourceid=1050420&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTcyZTg4ZS00NDFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9J1tQodwJL4ukAMW-lTNDROn5-oSons1q3TBVDbAg9E=&emci=d5142049-1b1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=da72e88e-441c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**** **** ****[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66081199/415264723/2124073479?sourceid=1050420&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTcyZTg4ZS00NDFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9J1tQodwJL4ukAMW-lTNDROn5-oSons1q3TBVDbAg9E=&emci=d5142049-1b1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=da72e88e-441c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**** ********

Dear Peter, I wanted to take a moment, on behalf of everyone here at Team Callie Barr, to say _thank you_. **Thanks to your generous support, we were able to close the books on our first quarterly fundraising deadline with more than _1,000_ individual donations**. That is astounding. When Callie announced her candidacy for Congress, we knew that it would take an entire community to power this campaign. And time and time again, when we’ve turned to this community for help, we’ve been overwhelmed with your generosity and support. Whether you gave money, shared Callie’s posts on social media, or talked to your neighbors about our race – each and every one of you is a part of this campaign – and we are _so_ grateful. In the next couple of weeks, candidates will be filing their quarterly financial reports. We’ll be keeping an eye out to see how much Rep. Bergman raised – and paying close attention to see who’s truly funding his campaign. Until then, thank you so much for your support – and we’ll have more for you soon. Gratefully, Trevor Trevor Jones
Finance Director

subject: Defying the odds
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
Here’s how we turned a 19% chance of winning into a historic victory.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66081514/415265789/-1741698823?refcode=em_fr_2023.07.06_b1_eshq_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjA2ZDE3Mi00NjFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aGUe32-nyGJzmCeAJQDbkqilJkFsljl-EU6rr8kWKjk=)
Peter, on the morning of Election Day in 2022, _FiveThirtyEight_ gave Congresswoman Sykes only a 19% chance of winning. _Yes, you read that right. Take a look >>_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66081515/415265790/-877597051?refcode=em_fr_2023.07.06_b1_eshq_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjA2ZDE3Mi00NjFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aGUe32-nyGJzmCeAJQDbkqilJkFsljl-EU6rr8kWKjk=) **And as we all know, Emilia went on to defy the odds that night** – defeating her extremist Republican opponent and turning one of the most competitive districts in the country blue.

So how did we do it? How did Emilia manage to bring home a victory for the Birthplace of Champions?

[**Peter, Emilia was able to make history because she had grassroots supporters like you by her side every step of the way.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66081516/415265791/-1741698823?refcode=em_fr_2023.07.06_b1_eshq_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjA2ZDE3Mi00NjFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aGUe32-nyGJzmCeAJQDbkqilJkFsljl-EU6rr8kWKjk=)

Now, our race is shaping up to be _even more competitive in 2024_. And with the path to the House Majority running directly through OH-13, we’re going to need your help to keep this seat blue, re-elect Emilia, and defy the odds once again.

[**So please, can we count on you to pitch in to our people-powered campaign today? Any amount makes a massive difference!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66081517/415265792/-1741698823?refcode=em_fr_2023.07.06_b1_eshq_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjA2ZDE3Mi00NjFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aGUe32-nyGJzmCeAJQDbkqilJkFsljl-EU6rr8kWKjk=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66081518/415265793/-1741698823?refcode=em_fr_2023.07.06_b1_eshq_all-nd&amount=5&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjA2ZDE3Mi00NjFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aGUe32-nyGJzmCeAJQDbkqilJkFsljl-EU6rr8kWKjk=) | [$25 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66081519/415265794/-1741698823?refcode=em_fr_2023.07.06_b1_eshq_all-nd&amount=25&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjA2ZDE3Mi00NjFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aGUe32-nyGJzmCeAJQDbkqilJkFsljl-EU6rr8kWKjk=)

Thank you!
Team Emilia

**A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **In 2022, Congresswoman Sykes was elected to represent Ohio’s newly redrawn 13th Congressional District, winning one of the toughest races in the country._Emilia has cut through the divisiveness to deliver results._ **

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Stop Kevin McCarthy’s Social Security-cutting commission
disclaimer_text: paid for by lifting the payroll tax cap, ensuring everyone earning over $400,000 is paying more of their fair share
body:
Instead of cutting Social Security, we should be expanding benefits. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvmcZUVHA0-RzRnGcfmekoWygWdSiu4Dhnr81Qb3r27JL8u8vMpp34enuUMNu3MUtgvxU28iXVw6S73oRDrkb2fS482pkmi_5YAJOvXFR52xmVnI5TsKiXWQXFJ7xvy6C_MRUFIUMxCpcMcz0dshiu2t_aj0v_VLAjnJ61OUo4IlooJfoqVmbTAd_O4v1WKE08vwxX7XcBN0PAbZcDYTOtOS0bHCQ6eoAFsaj0KlcfykA/3xn/OlJTpkBWQJKK9lYNhgd2Yg/h0/KGkkxB3nwE0PGzbehmJoSVi4tlKMZIGhuX-ZDrq9mwY)
---
Friend, Millions of Americans rely on Social Security every day to meet their basic needs. It’s a promise we made to our seniors who deserve to retire with dignity, to people with disabilities, and to surviving spouses. And yet that guarantee is under relentless attack. **Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy has announced that he’s forming a “bipartisan” commission to cut Social Security.** But his commission is only bipartisan if Democrats join him. [**Sign now to tell all Democrats to refuse to serve on Kevin McCarthy’s closed-door Social Security-cutting commission.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm0MvZGkJ0TeUlEPpD-vUxfyT0GPIufWLPQkcG42LwK4CIH8H0WycZ8k8fQE4KxmDNmlp0FtkupnhjageWr888Em4moiQ47Nl58NOhvThI8hiWNECXMsHl28izWRswULUFTKjByO7jUO_T-QDq6S7BunDP7zo0vxA6OV2rik1q6K8aa0Pp0LpwwIsuc-iGw8-HSsaLJCX1c_cZV808gHbdu7PBNv-yFf4pXXAz6EmJthRy9hAsXN1rK40dfUTWcK_QnnBzB8YqQ4qQklaAqZ8scAoKrGlAhMZ14MFI3EqE1GeRhLHUjefDhjGAGGphYAurswES3b6KeHFknyCrBsES5_7QeJPLxrKxM1WGrzm32rrohh0e54gLWiqVlkt4HBdcO3n4BtXOiD9YxA0WW10ttvYcqBVAeEu8-HV7GJo8Zu32jFUGmmR7cSKbu2g6cPC17PP6aVZWRRBTNjszt9a4n96LjtBmbCtwoDfc_j9uJxFMjPBYk94PpLZDds-boohatNCqt2A8iJwZpV5exOI76cWvXusSsp6cZjXDBDIgNtdZLGlM5433g3hJ3O52hjDk/3xn/OlJTpkBWQJKK9lYNhgd2Yg/h1/DDq3auGDLSc3XrD1OZ9kK531sdK0obp9u0MniAFqtSk) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm0MvZGkJ0TeUlEPpD-vUxfyT0GPIufWLPQkcG42LwK4CIH8H0WycZ8k8fQE4KxmDNmlp0FtkupnhjageWr888Em4moiQ47Nl58NOhvThI8hiWNECXMsHl28izWRswULUFTKjByO7jUO_T-QDq6S7BunDP7zo0vxA6OV2rik1q6K8aa0Pp0LpwwIsuc-iGw8-HSsaLJCX1c_cZV808gHbdu7PBNv-yFf4pXXAz6EmJthRy9hAsXN1rK40dfUTWcK_QnnBzB8YqQ4qQklaAqZ8scAoKrGlAhMZ14MFI3EqE1GeRhLHUjefDhjGAGGphYAureGi_DFm6_QrG475sRpgqXNan30NtgExO_F2nzINHMKQmWzviCeSqjwQwrsXYzUNWP80pGmUxD8TAl1raEe6XCLnSBahrDtFSdWn7CXdHSqQuKsFqBuDk3fWugAa-pArY_nsxiEifFKBIZfc4hhAnsaiIDJidcF1jAtp4mUamxzyKA2xzOjKWvJzOHecW1jHZnzfcOWVKzEvT5kv2bQA4-RoPfKYrRBlqHoPlUqKlKRhfBbS66TM-KyjoXee8UHug/3xn/OlJTpkBWQJKK9lYNhgd2Yg/h2/bKNV5_r_kyIY773UURBSsK_pBeUae7U--6jDKfMWwko)
---
Throughout Republicans’ debt ceiling hostage taking, they claimed they didn’t want to touch Social Security or Medicare. And yet, as soon as President Biden and Kevin McCarthy struck a deal, McCarthy showed his true colors, telling Fox News:1
> _“_** _This isn’t the end...I’m going to announce a commission._**_We have to look at the entire budget. The President walled off all the others. The majority driver of the budget is mandatory spending. It’s Medicare, Social Security, interest on the debt.”_
However, McCarthy understands that in order to not be blamed by voters for cutting our earned benefits, he needs Democrats to join him.
[**Add your name and demand that all Democrats refuse to serve on Kevin McCarthy’s Social Security-cutting petition.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm0MvZGkJ0TeUlEPpD-vUxfyT0GPIufWLPQkcG42LwK4CIH8H0WycZ8k8fQE4KxmDNmlp0FtkupnhjageWr888Em4moiQ47Nl58NOhvThI8hiWNECXMsHl28izWRswULUFTKjByO7jUO_T-QDq6S7BunDP7zo0vxA6OV2rik1q6K8aa0Pp0LpwwIsuc-iGw8-HSsaLJCX1c_cZV808gHbdu7PBNv-yFf4pXXAz6EmJthRy9hAsXN1rK40dfUTWcK_QnnBzB8YqQ4qQklaAqZ8scAoKrGlAhMZ14MFI3EqE1GeRhLHUjefDhjGAGGphYAuoMam1ljD9DqkHBdgC6qIW5xs0ARzhXxwWVD9QEHu9F8WpedFqQcqxC2c-sqT2GRo8UYBvtv91biT6-9HX179QzZz1oCHRshPZma9YRvDF_qq0HZXQO-aZiJN98Cq9XoAAi2zCkQZfCUFd-DczxcrByxCLHGhPRbVSFaiPb71oOSlBTBXTcXlOTDhTUGW9YmiRfFUk07ldZwh69LUxLEicIyl7MFtIzbQLYiiB97o4B48ZZET2l5vVLZR9e7rm2LyE/3xn/OlJTpkBWQJKK9lYNhgd2Yg/h3/pidBMqlBSs6QoJQfNqGUmAkgr6iIyVTXi8DnGlFwUKg)
**Instead of cutting Social Security, we should be expanding benefits.** That’s why I support the _Social Security 2100 Act_ , which would help millions of current and future beneficiaries by increasing benefits across the board, improving Cost-of-Living Adjustments, increasing the special minimum benefit for low-wage workers, ending the five-month waiting period to receive disability benefits, and more. And, it’ll be paid for by lifting the payroll tax cap, ensuring everyone earning over $400,000 is paying more of their fair share.
Together, we’re fighting back against relentless Republican and Wall Street attacks, protecting and expanding Social Security for current and future generations.
Thank you for taking action today,
Rashida

name: Lt. Governor Robinson
subject: Stepping down as Lt. Governor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Robinson
body:
Please see my full statement

| |
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f486148f67ee4202b32a0c25998062b9&_e=Ae4sjsnmYBNbmt_w8Kw3yjIBsiupmEwB5dGYMqTuhV0yV94AJQvAhPmeAPKBU-wMFr7tZTLBB1FthA54m9BE4elrzmAlEBYApkflgPyrPmOx_TXHE7RdfJih6q8rEkng35wcgN7yd6DBR4K4ukP6UFJki7OSkhuG9SGTqTOthLkVuGRE_9KQuw44UrVBzAWeTZmHluO-Dfv-nGzZcsrsOM-ElVJ6kynzfvQjm2fMbKe2nKT6dQ63DDRlVYgeCD8mw0W3TbTFbzJ3SyCdG0gy9h59Q9f3KWLqy7XzZA8fR4yQtnpL5341KHax4D42s_OFyqQ1W4mCnXOfSS8gWEHIn7h4bRE9gJu4LTk9aLLOPhfYh5yguPAo11qucNi6_NGXNNqhj2TxQ89BJj2Z6amN6zhR0mQVGF1O5VU5eFg601GlfI5ORUlB-34HyOUBbnR1C9BApregTjD7KOdOlbvEtWnoFQ4ZAFzvY8If3MAc9VI%3D)

**MARK ROBINSON RESPONDS AFTER RADICAL DEMOCRATS CALL ON HIM TO RESIGN**
---

In 2020 we made American history & humiliated the radical Democrats when I became the first black Lt. Governor of North Carolina.

**But because I 'm a conservative that blows a hole in their sacred narrative, they called on me to step down before I was sworn in and they called for my impeachment after I took the oath of office. **

Those calls continue to this day- and that is all they will ever be.

And now I'm the leading conservative candidate running for Governor of North Carolina.

Every poll shows this is going to be the closest race in America.

But Joe Biden & the liberal elite are spending millions to permanently end my candidacy because of who I am & what I represent. My existence as a black conservative enrages them.

They hate that I was able to pick myself up by my bootstraps to pursue the American Dream & determine my own destiny.

**They hate that the first black Governor of North Carolina could be a Republican like me & with your support today, it most certainly will.**

name: Ron Wyden
subject: Pursuing an education shouldn’t cost you your future
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66081646/415266030/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDI2OTQwYy00NzFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ld4PlmFlDS2tflV8-pbmchFNEX7NfRMsP-MsztaUWFY=&emci=ffa06f9b-1b1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=4026940c-471c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=9818364)
---

| | **Like so many of you, I am deeply disappointed in the recent ruling by the Supreme Court to strike down President Biden's relief plan for the millions of Americans drowning in student loan debt.** Americans owe an incomprehensible $1.75 _trillion_ dollars in student loans. Student loans remain a singular, defining roadblock to social mobility, getting out of poverty, saving for the future, and securing a dignified retirement. **Here's what I believe: pursuing an education shouldn't come at the cost of your financial future.** This ruling by the Supreme Court will force millions of Americans to make the impossible choice between covering everyday expenses like rent and groceries, and paying off their student loans. **This is another card in the deck that is stacked against working families while the wealthy and well-connected continue to get richer**. Long gone are the days when middle-income Americans could count on being able to buy a home, a car, _and_ save for retirement, and this will only serve to perpetuate that disparity. Our country has locked multiple generations of folks into financial handcuffs, denying them the opportunity to enjoy retirement with their grandchildren, families, and loved ones, which Americans could once count on. With this latest ruling, the far-right justices on the Supreme Court have perpetuated a deeply-broken system that continues to lock working families out of a secure future while propping up the wealthy. We have to attack this problem from every angle: keeping the cost of tuition down, simplifying the repayment process, and moving forward to improve other debt relief measures not struck down. I've long supported efforts to help working families struggling under the crushing weight of student debt, and I'm not stopping now. I'm redoubling my efforts to help this movement. **Because no American should be saddled with lifelong debt for pursuing an education. That's not the American dream.** More soon, _Ron_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

body:

## **Happy Thursday!**
[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-amiuc-trhiujldw-y/) **Grow your organization and keep the momentum going with our powerful platform.** [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-amiuc-trhiujldw-j/) **Navy Stops Iran** [**The U.S. Navy said it stopped Iran from seizing two commercial tankers in the Gulf of Oman**](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-amiuc-trhiujldw-t/) following a series of attacks and seizures on vessels in the region since 2019. **Dramatic First Amendment Ruling** **[Here are the officials and agencies included in the injunction](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-amiuc-trhiujldw-i/) **issued by Louisiana Judge Terry A. Doughty that ruled that the Biden administration likely violated the First Amendment. **Anti-American ****Rhetoric** Ben & Jerry's has **[called on the US to return"stolen Indigenous land"](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-amiuc-trhiujldw-d/)** in a bold Fourth of July message. The Associated Press kicked off the Independence Day celebrations with an article explaining [**why the word "patriot" has become problematic** ](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-amiuc-trhiujldw-h/)in recent years. **No Questions** **[Biden ignored shouted questions from reporters](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-amiuc-trhiujldw-k/)** \- as the Secret Service investigated who left cocaine in the White House in a major security breach. Karine Jean-Pierre also shut down questions about **[Biden's 7th unacknowledged grandchild](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-amiuc-trhiujldw-u/).**

**Everyone Knows**
# Former Trump AG says **[Weiss knows IRS whistleblowers](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-amiuc-trhiujldw-o/)** are telling the truth.
**Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-amiuc-trhiujldw-x/)!**

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Already over halfway through the year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Our team at Fetterman HQ juuuust wrapped up our weekly team call
#
Derek,
Our team at Fetterman HQ juuuust wrapped up our weekly team call and I realized that _we're already over halfway through 2023._
We keep this campaign running year-round because your donation (of *any* amount) now goes further than in the heat of the election. That's because it allows us to keep up our campaign's infrastructure, build relationships with folks all over PA, and be prepared for anything that might come our way as John does his important work in the Senate.
But I have some news from our call: **We came up just short of our June goal.**
John really doesn't want to have to cancel any of the big things we've got planned for this summer and beyond, so I'm hoping we can get back on track today if just about 1 in 8 people who read this chip in.
**[Derek, can you donate your first $5 right now to help us close the gap?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230706-1?refcode=em20230706-1-8446&refcode2=8446_434096_dgicYk&akid=8446%2E434096%2EdgicYk)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230706-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230706-8446&refcode2=8446_434096_dgicYk&akid=8446%2E434096%2EdgicYk)**
Your support was critical to making sure John represents the working people of Pennsylvania in the Senate. Every one of us is so glad you're part of this team.
Thanks for your help! 💙
Eric
Eric Stern
Senior Advisor
John Fetterman for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230706-8446-footer&t=1&refcode2=8446_434096_dgicYk&akid=8446%2E434096%2EdgicYk)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8446%2E434096%2EdgicYk)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8446%2E434096%2EdgicYk)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Reverse ‘money machines’ popping up across America
body:
You probably haven't seen one of these - YET.

| Dear Reader, You probably haven't seen one of these - YET. But you will soon. Machines like the one in this picture are popping up all across America. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=baf1378ea3474e2d8f14e5c1ae35a4c3&_e=nBpf0lFmaQwBAfkdv3dd-_9sM2N2ABIEm5Qr3JS2O2DlILyrjJvOBCCFdxVnTyZern7uDq4INge8pH9wgE-sbiyVFUqI0tb5n-G2d4pNGgzjTGCTlvJx5bSOo0RcnvBwyDx9soR1TyicnvK71Cw-fCHZBkayG-Vve6uT4e2_1NgTWLvpkKmHh_dHhrpgZpQ5Tzb1RZ7kNoxiaU6l2P1xBk_l_av7f0GBgr67xvTUPO_dJ6ObBDGxAqgerzOWFvJg7qH_ieUIsLuU9OyhILPg5kGSAAYu_N43tUawO9UFZ_w%3D) If you've been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you've almost certainly walked by one without knowing. The experts are calling it a 'Reverse ATM'. According to the _New York Post_ , restaurants and other businesses are using them to avoid handling cash. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=baf1378ea3474e2d8f14e5c1ae35a4c3&_e=nBpf0lFmaQwBAfkdv3dd-_9sM2N2ABIEm5Qr3JS2O2DlILyrjJvOBCCFdxVnTyZern7uDq4INge8pH9wgE-sbiyVFUqI0tb5n-G2d4pNGgzjTGCTlvJx5bSOo0RcnvBwyDx9soR1TyicnvK71Cw-fLy7X1_nbXC-TY9KoI6UYezLAGe6lwUFe_AseiHV2CfxDW3hApmDD5Id-B9iCdE_-wdEYgBDVXOqsOityRIvq2DrebT8nQLxXI2dbxF-lV6xzHVhmmJEH4i2-JgYMHIgMIuy6hkIYPi2u-R4SbYKRGk%3D) They've been installed at places like Citizen's Bank Ballpark in Philadelphia... Miami International Airport... They've even been used at the Super Bowl. Why are these machines suddenly appearing out of nowhere? And what does it mean for your money? I recently arranged an interview with former Goldman Sachs managing director, Dr. Nomi Prins, to get her take. There's nobody in America who's more aware of the inner workings of the banking system. In the interview, Dr. Prins explained these strange 'reverse ATMs.' And she said she expects them to play a key role this Summer as our nation's financial system is overhauled for the first time since 1971. According to her research, many Americans will be blindsided by what's to come. BUT, folks who understand the 'Reverse ATM' phenomenon before it becomes obvious to the average American could actually profit in the weeks ahead. Dr. Prins accurately predicted the 2008 crash, the lockdown crash, and connected the dots between the White House and the Federal Reserve. And now, she says:
> "My research shows the Fed is installing the infrastructure for a massive overhaul to our financial system, and I expect it to go live by the end of July. In other words, time is short."
To help folks prepare, she's recorded a briefing that explains exactly what she sees coming, how it will play out, and how much time you have to prepare. [Click here now to see Dr. Prins' free presentation.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=baf1378ea3474e2d8f14e5c1ae35a4c3&_e=nBpf0lFmaQwBAfkdv3dd-_9sM2N2ABIEm5Qr3JS2O2DlILyrjJvOBCCFdxVnTyZern7uDq4INge8pH9wgE-sbiyVFUqI0tb5n-G2d4pNGgzjTGCTlvJx5bSOo0RcnvBwyDx9soR1TyicnvK71Cw-fElzYfj5ThFripG4Z4Gp2vSs0cB372bMRlaqd3JwAWeC-eEMBcJsLQxwRcIBE1SHXkLQ1fdUkGrbkVKP-oj4E7diLYVoOGIg96QeU57f9N-wf8ynXsMvvEGzaroCxpmb-2zlQIQURsL3_qCmQADWMG4%3D) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar overhaul to the financial system, folks who stayed on the sidelines lost almost everything. But folks who acted quickly had the opportunity to rescue their retirement accounts before they were decimated. [Click here to see how.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=baf1378ea3474e2d8f14e5c1ae35a4c3&_e=nBpf0lFmaQwBAfkdv3dd-_9sM2N2ABIEm5Qr3JS2O2DlILyrjJvOBCCFdxVnTyZern7uDq4INge8pH9wgE-sbiyVFUqI0tb5n-G2d4pNGgzjTGCTlvJx5bSOo0RcnvBwyDx9soR1TyicnvK71Cw-fJFSlKTF4oH1hXaCAcPpY5pNhhgW-OUXCj6yjEuk3u1oGRS7QHXit0Fuvsi_1PQAv9dhAURAz2aeA4UvsxkOvPuE8IX2K-_O6u8c8VT2BnGj5MFDz4wkJzQ6K-nlCdQpM_Wj7t7e3VnMx48gSxyNVrU%3D)
---

---

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=baf1378ea3474e2d8f14e5c1ae35a4c3&_t=gNkynrQwW7f6j8xJtytseACsmiBHot4Tr9QPO9bRp2Lv9KfkuMrvaIS9RfPsQUmDzc0D9sriZ02DZ0mbfQosfQwftCOwhvsXJWaWMhQH5AOT_KAwwmF0VetQ_OJKdHFh_62vWYN5sJX6L3jY4KDCs4pCd3tqpoeznHfaEBxreRg%3D)

But folks who acted quickly had the opportunity to rescue their retirement accounts before they were decimated. Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Kennedy Democrats
subject: Join us for our 2023 Kickoff July 14th
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP25/1/106220/images/KD_Logo.png]
2023 Kick-off with PA House Speaker Joanna McClinton and Malcolm Kenyatta
Friend,
This November there is a lot on the line for all Pennsylvanians. From control over some of our most important Boards of Election, to School Boards and the Pennsylvania Supreme Court, our work continues this year in electing the next generation of leaders outside of Pittsburgh and Philadelphia.
This is why next week on Friday July 14th we are kicking off our our first event of 2023 with two incredible guest speakers – Pennsylvania Speaker of the House, Representative Joanna McClinton and candidate for Auditor General, Malcolm Kenyatta.
From White House to our local offices, we know what great Democratic leadership can do for our Country and Commonwealth. We are proud of President Biden's bipartisan legislative accomplishments that have delivered huge tangible benefits for every Americas – and, more recently, his leadership produced a big win for our economy just days before a catastrophic and unprecedented default.
We are grateful to have you in it with us. Every donation is 100% by our co-founder.
We can't wait to see you there on the 14th.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kd2024kickoff
Co-Founders Patrick & Scott, and KD Board Chair Andrew Sommers
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kd2024kickoff]
https://www.facebook.com/kennedydemocrats/ [https://www.facebook.com/kennedydemocrats/] https://twitter.com/kennedydemspa [https://twitter.com/kennedydemspa] https://www.instagram.com/kennedydemocrats/ [https://www.instagram.com/kennedydemocrats/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/kennedy-democrats/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/kennedy-democrats/]

Taking the Hill
499 S Capitol St SW
Washington, DC 20003
United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Becky?=
subject: Over 12,000 signatures
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BECKY EDWARDS FOR CONGRESS
body:
** We did it!
------------------------------------------------------------

Yesterday we submitted over 12,000 signatures to the Lieutenant Governor —well over the 7000 needed to get on the ballot. This was truly a grassroots, volunteer-driven effort, and we are incredibly grateful for your support!

While this is certainly a moment of celebration, it’s also just the beginning.

We need to maintain our momentum in order to win this election. And that means increasing our fundraising efforts.

We are also the only grassroots campaign with a candidate on the ballot.

We put Becky on the ballot by collecting thousands of individual signatures. Every single signature mattered, and now, every single donation counts.

Your donation WILL play a big role in determining the outcome of this election.

A contribution of any amount helps keep our momentum going. More importantly, your donation ensures this election is determined by Utah voters—not outside funding from special interest groups.

Please support our grassroots campaign!

DONATE (https://secure.anedot.com/beckyedwards/dd7776ce-576b-4430-814c-765cf1ef59e3)

** PAID FOR BY BECKY EDWARDS FOR CONGRESS

name: =?utf-8?Q?Carmen=20Goers?=
subject: Fmr. State Senator Hans Zeiger endorses Carmen Goers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carmen for Congress]( "Paid for by Carmen for Congress")
body:
“Carmen is committed to protecting and uplifting our foster youth.” | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/345a66939de4/im-announcing-my-run-for-us-congress-in-the-8th-congressional-district-13561091?e=0e51d1e991)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=cb589b6b80&e=0e51d1e991)
---
| | Peter,
---
| **I’m delighted to announce that Former State Senator Hans Zeiger has endorsed my campaign to work for the people in Congress!**

Hans served in the WA House of Representatives from 2011 to 2017, the state senate from 2017 to 2021, and the Pierce County Council until summer 2022, when he resigned his office to lead a non-profit organization, the Jack Miller Center, to advance American history and civics education efforts nationwide.
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=d5346ddc0f&e=0e51d1e991)
---
| **Hans shared the following statement:**

_"I am proud to endorse Carmen Goers for the 8th Congressional District. I have gotten to know Carmen over the last few years and have seen her dedication to the community. Carmen is committed to helping our foster youth and making sure that we are protecting and uplifting this vulnerable population. She is also committed to making sure that the Government is spending within its means and not overburdening the taxpayers. I look forward to seeing Carmen serve as the next congresswoman from Washington's 8th District." _

**I’m deeply honored to have Hans Zeiger’s endorsement**. Hans has an impeccable reputation as a bipartisan collaborator of creating positive outcomes for constituents.

I also applaud Hans' leadership with the Jack Miller Center, whose efforts are at the forefront in ensuring that the teaching of civics has a strong presence across the nation in our K-12 schools.

_I’m grateful for Hans’ recognition of my dedication as an advocate for our foster youth_. I will humbly endeavor to serve as a Congresswoman with the same spirit of statesmanship while working tirelessly to inspire the next generation to reach for the torch we must pass forward in upholding a government of, for and by the people!

**Peter, to succeed in that mission, it’s crucial to have your support!** **[As these amazing endorsements continue to amass, can I count on a contribution from you in our efforts to make a brighter future in Washington?](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=c9aae3175e&e=0e51d1e991)**
---
| [ENDORSE GOERS FOR CONGRESS »](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=e895467239&e=0e51d1e991 "ENDORSE GOERS FOR CONGRESS »")
---
| [CONTRIBUTE TODAY »](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=6d024ce441&e=0e51d1e991 "CONTRIBUTE TODAY »")
---
| For Washington,
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=ae8a427797&e=0e51d1e991)
---
| Carmen Goers
Candidate for U.S. Congress, WA-8

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: AOC v. the Establishment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
AOC is taking on the old Democratic Party establishment
#
When Alexandria won in 2018, her message inspired a lot of people. She was fearless in critiquing politics-as-usual. She proposed big, new ideas — like the Green New Deal — to tackle our most difficult challenges.
While Alexandria’s message resonated across the country, some Democratic Party leaders responded very differently. They called her ideas extreme and more than a few of them attacked her personally.
[We need to make it clear: there’s nothing wrong with new ideas and holding your own Party accountable. Will you make a $5 contribution today to show you stand with Alexandria and support pushing the Democratic Party forward?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230706-1.RkEpQp&refcode=em20230706-4591-P_FND_EGR_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4591%2E2526796%2EkdFxY1)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230706-1.RkEpQp&refcode=em20230706-4591-P_FND_EGR_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4591%2E2526796%2EkdFxY1)**
We need to show widespread support for Alexandria so she can continue doing what she was elected to do: **demand better.**
Alexandria campaigned on expanding Medicare in order to make prescriptions more affordable. Now, Medicare has the power to negotiate prescription drugs — and insulin is capped at $35/ month. Alexandria’s Green New Deal was called pie-in-the-sky, but last year, Congress passed its largest ever investment to fight climate change — $369 billion. Now, Alexandria is fighting to ban trading stock for Members of Congress, after it was revealed that 277 lawmakers did not disclose individual stock investments in 2020 — and 75 of them directly profited from stocks in the companies that developed COVID-19 vaccines.1
[Every dollar, no matter the amount, shows widespread support for our progressive priorities from NY-14 and beyond.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230706-1.RkEpQp&refcode=em20230706-4591-P_FND_EGR_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4591%2E2526796%2EkdFxY1)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230706-1.RkEpQp&refcode=em20230706-4591-P_FND_EGR_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=4591%2E2526796%2EkdFxY1)**
Our sincerest thanks,
Team AOC

1 - [**Insider:** As the pandemic raged, at least 75 lawmakers bought and sold stock in companies that make COVID-19 vaccines, treatments, and tests](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10376?t=23&akid=4591%2E2526796%2EkdFxY1)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230706-1?refcode=em20230706-4591-P_FND_EGR_MIS&t=24&refcode2=4591_2526796_kdFxY1&akid=4591%2E2526796%2EkdFxY1)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230706-4591-P_FND_EGR_MIS&t=25&akid=4591%2E2526796%2EkdFxY1)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=26&akid=4591%2E2526796%2EkdFxY1) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=27&akid=4591%2E2526796%2EkdFxY1) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=28&akid=4591%2E2526796%2EkdFxY1)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=260%2E552475%2EB7zshZ)
Peter,
The Roll Call ratings are in -- and **we’re on the list of top Senate battleground states for the 2024 election.**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230706-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230706-1&refcode2=260_552475_B7zshZ&akid=260%2E552475%2EB7zshZ)
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230706-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230706-1&refcode2=260_552475_B7zshZ&akid=260%2E552475%2EB7zshZ)**
We know this race won’t be easy -- we’re expecting a LOT of dark money and extreme Republican attacks to come our way soon.
We need the support of our grassroots team to fight back. Together, we can raise the funds that we need to amplify Senator Casey’s long record of fighting for Pennsylvania’s families.
[**Will you help make a contribution today so we’ll be ready to fight back? We’ll need all the support we can get to build a strong campaign and win this top Senate battleground.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230706-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230706-1&refcode2=260_552475_B7zshZ&akid=260%2E552475%2EB7zshZ)
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230706-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230706-1&refcode2=260_552475_B7zshZ&akid=260%2E552475%2EB7zshZ)**
**The election may feel far away, but we can’t afford to sit back, Peter.** National Republicans are desperate to win back the Senate, and they’re preparing to spend millions of dollars to defeat Bob.
Pennsylvania is on the front lines of Democrats’ fight to hold our razor-thin Senate majority. That’s why we need to lay the groundwork now to create a strong campaign. [**Will you help us build a winning campaign by making a contribution? Every dollar adds up and makes a big impact.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230706-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230706-1&refcode2=260_552475_B7zshZ&akid=260%2E552475%2EB7zshZ)
With gratitude,
Team Casey

clean_body: Peter, The Roll Call ratings are in -- and we’re on the list of top Senate battleground states for the 2024 election. We know this race won’t be easy -- we’re expecting a LOT of dark money and extreme Republican attacks to come our way soon. We need the support of our grassroots team to fight back. Together, we can raise the funds that we need to amplify Senator Casey’s long record of fighting for Pennsylvania’s families. The election may feel far away, but we can’t afford to sit back, Peter. National Republicans are desperate to win back the Senate, and they’re preparing to spend millions of dollars to defeat Bob. Pennsylvania is on the front lines of Democrats’ fight to hold our razor-thin Senate majority. That’s why we need to lay the groundwork now to create a strong campaign. With gratitude, Team Casey

body:
| **Final stage before digital money** [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a93120c244514a518a4e383e191259c2&_e=mwVVhAIja2VUtYAP8fUouZGEU0q6hLP0ZwuqbRCS4tOfP70ZCawc-ovYSWKg3Tiwt9DY5r3AfJZNEfmnakfwZziBjxT1PZdsWBTEq7D-L0t9G9mJUdSPUgSsS8-f4LmgbHQhge8zasB2FK-1QwJmUGErtfQPu0tDmWEcWgX_Nk_4KGafIH9bLI4Rb8AQjxh6-jk8AYnAZ671WwWRc0MZSJh_i_BdrXdvMHqkc8F264WjScW8aUAkDGklflNf4nZ3ekrTUD6KUGANBJPGNvG_3PVHXQU8eULSVNn8yEP_l8M%3D) The end is near... Our financial system is about to be transformed in a way that would've been unthinkable just a few years ago. And almost nobody is prepared for the chaos that follows. According to Bank of America, this overhaul is imminent - And Dr. Nomi Prins says the final stage begins in July, with the rollout of the FedNow system. To show you everything you need to know about the FedNow system - and to help you prepare - Dr. Prins has recorded a free presentation with all the details. It's controversial, but Nomi's interview is a must-watch for anyone with more than $2,500 in an American bank or retirement fund. **[Click here to find out what you need to do to prepare for this historic transformation.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a93120c244514a518a4e383e191259c2&_e=mwVVhAIja2VUtYAP8fUouZGEU0q6hLP0ZwuqbRCS4tOfP70ZCawc-ovYSWKg3Tiwt9DY5r3AfJZNEfmnakfwZziBjxT1PZdsWBTEq7D-L0t9G9mJUdSPUgSsS8-f4LmgbHQhge8zasB2FK-1QwJmUGNHOBxTnW6ruwHat4EYXuGAY_4AqofDlt0hJ5eDcv6YX3HNc9NGQfbhdZyUu7TqjCv0csv5ThgO07doLJ-GxlzMB4FAKaJVwk_gmKjK72c6RmojB76liAE98o4aL3e4gSxyZvQVS_-sAu1L3OGdyGo%3D)**

name: Conservatives Give
subject: Reverse ‘money machines’ popping up across America
body:
You probably haven't seen one of these - YET.

| Dear Reader, You probably haven't seen one of these - YET. But you will soon. Machines like the one in this picture are popping up all across America. [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a84a1837af5f4ac497595ce424972f5d&_e=bBoGZ66TFi7yfHa9ktGaSr7mb8Gfe_ERKWnp__e-UlBclBTKfCpSkxD8ikRwyS1nzg3HYTdEAgI7Dbw0qv7Av5P2Jv1iLTci3qKJfGZfx54jf7uHlWXgFFe7DUzJ8my49ed_cINLArPP68vntsDun8fnuwriZUKff8-bREAvZs58JP8jQ_1KupUmNWeinNUSoAK32_xUpf3oLcpqxyfqWmFpBoqf9svfrUALHd2EgD4r8BeJ1YeZvqs-_LkKc0xk_cfOZBXCBEBNKOLcsujtUOlc6IzNsid1Wyeol_VTAN0%3D) If you've been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you've almost certainly walked by one without knowing. The experts are calling it a 'Reverse ATM'. According to the _New York Post_ , restaurants and other businesses are using them to avoid handling cash. [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a84a1837af5f4ac497595ce424972f5d&_e=bBoGZ66TFi7yfHa9ktGaSr7mb8Gfe_ERKWnp__e-UlBclBTKfCpSkxD8ikRwyS1nzg3HYTdEAgI7Dbw0qv7Av5P2Jv1iLTci3qKJfGZfx54jf7uHlWXgFFe7DUzJ8my49ed_cINLArPP68vntsDun3IxDrsfnGXT_eao3W6MvBkfTz54MW407EgMuKa3aAh_hKJmp1FHODi-kSAFZWOrMU1IASYXfKH2hHi2GYV-8xfj_In1AyQ0wANZa2vsaL7FUF5BDS_WSdg6Id6gcIPFfSOxJ1Clu6TTkD0lGs5S46o%3D) They've been installed at places like Citizen's Bank Ballpark in Philadelphia... Miami International Airport... They've even been used at the Super Bowl. Why are these machines suddenly appearing out of nowhere? And what does it mean for your money? I recently arranged an interview with former Goldman Sachs managing director, Dr. Nomi Prins, to get her take. There's nobody in America who's more aware of the inner workings of the banking system. In the interview, Dr. Prins explained these strange 'reverse ATMs.' And she said she expects them to play a key role this Summer as our nation's financial system is overhauled for the first time since 1971. According to her research, many Americans will be blindsided by what's to come. BUT, folks who understand the 'Reverse ATM' phenomenon before it becomes obvious to the average American could actually profit in the weeks ahead. Dr. Prins accurately predicted the 2008 crash, the lockdown crash, and connected the dots between the White House and the Federal Reserve. And now, she says:
> "My research shows the Fed is installing the infrastructure for a massive overhaul to our financial system, and I expect it to go live by the end of July. In other words, time is short."
To help folks prepare, she's recorded a briefing that explains exactly what she sees coming, how it will play out, and how much time you have to prepare. [Click here now to see Dr. Prins' free presentation.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a84a1837af5f4ac497595ce424972f5d&_e=bBoGZ66TFi7yfHa9ktGaSr7mb8Gfe_ERKWnp__e-UlBclBTKfCpSkxD8ikRwyS1nzg3HYTdEAgI7Dbw0qv7Av5P2Jv1iLTci3qKJfGZfx54jf7uHlWXgFFe7DUzJ8my49ed_cINLArPP68vntsDun3JYaLO3evQWZRht4aG5yju1J5QEALGri7gYZxlLCTyghytj9GdJnvNpsmG07gj27TBCDom5K1_w67h-ibfamWP62YjRlnNGYs0BtpMUajkh1X912oSejMTWSZfZ2NirxLmg_Pu_4rQgDSldLZvlOtA%3D) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar overhaul to the financial system, folks who stayed on the sidelines lost almost everything. But folks who acted quickly had the opportunity to rescue their retirement accounts before they were decimated. [Click here to see how.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a84a1837af5f4ac497595ce424972f5d&_e=bBoGZ66TFi7yfHa9ktGaSr7mb8Gfe_ERKWnp__e-UlBclBTKfCpSkxD8ikRwyS1nzg3HYTdEAgI7Dbw0qv7Av5P2Jv1iLTci3qKJfGZfx54jf7uHlWXgFFe7DUzJ8my49ed_cINLArPP68vntsDun7f4XpWXLOwEj_uGnAYxOe87OtEq9WkNQ9pLrPZcZxck349A-AVfU07J-WQ-H9ypE40zB1_G2lo_uFIGNa4JFc7oY4mTmpHz8V47PAZJEudWSrD54LMUyArFY6ep8OTveNPgIVUHNZe8yNES5TXGMjw%3D)

clean_body: You probably haven't seen one of these - YET. | Dear Reader, You probably haven't seen one of these - YET. But you will soon. Machines like the one in this picture are popping up all across America. If you've been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you've almost certainly walked by one without knowing. The experts are calling it a 'Reverse ATM'. According to the New York Post , restaurants and other businesses are using them to avoid handling cash. They've been installed at places like Citizen's Bank Ballpark in Philadelphia... Miami International Airport... They've even been used at the Super Bowl. Why are these machines suddenly appearing out of nowhere? And what does it mean for your money? I recently arranged an interview with former Goldman Sachs managing director, Dr. Nomi Prins, to get her take. There's nobody in America who's more aware of the inner workings of the banking system. In the interview, Dr. Prins explained these strange 'reverse ATMs.' And she said she expects them to play a key role this Summer as our nation's financial system is overhauled for the first time since 1971. According to her research, many Americans will be blindsided by what's to come. BUT, folks who understand the 'Reverse ATM' phenomenon before it becomes obvious to the average American could actually profit in the weeks ahead. Dr. Prins accurately predicted the 2008 crash, the lockdown crash, and connected the dots between the White House and the Federal Reserve. And now, she says: "My research shows the Fed is installing the infrastructure for a massive overhaul to our financial system, and I expect it to go live by the end of July. In other words, time is short." To help folks prepare, she's recorded a briefing that explains exactly what she sees coming, how it will play out, and how much time you have to prepare. Regards, Maria Bonaventura Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics P.S. The last time we saw a similar overhaul to the financial system, folks who stayed on the sidelines lost almost everything. But folks who acted quickly had the opportunity to rescue their retirement accounts before they were decimated. Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Team Wexton
subject: Jennifer stands for fair districts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
It’s important that keep alive the push for legislation to end gerrymandering

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66084098/415270345/-772585877?refcode=EM_PET_230706GM_N_TW_FULL_8_NG_B_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGNlNGRiOC00YzFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1n9nUVQpph9oB8PJ1KpvnNfkcMrrzvLCcCR7-lSQeGA=)
---
Friend, the Supreme Court wrapped up its term last week. And — as seems to be the unfortunate norm these days — this term contained many rulings that are going to set our country’s progress back.

But as we fight to organize against recent setbacks, it’s important to note one area in which the Supreme Court has given us momentum: **achieving fair district lines across this country.**

In two undeniably _positive_ rulings last month, the Supreme Court upheld a critical section of the Voting Rights Act that protects against racial gerrymandering, and it rejected an extreme Republican effort to let state legislatures ignore state court mandates on redistricting.

**Jennifer was heartened by these two decisions, and she’s more determined than ever to keep the push alive for fair district legislation in Congress.** [**Will you join her and sign your name to say that you’re ready to end gerrymandering?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66084108/415270347/1348520645?ms=EM_PET_230706GM_N_TW_FULL_8_NG_B_L1&refcode=EM_PET_230706GM_N_TW_FULL_8_NG_B_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGNlNGRiOC00YzFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1n9nUVQpph9oB8PJ1KpvnNfkcMrrzvLCcCR7-lSQeGA=&emci=887977fe-4b1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=e8ce4db8-4c1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) [Add Your Name ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66084114/415270360/1348520645?ms=EM_PET_230706GM_N_TW_FULL_8_NG_B_B1&refcode=EM_PET_230706GM_N_TW_FULL_8_NG_B_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGNlNGRiOC00YzFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1n9nUVQpph9oB8PJ1KpvnNfkcMrrzvLCcCR7-lSQeGA=&emci=887977fe-4b1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=e8ce4db8-4c1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) Gerrymandering dilutes the meaning of “one person, one vote.” And Jennifer has long believed that legislators shouldn’t get to choose their voters.

Here in Virginia, gerrymandering for years left us stuck with a state legislature that didn't reflect the will of the people — a legislature that made it harder to pass popular, common-sense policies like Medicaid expansion, gun safety, and voting rights protections.

Thanks to years of work by activists and legal advocates, we managed to strike down Virginia's gerrymander in court and finally get fair districts in the Commonwealth. But millions across the country will still lack proper representation until we end gerrymandering everywhere.

**Our democracy cannot achieve its full potential until we institute fair district lines for all.** [**Add your name today to help Jennifer in the fight to end gerrymandering →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66084115/415270363/1348520645?ms=EM_PET_230706GM_N_TW_FULL_8_NG_B_L2&refcode=EM_PET_230706GM_N_TW_FULL_8_NG_B_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGNlNGRiOC00YzFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1n9nUVQpph9oB8PJ1KpvnNfkcMrrzvLCcCR7-lSQeGA=&emci=887977fe-4b1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=e8ce4db8-4c1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120)

Thank you,

Team Wexton | **Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. She's fighting to create a strong economy, ensure equality for all, and invest in a better future for America.** ****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66084116/415270364/-772585877?refcode=EM_PET_230706GM_N_TW_FULL_8_NG_B_Biobox&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGNlNGRiOC00YzFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1n9nUVQpph9oB8PJ1KpvnNfkcMrrzvLCcCR7-lSQeGA=)****

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Netanyahu’s Latest Attack
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=322%2E791427%2ERm04eY)

Friends —
I am horrified by the latest Israeli military operation — their largest in the occupied West Bank in decades — which took the lives of 12 Palestinians in Jenin this week.
This incursion comes at a time of massive settlement expansion and de-facto annexation of the West Bank by the most right-wing government in Israeli history, led by Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu, who is now openly promising to "crush" Palestinian hopes for statehood.
As someone who has experienced the trauma of war, displacement, and living in a refugee camp firsthand, my heart is broken to know that millions of Palestinians continue suffering never-ending brutalization without care or concern from leaders across the world.
Let me be clear: every single death in this conflict is a tragedy. I wish that we as a nation would treat the pain, suffering, and anguish caused by it equally. But the fact is that we do not.
We must ask ourselves: how long will the United States continue to fund Netanyahu's human rights abuses with zero strings attached?
How long will we allow him to commit these crimes with no consequences?
How long can our country continue to pay lip service to peace and justice, while the Israeli government we provide with billions of dollars in weapons, bombs, and military aid makes it impossible?
Truly putting human rights at the center of our foreign policy means demanding accountability — whether they are our allies or adversaries.
I promise you that as a Member of Congress, a progressive, a mother, a refugee, a woman, a Muslim, and as a human being, that is what I will always do.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=2&akid=322%2E791427%2ERm04eY)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=3&akid=322%2E791427%2ERm04eY)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=4&akid=322%2E791427%2ERm04eY)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=322_791427_Rm04eY&akid=322%2E791427%2ERm04eY)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

subject: Your feedback is crucial.

body:
I wanted to follow up.
| | | Hi team -- I just reviewed this community’s recent survey responses, and I wanted to follow up personally.

Grassroots Democrats like you are central to everything we do here at the DSCC. Your support shapes our strategy, fuels our ground game, and drives our campaigns.

But your feedback is every bit as crucial -- it helps us make sure we’re meeting people where they are and talking about the issues they care most about. And as one of our **_most active supporters**_ , you're exactly the kind of Democrat we need to defend President Biden's Senate majority next year. **That’s why I’m reaching out today:**

**[Will you accept my personal invitation by taking this survey to become a Grassroots Democratic Strategist and join an _exclusive_ focus group? I'm reviewing the results tonight, so click here right away to start >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/14738?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230706-Christie-ActiveDemsGroup23RFv1-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230706-Christie-ActiveDemsGroup23RFv1-ETG-sl1&akid=11241%2E9716520%2Ef3b95A)**

| | The campaign to save Virginia and save America continued this past week with a Save America Rally in Newport News, Virginia; an interview on Frank Gaffney’s Securing America television program; and an interview on the Robert Scott Bell Show.

| | |

| | On June 27, we held the fourth in our series of Save America Rallies, this time in Newport News, Virginia, at The World Outreach Worship Center. Our gracious hosts, Pastors Russell and Sylvia Evenson, made their beautiful and spacious venue available to us and invited their congregants to attend. A crowd comprised of new friends and Emord supporters enjoyed a rousing, patriotic rally with incredible vocals from Tomika Carter and Ashley Wood. We are grateful for the overwhelming reception and support we received for our agenda to end socialism and woke indoctrination in the schools and military; eliminate inflation and overregulation; restore constitutional limits on government power; and liberate, restore, and expand our free market economy. America’s best days are ahead of us. America will once again be a bastion of liberty and opportunity. Our economy will be liberated from government shackles and revitalized through tax and regulation cuts.
---
| |
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | On June 28, I appeared on Frank Gaffney’s Securing America television show to discuss the China threat. We talked about China’s use of international organizations as proxies to deprive Americans of sovereignty. We talked about the Biden Administration’s Open Border crisis, resulting in the destruction of Americans’ lives, liberty, and property. We also discussed the Biden Administration's efforts to establish a Centralized Digital Banking Currency and Digital ID that would enable the government to invade consumers’ privacy and limit economic opportunities.
---

Our gracious hosts, Pastors Russell and Sylvia Evenson, made their beautiful and spacious venue available to us and invited their congregants to attend. A crowd comprised of new friends and Emord supporters enjoyed a rousing, patriotic rally with incredible vocals from Tomika Carter and Ashley Wood. We are grateful for the overwhelming reception and support we received for our agenda to end socialism and woke indoctrination in the schools and military; eliminate inflation and overregulation; restore constitutional limits on government power; and liberate, restore, and expand our free market economy. America’s best days are ahead of us. America will once again be a bastion of liberty and opportunity. Our economy will be liberated from government shackles and revitalized through tax and regulation cuts. | | | | | | | | | | | On June 28, I appeared on Frank Gaffney’s Securing America television show to discuss the China threat. We talked about China’s use of international organizations as proxies to deprive Americans of sovereignty. We talked about the Biden Administration’s Open Border crisis, resulting in the destruction of Americans’ lives, liberty, and property. We also discussed the Biden Administration's efforts to establish a Centralized Digital Banking Currency and Digital ID that would enable the government to invade consumers’ privacy and limit economic opportunities. | | | | | | | | On June 29, I appeared on the Robert Scott Bell Show, as I do weekly, to discuss the latest national and international news and events. | | | | | | | | See you on the campaign trail, Jonathan | | | | | | | | | | | | | PRESS RELEASE Veteran constitutional and administrative attorney Jonathan Emord announced today he is a candidate for the U.S. Senate in 2024. | | | Get our latest updates | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Share on social | | | | You've received this email because you are a subscriber of . ## Why Chris Christie:

Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America.
