name: Special Election Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: Don’t let the GOP silence your voice→
body:
Special elections are always tough. Voters aren’t as tuned into politics in the middle of the summer as they are around November, and fundraising slows down to a trickle. | | |
---
| | In April, three Democratic lawmakers in Tennessee peacefully rallied with activists to demand new gun safety laws. **In response, extreme Republicans _voted to expel_ two members of the legislature – _Reps. Jones and Pearson._** Instead of listening to their constituents’ calls for commonsense gun safety measures, Republicans silenced their opponents for speaking out. Now, Reps. Jones and Pearson are running in special elections to reclaim their seats in the House. **But Republicans are pouring in money to defeat Rep. Jones and have made it clear they don’t want Rep. Pearson in the legislature. It’s up to _us_ to show the GOP that their anti-democratic attacks won’t go unchallenged.** [With less than one month until Election Day, we need your support to push back against the GOP’s hateful agenda and show that Democrats will not be silenced. Special elections – especially in Republican-dominated states like Tennessee – are always tough.
Voters aren’t as tuned into politics in the middle of the summer as they are around November, and fundraising slows down to a trickle.
But that doesn’t mean we can just throw in the towel. It means we need to fight _harder_. It means we need to recruit more volunteers, reach out to more voters, and give even more to help Democrats win.
[Can we count you in? Help Democrats in states like Tennessee and across the country win critical elections →](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yoKG8CTelWWDHki88pvURtxM-7M6lx0tBvbL0QK0PU4tH4hgDbXvbknHaD30DY7EDPncE6mHWG1XnXXMOMGqKNnUFg08R-54WNn5j-PTyyDTGfezaZl4BR1ceJJlJyOtrZPbzF9rJLLzjnVDI0jirNayZtYhbL9f_R2UKTN_xykeJiV9hPLx4EKSKD7WS8MvwPLxrixbUMcSNgher7z5bor1EPwSh7UKs_OKYs4QUPewOwvzVkx-ilCe2s0NAymO0l1FtlrOJyVdaVKhS0htUOXoFtm7vm2pz11ve5U-uBMvibjw1tKz681g0AeVikQL1LiNXedIvtfYWNaLWgxtJToWwmtKJI_Y3DCkQkIWHmQcYP0JxEy6YICG_J68eKVY7tu_f8RCiI1ldwYteMUD9An4bULW_NOPWXRQNd_61EJqihJOq3kk-QrpWpGV7gbGqx60MqtgPTRmMkYz-A1OHU/3xn/cRSoRAxITEqNAIdEKEyEXA/h6/3N-kqbn4KVa9ZkenfJC5oI4VqqN9mUiZ3ZoOikBPq5c)

clean_body: Special elections are always tough. Voters aren’t as tuned into politics in the middle of the summer as they are around November, and fundraising slows down to a trickle. | | | | | In April, three Democratic lawmakers in Tennessee peacefully rallied with activists to demand new gun safety laws. In response, extreme Republicans voted to expel two members of the legislature – Reps. Jones and Pearson. Instead of listening to their constituents’ calls for commonsense gun safety measures, Republicans silenced their opponents for speaking out. Now, Reps. Jones and Pearson are running in special elections to reclaim their seats in the House. But Republicans are pouring in money to defeat Rep. Jones and have made it clear they don’t want Rep. Pearson in the legislature. It’s up to us to show the GOP that their anti-democratic attacks won’t go unchallenged. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Special elections – especially in Republican-dominated states like Tennessee – are always tough. Voters aren’t as tuned into politics in the middle of the summer as they are around November, and fundraising slows down to a trickle. But that doesn’t mean we can just throw in the towel. It means we need to fight harder. It means we need to recruit more volunteers, reach out to more voters, and give even more to help Democrats win. Thanks, Team DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the DLCC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee and Grassroots Victory PAC are dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our supporters. Please add us to your address book or safe senders list to ensure timely election updates. We're fighting to elect Democrats and advance a progressive vision in the states. Our success depends on grassroots donors like you. Ninety-eight percent of our donors give less than $200, and two-thirds give less than $20. To make a contribution, please . **MESSAGE FROM CONGRESSWOMAN MARIANNETTE MILLER-MEEKS**
Friend,

I hate to be the bearer of bad news -- but we missed our End-of-Quarter deadline.

I didn't want to send you this message today, but I couldn't ignore this significant setback. This is terrible news for our fight to secure our slim majority in Congress.

I'm not going to give you a number -- but thanks to a few generous donors, we were SO CLOSE to making our deadline. Unfortunately, we didn't see the grassroots support we expected this far from election day.

**As of today -- 732 donors made a HUGE difference in the second quarter by contributing to my campaign.**

I'm hoping just **18 patriots** can step up by **MIDNIGHT** and help this campaign meet our 2nd quarter goal of 750 Donors.

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66089295/415272952/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230706_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTgyYzYxZTktNTAxYy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3luQAI9SOxfR9yOiMvVIZGMhlPYgywsd-u77cVdKuTU=)
---
Did you see the news, Peter? **After he fell only six percentage points short of winning the New York Governor's race last cycle, right-wing extremist Lee Zeldin recently announced that he's "keeping an eye" on a run to defeat me here in New York.** New York was the only state hit by a true red wave in 2022, and it helped flip the House majority for Kevin McCarthy. Now, it's clear that the GOP is targeting my seat to flip the Senate next. name: Jayapal HQ
subject: We must expand the Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Reforming the courts is the only way we can work to restore public confidence and trust in our highest courts.
#
Peter,
Last week was a whirlwind for our democracy. We watched as the slanted Supreme Court stripped away our communities of abortion rights first, then gun safety and environmental, now affirmative action. And we don’t know what they’re planning to attack next.
This extreme SCOTUS continues to prove that they are out of touch with everyday Americans and are deeply influenced by far-right politicians and special interests. **Enough is enough.**
It's time to restore balance to the bench, Peter.**We****need to expand SCOTUS now.**[**If you stand with our movement to expand the Supreme Court, please add your name to our petition to call on President Biden to add Justices to the Court and reverse the damage that's been done.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/expand-scotus-petition/?source=em20230706-2678&t=1&akid=2678%2E420207%2E8AmqpW)
**[Add your name ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/expand-scotus-petition/?source=em20230706-2678&t=2&akid=2678%2E420207%2E8AmqpW)**
**Extremists in the highest court of the land are decimating abortion rights, upholding white supremacy, and blocking life-changing debt relief.** There's too much at stake to leave our fate in the hands of just nine supreme court justices who are not equipped to bring solutions to the urgent needs of the people.
Reforming the courts is the only way we can work to restore public confidence and trust in our highest courts and work to build back our democracy rooted in compassion, unity, and equality.
**This extreme SCOTUS is a direct threat to our rights and our democracy. We need to put our foot down now and demand better from and for our government.** [**Add your name today to call on President Biden to expand the Supreme Court.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/expand-scotus-petition/?source=em20230706-2678&t=3&akid=2678%2E420207%2E8AmqpW)
Together,
Jayapal HQ

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230706-2678-footer&t=4&refcode2=2678_420207_8AmqpW&akid=2678%2E420207%2E8AmqpW)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=5&akid=2678%2E420207%2E8AmqpW)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=2678%2E420207%2E8AmqpW)

name: Our Revolution
subject: Student debt fight isn’t over - join our live call with Ro Khanna
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
| [](https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/Mon_Call_230710/?t=9&akid=4430%2E5885482%2ELO3k0S) Peter Willis,

Breaking news of the Supreme Court striking down student debt relief was a gut punch, but it has only galvanized our movement.

Biden can still Cancel Student Debt, and Our Revolution is organizing with US Rep. Ro Khanna and mobilizing our student debt leaders around the country to call on the President to deliver using the Higher Education Act.

[**RSVP now to join Our Revolution’s Student Debt Town Hall with US Rep. Ro Khanna to strategize for next steps — the LIVE event kicks off this Monday at 8:30pm ET/5:30pm PT on Zoom.**](https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/Mon_Call_230710/?t=10&akid=4430%2E5885482%2ELO3k0S)

We can’t let student debt payments restart in September - with interest! - in the middle of an affordability crisis. That is a recipe for disaster for 43 million people, our families and communities.

President Biden said he’s willing to go to Plan B, but our movement must be strong and unified in holding him to it. Join us on Monday to organize directly with Ro Khanna and our student debt coalition as we enter the next phase of this fight. | | [CLICK HERE TO RSVP!](https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/Mon_Call_230710/?t=11&akid=4430%2E5885482%2ELO3k0S)
---
When we organize, we win!

Our Revolution

* * *

clean_body: | Peter Willis, Breaking news of the Supreme Court striking down student debt relief was a gut punch, but it has only galvanized our movement. Biden can still Cancel Student Debt, and Our Revolution is organizing with US Rep. Ro Khanna and mobilizing our student debt leaders around the country to call on the President to deliver using the Higher Education Act. We can’t let student debt payments restart in September - with interest! - in the middle of an affordability crisis. That is a recipe for disaster for 43 million people, our families and communities. President Biden said he’s willing to go to Plan B, but our movement must be strong and unified in holding him to it. Join us on Monday to organize directly with Ro Khanna and our student debt coalition as we enter the next phase of this fight. | | When we organize, we win! In Florida, we got it done and beat the woke agenda, it's time we do it for all of America. **

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

clean_body: I am not accepting a woke America. | | | | | | | | | | Friend, Over the past few years, I've watched our country spiral. Across the country, the Left has taken advantage of a weak executive and lit the fire of cultural Marxism. The fire has smoldered in our schools; it has smoldered in corporate boardrooms; it has smoldered in the halls of government. Right now, America needs an energetic executive who has the will to fight back and WIN against the woke agenda that is infiltrating our businesses, military, and children 's schools. In Florida, we got it done and beat the woke agenda, it's time we do it for all of America. | | Why do Joe Biden and the Left think it's common sense to salute the Pride Flag? Or fly it equal to our American Flag? Why does the Left find it appropriate to applaud a group of topless transgender women on the White House lawn at a "family friendly event" where children were present? Why have our federal leaders stood idly by while American children and adults have been told by the woke mob that we must accept that men can get pregnant? Why is America accepting decline as a choice, when success is attainable? | Enough is enough. I think about why I entered this race and look, I've got kids, we want to leave America in a better place for the next generation than where we found it. When elected your next President, we will restore sanity to this nation, we will return normalcy to our communities, and we will reinstate integrity across institutions. No excuses. The time is now and I need your help. I'm humbly asking for your support to show this country our momentum. "Please consider chipping in $10, $25, $47, or any other amount you can afford." | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | "Please chip in any amount before my campaign’s first FEC-mandated fundraising deadline on June 30th.". In Freedom, | Ron DeSantis | | | Meet Ron DeSantis | | | | | A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment. In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn't stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. clean_body: And they’re going to do it again That’s why the radical Left and their cronies led by our clueless President in Washington are targeting my race. The FREE state of Florida will be ground zero for Democrats targeting Republican-held seats like mine, and I cannot OVERSTATE how important it is that we KEEP Florida red. The math is simple. Republicans MUST hold onto all our Senate seats like mine PLUS win 2 Democratic seats to take back the Majority. Democrats are DESPERATE, and they really want me gone. The last time I ran, their dark-money groups poured over $80 MILLION into defeating me. Luckily I won, but it was NOT easy. I was told YOU are a top supporter, and I could use your help to ensure our campaign can compete against the far Left. What do you say, Fellow American? Can you help us keep Florida FREE AND put Republicans back in the Majority?
